The architectural design space is vast (effectively infinite for practical purposes), yet human teams explore perhaps 50-100 designs per generation, sampling less than 0.001% of possibilities. This approach worked during the abundance era when Moore's Law provided a rising tide that lifted all designs. In the current scarcity paradigm, where every architecture must deliver 2X performance improvements using essentially the same transistor budget, systematic exploration becomes critical. We propose a concrete alternative: automated idea factories that generate and evaluate thousands of candidate architectures weekly through multi-tiered evaluation pipelines, learning from deployed telemetry data in a continuous feedback loop. Early results suggest that such systems can compress architectural design cycles from double-digit months to single-digit weeks by exploring orders of magnitude more candidates than any human team, and do it much faster. We predict that within 2 years, purely human-driven architecture research will be as obsolete as human chess players competing against engines.

AI.tldr: 论文提出自动化架构设计工厂，通过多层级评估流水线每周生成和评估数千个候选架构，利用部署遥测数据进行持续反馈学习，将架构设计周期从数月压缩到数周。
AI.motivation: 摩尔定律和登纳德缩放定律的终结改变了计算机架构的经济学。晶体管缩放带来的收益递减，架构创新成为性能提升的主要（或许是唯一）杠杆。然而，人类驱动的架构研究已不适合新时代：设计空间巨大（实际无限），人类团队每代仅探索50-100个设计，采样率不足0.001%。在稀缺范式下，需要系统化探索来获得2倍性能提升。
AI.method: 提出自动化想法工厂：通过多层级评估流水线每周生成和评估数千个候选架构，形成持续反馈循环，从部署的遥测数据中学习。系统探索比人类团队多几个数量级的候选设计，速度更快。
AI.result: 早期结果表明，此类系统可将架构设计周期从两位数月份压缩到个位数周数。预测在2年内，纯粹人类驱动的架构研究将像人类棋手对抗引擎一样过时。
AI.conclusion: 自动化架构设计工厂是应对后摩尔定律时代性能提升挑战的必要解决方案，能够实现系统化、大规模的设计空间探索，大幅加速架构创新周期。

title: 3D-Fixer: Coarse-to-Fine In-place Completion for 3D Scenes from a Single Image
comment: 17 pages, 10 figures, CVPR 2026, project page: https://zx-yin.github.io/3dfixer
summary: Compositional 3D scene generation from a single view requires the simultaneous recovery of scene layout and 3D assets. Existing approaches mainly fall into two categories: feed-forward generation methods and per-instance generation methods. The former directly predict 3D assets with explicit 6DoF poses through efficient network inference, but they generalize poorly to complex scenes. The latter improve generalization through a divide-and-conquer strategy, but suffer from time-consuming pose optimization. To bridge this gap, we introduce 3D-Fixer, a novel in-place completion paradigm. Specifically, 3D-Fixer extends 3D object generative priors to generate complete 3D assets conditioned on the partially visible point cloud at the original locations, which are cropped from the fragmented geometry obtained from the geometry estimation methods. Unlike prior works that require explicit pose alignment, 3D-Fixer uses fragmented geometry as a spatial anchor to preserve layout fidelity. At its core, we propose a coarse-to-fine generation scheme to resolve boundary ambiguity under occlusion, supported by a dual-branch conditioning network and an Occlusion-Robust Feature Alignment (ORFA) strategy for stable training. Furthermore, to address the data scarcity bottleneck, we present ARSG-110K, the largest scene-level dataset to date, comprising over 110K diverse scenes and 3M annotated images with high-fidelity 3D ground truth. Extensive experiments show that 3D-Fixer achieves state-of-the-art geometric accuracy, which significantly outperforms baselines such as MIDI and Gen3DSR, while maintaining the efficiency of the diffusion process. Code and data will be publicly available at https://zx-yin.github.io/3dfixer.

AI.tldr: 3D-Fixer提出了一种新颖的原位补全范式，用于从单视图进行组合式3D场景生成，通过利用碎片化几何作为空间锚点，避免了显式姿态对齐，并采用粗到细生成方案解决遮挡下的边界模糊问题。
AI.motivation: 现有3D场景生成方法存在局限性：前馈生成方法泛化能力差，无法处理复杂场景；基于实例的方法虽然泛化好但姿态优化耗时。需要一种既能保持布局保真度又能高效生成的方法。
AI.method: 提出3D-Fixer原位补全范式，利用碎片化几何作为空间锚点，避免显式姿态对齐。采用粗到细生成方案，包含双分支条件网络和遮挡鲁棒特征对齐策略。同时构建了ARSG-110K大规模场景级数据集。
AI.result: 3D-Fixer在几何精度上达到最先进水平，显著优于MIDI和Gen3DSR等基线方法，同时保持了扩散过程的高效性。
AI.conclusion: 3D-Fixer通过原位补全范式有效解决了单视图3D场景生成的布局保真度和效率问题，为组合式3D场景生成提供了新思路。

title: InsightBoard: An Interactive Multi-Metric Visualization and Fairness Analysis Plugin for TensorBoard
summary: Modern machine learning systems deployed in safety-critical domains require visibility not only into aggregate performance but also into how training dynamics affect subgroup fairness over time. Existing training dashboards primarily support single-metric monitoring and offer limited support for examining relationships between heterogeneous metrics or diagnosing subgroup disparities during training. We present InsightBoard, an interactive TensorBoard plugin that integrates synchronized multi-metric visualization with slice-based fairness diagnostics in a unified interface. InsightBoard enables practitioners to jointly inspect training dynamics, performance metrics, and subgroup disparities through linked multi-view plots, correlation analysis, and standard group fairness indicators computed over user-defined slices. Through case studies with YOLOX on the BDD100k dataset, we demonstrate that models achieving strong aggregate performance can still exhibit substantial demographic and environmental disparities that remain hidden under conventional monitoring. By making fairness diagnostics available during training, InsightBoard supports earlier, more informed model inspection without modifying existing training pipelines or introducing additional data stores.

AI.tldr: InsightBoard是一个TensorBoard插件，提供多指标可视化与基于切片的公平性诊断，帮助在训练过程中检测隐藏的子群体差异。
AI.motivation: 现有训练监控工具主要支持单一指标监控，缺乏对异构指标关系和子群体差异的诊断能力。在安全关键领域，需要了解训练动态如何影响子群体公平性。
AI.method: 开发了InsightBoard插件，集成了同步多指标可视化和基于切片的公平性诊断，提供链接多视图图、相关性分析和标准群体公平指标。
AI.result: 在BDD100k数据集上的YOLOX案例研究表明，即使模型在整体性能上表现良好，仍可能存在显著的人口统计和环境差异，这些差异在传统监控下会被隐藏。
AI.conclusion: InsightBoard使公平性诊断在训练过程中可用，支持更早、更明智的模型检查，无需修改现有训练流程或引入额外数据存储。

title: BoxComm: Benchmarking Category-Aware Commentary Generation and Narration Rhythm in Boxing
summary: Recent multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have shown strong capabilities in general video understanding, driving growing interest in automatic sports commentary generation. However, existing benchmarks for this task focus exclusively on team sports such as soccer and basketball, leaving combat sports entirely unexplored. Notably, combat sports present distinct challenges: critical actions unfold within milliseconds with visually subtle yet semantically decisive differences, and professional commentary contains a substantially higher proportion of tactical analysis compared to team sports. In this paper, we present BoxComm, a large-scale dataset comprising 445 World Boxing Championship match videos with over 52K commentary sentences from professional broadcasts. We propose a structured commentary taxonomy that categorizes each sentence into play-by-play, tactical, or contextual, providing the first category-level annotation for sports commentary benchmarks. Building on this taxonomy, we introduce two novel and complementary evaluations tailored to sports commentary generation: (1) category-conditioned generation, which evaluates whether models can produce accurate commentary of a specified type given video context; and (2) commentary rhythm assessment, which measures whether freely generated commentary exhibits appropriate temporal pacing and type distribution over continuous video segments, capturing a dimension of commentary competence that prior benchmarks have not addressed. Experiments on multiple state-of-the-art MLLMs reveal that current models struggle on both evaluations. We further propose EIC-Gen, an improved baseline incorporating detected punch events to supply structured action cues, yielding consistent gains and highlighting the importance of perceiving fleeting and subtle events for combat sports commentary.

AI.tldr: 提出了BoxComm数据集，专注于拳击比赛解说生成，包含445场世界拳击锦标赛视频和52K专业解说句子，并引入了类别条件生成和节奏评估两种新评测方法。
AI.motivation: 现有体育解说生成基准仅关注团队运动（如足球、篮球），忽略了格斗运动。格斗运动具有独特挑战：关键动作在毫秒内发生且视觉差异细微但语义决定性强，专业解说中战术分析比例远高于团队运动。
AI.method: 1) 构建BoxComm大规模数据集；2) 提出结构化解说分类法（实况解说、战术分析、背景信息）；3) 引入两种评测：类别条件生成（评估模型生成指定类型解说的能力）和节奏评估（评估生成解说的时序分布和类型分布）；4) 提出EIC-Gen基线方法，结合检测到的出拳事件提供结构化动作线索。
AI.result: 实验表明当前最先进的MLLMs在两种评测上均表现不佳。提出的EIC-Gen方法通过结合检测到的出拳事件，在所有评测指标上取得一致提升，强调了感知短暂细微事件对格斗运动解说的重要性。
AI.conclusion: BoxComm填补了格斗运动解说生成基准的空白，提出的评测方法捕捉了先前基准未涉及的解说能力维度。当前MLLMs在格斗运动解说生成方面仍有局限，结合结构化动作线索的方法能显著提升性能。

title: HandDreamer: Zero-Shot Text to 3D Hand Model Generation using Corrective Hand Shape Guidance
comment: Accepted at IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) 2026
summary: The emergence of virtual reality has necessitated the generation of detailed and customizable 3D hand models for interaction in the virtual world. However, the current methods for 3D hand model generation are both expensive and cumbersome, offering very little customizability to the users. While recent advancements in zero-shot text-to-3D synthesis have enabled the generation of diverse and customizable 3D models using Score Distillation Sampling (SDS), they do not generalize very well to 3D hand model generation, resulting in unnatural hand structures, view-inconsistencies and loss of details. To address these limitations, we introduce HandDreamer, the first method for zero-shot 3D hand model generation from text prompts. Our findings suggest that view-inconsistencies in SDS is primarily caused due to the ambiguity in the probability landscape described by the text prompt, resulting in similar views converging to different modes of the distribution. This is particularly aggravated for hands due to the large variations in articulations and poses. To alleviate this, we propose to use MANO hand model based initialization and a hand skeleton guided diffusion process to provide a strong prior for the hand structure and to ensure view and pose consistency. Further, we propose a novel corrective hand shape guidance loss to ensure that all the views of the 3D hand model converges to view-consistent modes, without leading to geometric distortions. Extensive evaluations demonstrate the superiority of our method over the state-of-the-art methods, paving a new way forward in 3D hand model generation.

AI.tldr: HandDreamer：首个从文本提示生成零样本3D手部模型的方法，通过MANO手部模型初始化、骨架引导扩散和校正形状指导损失解决视图不一致问题
AI.motivation: 虚拟现实需要详细可定制的3D手部模型，但现有方法昂贵且不灵活。虽然零样本文本到3D合成技术有所进展，但在手部生成上效果不佳，存在结构不自然、视图不一致和细节丢失问题
AI.method: 1) 使用MANO手部模型初始化提供强先验；2) 手部骨架引导扩散过程确保视图和姿态一致性；3) 提出新颖的校正手部形状指导损失，确保所有视图收敛到一致的分布模式
AI.result: 广泛评估表明该方法优于现有最先进方法，在3D手部模型生成方面开辟了新途径
AI.conclusion: HandDreamer成功解决了零样本3D手部生成中的视图不一致问题，通过结构化先验和校正损失实现了高质量、可定制的3D手部模型生成

title: SDVDiag: Using Context-Aware Causality Mining for the Diagnosis of Connected Vehicle Functions
comment: 7 pages, 4 figures, to be submitted to the VTC2026
summary: Real-world implementations of connected vehicle functions are spreading steadily, yet operating these functions reliably remains challenging due to their distributed nature and the complexity of the underlying cloud, edge, and networking infrastructure. Quick diagnosis of problems and understanding the error chains that lead to failures is essential for reducing downtime. However, diagnosing these systems is still largely performed manually, as automated analysis techniques are predominantly data-driven and struggle with hidden relationships and the integration of context information. This paper addresses this gap by introducing a multimodal approach that integrates human feedback and system-specific information into the causal analysis process. Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback is employed to continuously train a causality mining model while incorporating expert knowledge. Additional modules leverage distributed tracing data to prune false-positive causal links and enable the injection of domain-specific relationships to further refine the causal graph.Evaluation is performed using an automated valet parking application operated in a connected vehicle test field. Results demonstrate a significant increase in precision from 14\% to 100\% for the detection of causal edges and improved system interpretability compared to purely data-driven approaches, highlighting the potential for system operators in the connected vehicle domain.

AI.tldr: 提出一种多模态因果分析方法，整合人类反馈与系统特定信息，通过RLHF持续训练因果挖掘模型，提升联网车辆系统的故障诊断精度
AI.motivation: 联网车辆系统由于分布式特性和复杂的基础设施，故障诊断困难。现有自动化分析技术主要基于数据驱动，难以处理隐藏关系和上下文信息整合，需要人工诊断。
AI.method: 1) 多模态方法整合人类反馈和系统特定信息；2) 使用RLHF持续训练因果挖掘模型；3) 利用分布式追踪数据剪枝假阳性因果链接；4) 注入领域特定关系细化因果图
AI.result: 在自动代客泊车应用中，因果边检测精度从14%提升到100%，系统可解释性相比纯数据驱动方法显著改善
AI.conclusion: 该方法显著提升了联网车辆系统的故障诊断精度和可解释性，展示了在联网车辆领域系统操作中的潜力

title: Parameter-Efficient Semantic Augmentation for Enhancing Open-Vocabulary Object Detection
summary: Open-vocabulary object detection (OVOD) enables models to detect any object category, including unseen ones. Benefiting from large-scale pre-training, existing OVOD methods achieve strong detection performance on general scenarios (e.g., OV-COCO) but suffer severe performance drops when transferred to downstream tasks with substantial domain shifts. This degradation stems from the scarcity and weak semantics of category labels in domain-specific task, as well as the inability of existing models to capture auxiliary semantics beyond coarse-grained category label. To address these issues, we propose HSA-DINO, a parameter-efficient semantic augmentation framework for enhancing open-vocabulary object detection. Specifically, we propose a multi-scale prompt bank that leverages image feature pyramids to capture hierarchical semantics and select domain-specific local semantic prompts, progressively enriching textual representations from coarse to fine-grained levels. Furthermore, we introduce a semantic-aware router that dynamically selects the appropriate semantic augmentation strategy during inference, thereby preventing parameter updates from degrading the generalization ability of the pre-trained OVOD model. We evaluate HSA-DINO on OV-COCO, several vertical domain datasets, and modified benchmark settings. The results show that HSA-DINO performs favorably against previous state-of-the-art methods, achieving a superior trade-off between domain adaptability and open-vocabulary generalization.

AI.tldr: HSA-DINO：一种参数高效的语义增强框架，用于提升开放词汇目标检测的领域适应性和开放词汇泛化能力
AI.motivation: 现有开放词汇目标检测方法在大规模预训练后，在通用场景表现良好，但在领域转移较大的下游任务中性能严重下降。这源于领域特定任务中类别标签稀缺且语义弱，以及现有模型无法捕获粗粒度类别标签之外的辅助语义。
AI.method: 提出HSA-DINO框架：1）多尺度提示库，利用图像特征金字塔捕获层次化语义并选择领域特定的局部语义提示，从粗到细粒度逐步丰富文本表示；2）语义感知路由器，在推理时动态选择适当的语义增强策略，防止参数更新降低预训练模型的泛化能力。
AI.result: 在OV-COCO、多个垂直领域数据集和修改的基准设置上评估，HSA-DINO优于先前最先进方法，在领域适应性和开放词汇泛化之间实现了更好的权衡。
AI.conclusion: HSA-DINO通过参数高效的语义增强，有效解决了开放词汇目标检测在领域转移中的性能下降问题，实现了更好的领域适应性和开放词汇泛化平衡。

title: AICCE: AI Driven Compliance Checker Engine
comment: Accepted for publication in IEEE Transactions on Artificial Intelligence
summary: For digital infrastructure to be safe, compatible, and standards-aligned, automated communication protocol compliance verification is crucial. Nevertheless, current rule-based systems are becoming less and less effective since they are unable to identify subtle or intricate non-compliance, which attackers frequently use to establish covert communication channels in IPv6 traffic. In order to automate IPv6 compliance verification, this paper presents the Artificial Intelligence Driven Compliance Checker Engine (AICCE), a novel generative system that combines dual-architecture reasoning and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG). Specification segments pertinent to each query can be efficiently retrieved thanks to the semantic encoding of protocol standards into a high-dimensional vector space. Based on this framework, AICCE offers two complementary pipelines: (i) Explainability Mode, which uses parallel LLM agents to render decisions and settle disputes through organized discussions to improve interpretability and robustness, and (ii) Script Execution Mode, which converts clauses into Python rules that can be executed quickly for dataset-wide verification. With the debate mechanism enhancing decision reliability in complicated scenarios and the script-based pipeline lowering per-sample latency, AICCE achieves accuracy and F1-scores of up to 99% when tested on IPv6 packet samples across sixteen cutting-edge generative models. By offering a scalable, auditable, and generalizable mechanism for identifying both routine and covert non-compliance in dynamic communication environments, our results show that AICCE overcomes the blind spots of conventional rule-based compliance checking systems.

AI.tldr: AICCE是一个基于生成式AI的IPv6协议合规检查系统，结合双架构推理和RAG技术，通过脚本执行模式和可解释性模式实现高效、可解释的协议合规验证。
AI.motivation: 数字基础设施的安全性和标准符合性需要自动化协议合规验证。传统基于规则的系统无法检测攻击者在IPv6流量中建立的隐蔽通信通道中的微妙或复杂违规行为，因此需要更智能的解决方案。
AI.method:
1. 将协议标准语义编码到高维向量空间，实现相关规范片段的高效检索
2. 设计双架构推理系统：脚本执行模式（将条款转换为可执行的Python规则）和可解释性模式（使用并行LLM代理通过结构化讨论进行决策）
3. 结合检索增强生成（RAG）技术
4. 引入辩论机制增强复杂场景下的决策可靠性
AI.result: 在IPv6数据包样本测试中，AICCE在16个前沿生成模型上达到高达99%的准确率和F1分数。脚本执行模式降低每样本延迟，辩论机制提升复杂场景下的决策可靠性。
AI.conclusion: AICCE克服了传统基于规则的合规检查系统的盲点，为动态通信环境中常规和隐蔽违规的识别提供了可扩展、可审计、可泛化的机制。

title: Beyond Few-Step Inference: Accelerating Video Diffusion Transformer Model Serving with Inter-Request Caching Reuse
summary: Video Diffusion Transformer (DiT) models are a dominant approach for high-quality video generation but suffer from high inference cost due to iterative denoising. Existing caching approaches primarily exploit similarity within the diffusion process of a single request to skip redundant denoising steps. In this paper, we introduce Chorus, a caching approach that leverages similarity across requests to accelerate video diffusion model serving. Chorus achieves up to 45\% speedup on industrial 4-step distilled models, where prior intra-request caching approaches are ineffective. Particularly, Chorus employs a three-stage caching strategy along the denoising process. Stage 1 performs full reuse of latent features from similar requests. Stage 2 exploits inter-request caching in specific latent regions during intermediate denoising steps. This stage is combined with Token-Guided Attention Amplification to improve semantic alignment between the generated video and the conditional prompts, thereby extending the applicability of full reuse to later denoising steps.

AI.tldr: Chorus提出了一种跨请求缓存方法，通过利用不同视频生成请求之间的相似性来加速视频扩散模型的推理，在4步蒸馏模型上实现了高达45%的加速。
AI.motivation: 视频扩散Transformer模型虽然能生成高质量视频，但推理成本高昂，因为需要迭代去噪。现有的缓存方法主要利用单个请求内扩散过程的相似性来跳过冗余去噪步骤，但在工业级4步蒸馏模型中效果有限。
AI.method: Chorus采用三阶段缓存策略：1）第一阶段完全重用相似请求的潜在特征；2）第二阶段在中间去噪步骤中对特定潜在区域进行跨请求缓存；3）结合Token引导注意力放大技术，提高生成视频与条件提示之间的语义对齐，从而将完全重用的适用性扩展到后期去噪步骤。
AI.result: 在工业4步蒸馏模型上实现了高达45%的加速，而先前的单请求内缓存方法在这些模型上效果不佳。
AI.conclusion: 跨请求缓存是加速视频扩散模型推理的有效方法，特别是在高度优化的工业模型中，通过三阶段缓存策略和语义对齐技术，显著提升了推理效率。

title: Composer Vector: Style-steering Symbolic Music Generation in a Latent Space
summary: Symbolic music generation has made significant progress, yet achieving fine-grained and flexible control over composer style remains challenging. Existing training-based methods for composer style conditioning depend on large labeled datasets. Besides, these methods typically support only single-composer generation at a time, limiting their applicability to more creative or blended scenarios. In this work, we propose Composer Vector, an inference-time steering method that operates directly in the model's latent space to control composer style without retraining. Through experiments on multiple symbolic music generation models, we show that Composer Vector effectively guides generations toward target composer styles, enabling smooth and interpretable control through a continuous steering coefficient. It also enables seamless fusion of multiple styles within a unified latent space framework. Overall, our work demonstrates that simple latent space steering provides a practical and general mechanism for controllable symbolic music generation, enabling more flexible and interactive creative workflows. Code and Demo are available here: https://github.com/JiangXunyi/Composer-Vector and https://jiangxunyi.github.io/composervector.github.io/

AI.tldr: Composer Vector：一种在推理时通过潜在空间操控来控制符号音乐生成中作曲家风格的方法，无需重新训练模型，支持连续风格控制和多风格融合。
AI.motivation: 现有基于训练的作曲家风格控制方法需要大量标注数据，且通常只支持单一作曲家生成，限制了在创意或混合场景中的应用。需要一种更灵活、无需重新训练的风格控制方法。
AI.method: 提出Composer Vector方法，直接在模型的潜在空间中进行推理时操控，通过连续操控系数来控制作曲家风格。该方法支持多风格在统一潜在空间框架下的无缝融合。
AI.result: 在多个符号音乐生成模型上的实验表明，Composer Vector能有效引导生成结果朝向目标作曲家风格，实现平滑且可解释的风格控制，并能实现多风格融合。
AI.conclusion: 简单的潜在空间操控为可控符号音乐生成提供了实用且通用的机制，实现了更灵活和交互式的创意工作流程。

title: Diffusion Policy with Bayesian Expert Selection for Active Multi-Target Tracking
summary: Active multi-target tracking requires a mobile robot to balance exploration for undetected targets with exploitation of uncertain tracked ones. Diffusion policies have emerged as a powerful approach for capturing diverse behavioral strategies by learning action sequences from expert demonstrations. However, existing methods implicitly select among strategies through the denoising process, without uncertainty quantification over which strategy to execute. We formulate expert selection for diffusion policies as an offline contextual bandit problem and propose a Bayesian framework for pessimistic, uncertainty-aware strategy selection. A multi-head Variational Bayesian Last Layer (VBLL) model predicts the expected tracking performance of each expert strategy given the current belief state, providing both a point estimate and predictive uncertainty. Following the pessimism principle for offline decision-making, a Lower Confidence Bound (LCB) criterion then selects the expert whose worst-case predicted performance is best, avoiding overcommitment to experts with unreliable predictions. The selected expert conditions a diffusion policy to generate corresponding action sequences. Experiments on simulated indoor tracking scenarios demonstrate that our approach outperforms both the base diffusion policy and standard gating methods, including Mixture-of-Experts selection and deterministic regression baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于贝叶斯框架的悲观不确定性感知策略选择方法，用于扩散策略中的专家选择，以解决多目标跟踪中探索与利用的平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的扩散策略方法通过去噪过程隐式选择行为策略，缺乏对执行哪个策略的不确定性量化。在多目标跟踪任务中，移动机器人需要在探索未检测目标和利用不确定跟踪目标之间取得平衡，需要更明确的策略选择机制。
AI.method: 将扩散策略中的专家选择建模为离线上下文赌博机问题，提出贝叶斯框架进行悲观、不确定性感知的策略选择。使用多头变分贝叶斯最后一层（VBLL）模型预测每个专家策略在当前信念状态下的预期跟踪性能，提供点估计和预测不确定性。基于悲观原则，使用下置信界（LCB）准则选择最坏情况下预测性能最好的专家。
AI.result: 在模拟室内跟踪场景中的实验表明，该方法优于基础扩散策略和标准门控方法，包括混合专家选择和确定性回归基线。
AI.conclusion: 提出的贝叶斯框架能够有效量化策略选择的不确定性，通过悲观选择机制避免对预测不可靠的专家过度承诺，在多目标跟踪任务中实现了更好的性能。

title: Group-DINOmics: Incorporating People Dynamics into DINO for Self-supervised Group Activity Feature Learning
summary: This paper proposes Group Activity Feature (GAF) learning without group activity annotations. Unlike prior work, which uses low-level static local features to learn GAFs, we propose leveraging dynamics-aware and group-aware pretext tasks, along with local and global features provided by DINO, for group-dynamics-aware GAF learning. To adapt DINO and GAF learning to local dynamics and global group features, our pretext tasks use person flow estimation and group-relevant object location estimation, respectively. Person flow estimation is used to represent the local motion of each person, which is an important cue for understanding group activities. In contrast, group-relevant object location estimation encourages GAFs to learn scene context (e.g., spatial relations of people and objects) as global features. Comprehensive experiments on public datasets demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance of our method in group activity retrieval and recognition. Our ablation studies verify the effectiveness of each component in our method. Code: https://github.com/tezuka0001/Group-DINOmics.

AI.tldr: 提出无需群体活动标注的群体活动特征学习方法，通过动态感知和群体感知的预训练任务，结合DINO提供的局部和全局特征，实现群体动态感知的特征学习。
AI.motivation: 现有方法使用低层次静态局部特征学习群体活动特征，缺乏对动态和群体感知的关注。需要一种无需标注的方法来学习包含局部动态和全局群体特征的活动表示。
AI.method: 提出两种预训练任务：1) 人员流估计（局部动态），捕捉每个人的运动模式；2) 群体相关物体位置估计（全局特征），学习场景上下文和空间关系。结合DINO提供的局部和全局特征进行群体动态感知的特征学习。
AI.result: 在公共数据集上的实验表明，该方法在群体活动检索和识别任务上达到了最先进的性能。消融研究验证了每个组件的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过动态感知和群体感知的预训练任务，无需群体活动标注即可学习有效的群体活动特征，在群体活动理解任务上表现出色。

title: The Ideation Bottleneck: Decomposing the Quality Gap Between AI-Generated and Human Economics Research
summary: Autonomous AI systems can now generate complete economics research papers, but they substantially underperform human-authored publications in head-to-head comparisons. This paper decomposes the quality gap into two independent components: research idea quality and execution quality. Using a two-model ensemble of fine-tuned language models trained on publication decisions (Gong, Li, and Zhou, 2026) to evaluate idea quality and a comprehensive six-dimension rubric assessed by Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite -- the same model family used as the APE tournament judge, ensuring methodological consistency -- to evaluate execution quality, we analyze 953 economics papers -- 912 AI-generated papers from the APE project and 41 human papers published in the American Economic Review and AEJ: Economic Policy. The idea quality gap is large (Cohen's d = 2.23, p < 0.001), with human papers achieving 47.1% mean ensemble exceptional probability versus 16.5% for AI. The execution quality gap is also significant but smaller (d = 0.90, p < 0.001), with human papers scoring 4.38/5.0 versus 3.84. Idea quality accounts for approximately 71% of the overall quality difference, with execution contributing 29%. The largest execution weakness is mechanism analysis depth (d = 1.43); no significant difference is found on robustness. We document that 74% of AI papers employ difference-in-differences, and only 7 AI papers (0.8%) surpass the median human paper on both idea and execution quality simultaneously. The primary bottleneck to competitive AI-generated economics research remains ideation.

AI.tldr: AI生成的经济学研究论文在质量上显著落后于人类论文，主要瓶颈在于研究想法质量而非执行质量
AI.motivation: 随着AI系统能够生成完整的经济学研究论文，需要评估AI与人类研究者在经济学研究质量上的差距，并分解这种差距的来源，以指导未来AI研究辅助工具的发展方向。
AI.method: 使用两模型集成方法：1) 基于发表决策微调的语言模型评估想法质量；2) 使用Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite按照六维度评分标准评估执行质量。分析了953篇经济学论文（912篇AI生成，41篇人类发表）。
AI.result: 想法质量差距巨大（Cohen's d=2.23），人类论文平均47.1%的卓越概率vs AI的16.5%。执行质量差距较小（d=0.90），人类4.38/5.0 vs AI 3.84。想法质量解释了71%的总质量差异，执行质量占29%。AI论文中74%使用双重差分法，仅0.8%的AI论文在想法和执行质量上同时超过人类中位数。
AI.conclusion: AI生成经济学研究的主要瓶颈是研究想法生成能力，而非技术执行能力。未来AI研究辅助工具应重点提升创新性研究想法的生成质量。

title: Beyond Standard Benchmarks: A Systematic Audit of Vision-Language Model's Robustness to Natural Semantic Variation Across Diverse Tasks
summary: Recent advances in vision-language models (VLMs) trained on web-scale image-text pairs have enabled impressive zero-shot transfer across a diverse range of visual tasks. However, comprehensive and independent evaluation beyond standard benchmarks is essential to understand their robustness, limitations, and real-world applicability. This paper presents a systematic evaluation framework for VLMs under natural adversarial scenarios for diverse downstream tasks, which has been overlooked in previous evaluation works. We evaluate a wide range of VLMs (CLIP, robust CLIP, BLIP2, and SigLIP2) on curated adversarial datasets (typographic attacks, ImageNet-A, and natural language-induced adversarial examples). We measure the natural adversarial performance of selected VLMs for zero-shot image classification, semantic segmentation, and visual question answering. Our analysis reveals that robust CLIP models can amplify natural adversarial vulnerabilities, and CLIP models significantly reduce performance for natural language-induced adversarial examples. Additionally, we provide interpretable analyses to identify failure modes. We hope our findings inspire future research in robust and fair multimodal pattern recognition.

AI.tldr: 该论文系统评估了视觉语言模型在自然对抗场景下的鲁棒性，发现鲁棒CLIP模型可能放大对抗漏洞，CLIP模型在自然语言诱导的对抗样本上性能显著下降
AI.motivation: 尽管视觉语言模型在标准基准测试中表现优异，但缺乏在自然对抗场景下的系统性评估，难以理解其真实世界应用中的鲁棒性和局限性
AI.method: 构建系统性评估框架，在多种自然对抗数据集（印刷攻击、ImageNet-A、自然语言诱导对抗样本）上评估CLIP、鲁棒CLIP、BLIP2、SigLIP2等模型，涵盖零样本图像分类、语义分割、视觉问答等任务
AI.result: 鲁棒CLIP模型可能放大自然对抗漏洞，CLIP模型在自然语言诱导对抗样本上性能显著下降，通过可解释性分析识别了失败模式
AI.conclusion: 视觉语言模型在自然对抗场景下存在显著鲁棒性问题，需要进一步研究以提升多模态模式识别的鲁棒性和公平性

title: MVis-Fold: A Three-Dimensional Microvascular Structure Inference Model for Super-Resolution Ultrasound
summary: Super-resolution ultrasound (SRUS) technology has overcome the resolution limitations of conventional ultrasound, enabling micrometer-scale imaging of microvasculature. However, due to the nature of imaging principles, three-dimensional reconstruction of microvasculature from SRUS remains an open challenge. We developed microvascular visualization fold (MVis-Fold), an innovative three-dimensional microvascular reconstruction model that integrates a cross-scale network architecture. This model can perform high-fidelity inference and reconstruction of three-dimensional microvascular networks from two-dimensional SRUS images. It precisely calculates key parameters in three-dimensional space that traditional two-dimensional SRUS cannot readily obtain. We validated the model's accuracy and reliability in three-dimensional microvascular reconstruction of solid tumors. This study establishes a foundation for three-dimensional quantitative analysis of microvasculature. It provides new tools and methods for diagnosis and monitoring of various diseases.

AI.tldr: 提出MVis-Fold模型，通过跨尺度网络架构从二维超分辨率超声图像重建三维微血管网络，解决传统超声分辨率限制和三维重建难题
AI.motivation: 超分辨率超声技术虽然突破了传统超声的分辨率限制，能够实现微米级微血管成像，但由于成像原理的特性，从SRUS图像进行三维微血管重建仍然是一个未解决的挑战。需要开发能够从二维SRUS图像重建三维微血管网络的方法。
AI.method: 开发了MVis-Fold模型，这是一种创新的三维微血管重建模型，集成了跨尺度网络架构。该模型能够从二维超分辨率超声图像进行高保真度的推理和三维微血管网络重建，精确计算传统二维SRUS无法获得的三维空间关键参数。
AI.result: 在实体肿瘤的三维微血管重建中验证了模型的准确性和可靠性。该研究为微血管的三维定量分析奠定了基础，为各种疾病的诊断和监测提供了新的工具和方法。
AI.conclusion: MVis-Fold模型成功解决了从二维SRUS图像重建三维微血管网络的挑战，为微血管三维定量分析提供了有效工具，具有重要的临床应用价值。

title: Agile Story-Point Estimation: Is RAG a Better Way to Go?
summary: The sprint-based iterative approach in the Agile software development method allows continuous feedback and adaptation. One of the crucial Agile software development activities is the sprint planning session where developers estimate the effort required to complete tasks through a consensus-based estimation technique such as Planning Poker. In the Agile software development method, a common unit of measuring development effort is Story Point (SP) which is assigned to tasks to understand the complexity and development time needed to complete them. Despite the benefits of this process, it is an extremely time-consuming manual process. To mitigate this issue, in this study, we investigated if this manual process can be automated using Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) which comprises a "Retriever" and a "Generator". We applied two embedding models - bge-large-en-v1.5, and Sentence-Transformers' all-mpnet-base-v2 on 23 open-source software projects of varying sizes and examined four key aspects: 1) how retrieval hyper-parameters influence the performance, 2) whether estimation accuracy differs across different sizes of the projects, 3) whether embedding model choice affects accuracy, and 4) how the RAG-based approach compares to the existing baselines. Although the RAG-based approach outperformed the baseline models in several occasions, our results did not exhibit statistically significant differences in performance across the projects or across the embedding models. This highlights the need for further studies and refinement of the RAG, and model adaptation strategies for better accuracy in automatically estimating user stories.

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨使用检索增强生成(RAG)自动化敏捷软件开发中的故事点估算，通过两个嵌入模型在23个开源项目上测试，发现RAG在某些情况下优于基线但无统计显著差异。
AI.motivation: 敏捷开发中的故事点估算是一个耗时的手动过程，本研究旨在探索是否可以使用RAG技术来自动化这一过程，提高效率。
AI.method: 采用RAG框架，包含检索器和生成器，使用bge-large-en-v1.5和all-mpnet-base-v2两个嵌入模型，在23个不同规模的开源软件项目上进行实验，考察检索超参数、项目规模、嵌入模型选择对性能的影响，并与现有基线比较。
AI.result: RAG方法在某些情况下优于基线模型，但在不同项目之间或不同嵌入模型之间的性能没有表现出统计显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 虽然RAG在自动化故事点估算方面显示出潜力，但需要进一步研究和改进RAG框架及模型适应策略以提高准确性。

title: Training-Free Image Editing with Visual Context Integration and Concept Alignment
summary: In image editing, it is essential to incorporate a context image to convey the user's precise requirements, such as subject appearance or image style. Existing training-based visual context-aware editing methods incur data collection effort and training cost. On the other hand, the training-free alternatives are typically established on diffusion inversion, which struggles with consistency and flexibility. In this work, we propose VicoEdit, a training-free and inversion-free method to inject the visual context into the pretrained text-prompted editing model. More specifically, VicoEdit directly transforms the source image into the target one based on the visual context, thereby eliminating the need for inversion that can lead to deviated trajectories. Moreover, we design a posterior sampling approach guided by concept alignment to enhance the editing consistency. Empirical results demonstrate that our training-free method achieves even better editing performance than the state-of-the-art training-based models.

AI.tldr: VicoEdit：一种无需训练和反演的视觉上下文感知图像编辑方法，通过直接转换源图像并采用概念对齐引导的后验采样来提升编辑一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉上下文感知图像编辑方法存在数据收集和训练成本高的问题，而无需训练的方法通常基于扩散反演，存在一致性和灵活性不足的缺陷。
AI.method: 提出无需训练和反演的VicoEdit方法，直接基于视觉上下文将源图像转换为目标图像，避免反演导致的轨迹偏差，并设计概念对齐引导的后验采样来增强编辑一致性。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，这种无需训练的方法在编辑性能上甚至超越了最先进的基于训练的模型。
AI.conclusion: VicoEdit提供了一种高效、一致的视觉上下文感知图像编辑解决方案，无需额外训练或复杂反演过程。

title: A Patch-based Cross-view Regularized Framework for Backdoor Defense in Multimodal Large Language Models
summary: Multimodal large language models have become an important infrastructure for unified processing of visual and linguistic tasks. However, such models are highly susceptible to backdoor implantation during supervised fine-tuning and will steadily output the attacker's predefined harmful responses once a specific trigger pattern is activated. The core challenge of backdoor defense lies in suppressing attack success under low poisoning ratios while preserving the model's normal generation ability. These two objectives are inherently conflicting. Strong suppression often degrades benign performance, whereas weak regularization fails to mitigate backdoor behaviors. To this end, we propose a unified defense framework based on patch augmentation and cross-view regularity, which simultaneously constrains the model's anomalous behaviors in response to triggered patterns from both the feature representation and output distribution levels. Specifically, patch-level data augmentation is combined with cross-view output difference regularization to exploit the fact that backdoor responses are abnormally invariant to non-semantic perturbations and to proactively pull apart the output distributions of the original and perturbed views, thereby significantly suppressing the success rate of backdoor triggering. At the same time, we avoid over-suppression of the model during defense by imposing output entropy constraints, ensuring the quality of normal command generation. Experimental results across three models, two tasks, and six attacks show that our proposed defense method effectively reduces the attack success rate while maintaining a high level of normal text generation capability. Our work enables the secure, controlled deployment of large-scale multimodal models in realistic low-frequency poisoning and covert triggering scenarios.

AI.tldr: 提出基于补丁增强和跨视图正则化的统一防御框架，用于保护多模态大语言模型免受后门攻击，在低中毒率下有效抑制攻击成功率同时保持正常生成能力。
AI.motivation: 多模态大语言模型在监督微调过程中容易受到后门植入攻击，一旦特定触发模式被激活就会稳定输出攻击者预定义的有害响应。后门防御的核心挑战在于低中毒率下抑制攻击成功率的同时保持模型的正常生成能力，这两个目标本质上是冲突的。
AI.method: 提出基于补丁增强和跨视图正则化的统一防御框架：1）结合补丁级数据增强与跨视图输出差异正则化，利用后门响应对非语义扰动异常不变的事实，主动拉开原始视图和扰动视图的输出分布；2）通过施加输出熵约束避免防御过程中对模型的过度抑制，确保正常指令生成质量。
AI.result: 在三个模型、两个任务和六种攻击的实验结果表明，该防御方法能有效降低攻击成功率，同时保持高水平的正常文本生成能力。
AI.conclusion: 该工作使得大规模多模态模型能够在现实低频率中毒和隐蔽触发场景中安全、可控地部署，为解决多模态大语言模型后门防御问题提供了有效方案。

title: The Indra Representation Hypothesis for Multimodal Alignment
summary: Recent studies have uncovered an interesting phenomenon: unimodal foundation models tend to learn convergent representations, regardless of differences in architecture, training objectives, or data modalities. However, these representations are essentially internal abstractions of samples that characterize samples independently, leading to limited expressiveness. In this paper, we propose The Indra Representation Hypothesis, inspired by the philosophical metaphor of Indra's Net. We argue that representations from unimodal foundation models are converging to implicitly reflect a shared relational structure underlying reality, akin to the relational ontology of Indra's Net. We formalize this hypothesis using the V-enriched Yoneda embedding from category theory, defining the Indra representation as a relational profile of each sample with respect to others. This formulation is shown to be unique, complete, and structure-preserving under a given cost function. We instantiate the Indra representation using angular distance and evaluate it in cross-model and cross-modal scenarios involving vision, language, and audio. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Indra representations consistently enhance robustness and alignment across architectures and modalities, providing a theoretically grounded and practical framework for training-free alignment of unimodal foundation models. Our code is available at https://github.com/Jianglin954/Indra.

AI.tldr: 提出Indra表示假说，认为单模态基础模型的表示会收敛到反映现实共享关系结构的表示，类似于因陀罗网的哲学隐喻，通过范畴论形式化，在跨模型和跨模态场景中增强鲁棒性和对齐性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究发现单模态基础模型倾向于学习收敛的表示，但这些表示本质上是样本的内部抽象，独立表征样本，表达能力有限。受因陀罗网哲学隐喻启发，提出这些表示实际上收敛到反映现实共享关系结构的表示。
AI.method: 使用范畴论中的V-丰富Yoneda嵌入形式化Indra表示假说，将Indra表示定义为每个样本相对于其他样本的关系轮廓。使用角距离实例化Indra表示，在视觉、语言和音频的跨模型和跨模态场景中进行评估。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，Indra表示在架构和模态之间一致地增强鲁棒性和对齐性，为单模态基础模型的无训练对齐提供了理论基础和实践框架。
AI.conclusion: Indra表示假说为理解单模态基础模型表示收敛现象提供了理论解释，提出的框架能够有效增强跨模型和跨模态的鲁棒性和对齐性，具有理论和实践价值。

title: Physics-Constrained Adaptive Flow Matching for Climate Downscaling
summary: Regional climate information at kilometer scales is essential for assessing the impacts of climate change, but generating it with global climate models is too expensive due to their high computational costs. Machine learning models offer a fast alternative, yet they often violate basic physical laws and degrade when applied to climates outside of their training distribution. We present Physics-Constrained Adaptive Flow Matching (PC-AFM), a generative downscaling model that addresses both problems. Building on the Adaptive Flow Matching (AFM) model of Fotiadis et al. (2025) as our baseline, we add soft conservation constraints that keep the downscaled output consistent with the large-scale input for precipitation and humidity, and use gradient surgery via the ConFIG algorithm to prevent these constraints from interfering with the generative objective. We train the model on Central Europe climate data, evaluate it on a 10-time downscaling task (63km to 6.3km) over six variables (near-surface temperature, precipitation, specific humidity, surface pressure, and horizontal wind components) across a comprehensive set of metrics including bias, ensemble skill scores, power spectra, and conservation error, and test the generalization on two held-out climate regions. Within the training distribution, PC-AFM reduces conservation errors and improves ensemble calibration while matching the baseline on standard skill metrics. Outside the training distribution, where unconstrained models develop large systematic errors by extrapolating learned statistics, PC-AFM halves precipitation wet bias, reduces conservation error and improves extreme-quantile accuracy, all without any information about the target climate at inference time. These results indicate that physical consistency is a practical requirement for deploying generative downscaling models in real-world applications.

AI.tldr: PC-AFM是一种生成式降尺度模型，通过物理约束和梯度手术技术，在保持生成质量的同时确保降水和水汽的守恒性，显著提升了在训练分布外气候区域的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 千米尺度的区域气候信息对评估气候变化影响至关重要，但全球气候模型计算成本过高。机器学习模型虽然快速，但常违反物理定律且在训练分布外气候中性能下降。需要开发既快速又物理一致的降尺度方法。
AI.method: 基于Adaptive Flow Matching (AFM)模型，添加软守恒约束确保降尺度输出与大规模输入在降水和水汽上一致，使用ConFIG算法的梯度手术防止约束干扰生成目标。在中央欧洲气候数据上训练，评估10倍降尺度任务。
AI.result: 在训练分布内：PC-AFM减少守恒误差，改进集合校准，在标准技能指标上与基线相当。在训练分布外：将降水湿偏差减半，减少守恒误差，改进极端分位数精度，无需目标气候信息。
AI.conclusion: 物理一致性是部署生成式降尺度模型到实际应用中的实际需求。PC-AFM通过物理约束显著提升了模型在未见气候区域的泛化能力。

title: Saliency-R1: Enforcing Interpretable and Faithful Vision-language Reasoning via Saliency-map Alignment Reward
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) have achieved remarkable success across diverse tasks. However, concerns about their trustworthiness persist, particularly regarding tendencies to lean more on textual cues than visual evidence and the risk of producing ungrounded or fabricated responses. To address these issues, we propose Saliency-R1, a framework for improving the interpretability and faithfulness of VLMs reasoning. Specifically, we introduce a novel saliency map technique that efficiently highlights critical image regions contributing to generated tokens without additional computational overhead. This can further be extended to trace how visual information flows through the reasoning process to the final answers, revealing the alignment between the thinking process and the visual context. We use the overlap between the saliency maps and human-annotated bounding boxes as the reward function, and apply Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) to align the salient parts and critical regions, encouraging models to focus on relevant areas when conduct reasoning. Experiments show Saliency-R1 improves reasoning faithfulness, interpretability, and overall task performance.

AI.tldr: Saliency-R1框架通过新颖的显著性映射技术提升视觉语言模型的解释性和忠实性，利用GRPO对齐模型关注区域与关键视觉证据，改善推理质量。
AI.motivation: 当前视觉语言模型存在过度依赖文本线索而非视觉证据的问题，容易产生无根据或虚构的回答，需要提升其可信度和推理忠实性。
AI.method: 提出Saliency-R1框架：1）开发高效显著性映射技术，无需额外计算开销即可突出关键图像区域；2）扩展用于追踪视觉信息在推理过程中的流动；3）使用显著性图与人工标注边界框的重叠作为奖励函数；4）应用GRPO对齐显著区域与关键区域。
AI.result: 实验表明Saliency-R1能够提升推理忠实性、解释性和整体任务性能。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效解决了VLMs过度依赖文本线索的问题，通过视觉对齐提升了模型的可信度和推理质量。

title: Can LLMs Reason About Attention? Towards Zero-Shot Analysis of Multimodal Classroom Behavior
summary: Understanding student engagement usually requires time-consuming manual observation or invasive recording that raises privacy concerns. We present a privacy-preserving pipeline that analyzes classroom videos to extract insights about student attention, without storing any identifiable footage. Our system runs on a single GPU, using OpenPose for skeletal extraction and Gaze-LLE for visual attention estimation. Original video frames are deleted immediately after pose extraction, thus only geometric coordinates (stored as JSON) are retained, ensuring compliance with FERPA. The extracted pose and gaze data is processed by QwQ-32B-Reasoning, which performs zero-shot analysis of student behavior across lecture segments. Instructors access results through a web dashboard featuring attention heatmaps and behavioral summaries. Our preliminary findings suggest that LLMs may show promise for multimodal behavior understanding, although they still struggle with spatial reasoning about classroom layouts. We discuss these limitations and outline directions for improving LLM spatial comprehension in educational analytics contexts.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种隐私保护的课堂视频分析管道，使用姿态提取和视觉注意力估计技术，结合大语言模型进行学生行为分析，不存储可识别图像数据以符合隐私法规。
AI.motivation: 传统的学生参与度评估方法通常需要耗时的人工观察或侵犯隐私的录像，存在隐私担忧。需要一种既能分析课堂行为又能保护学生隐私的技术方案。
AI.method: 1) 使用OpenPose进行骨骼提取，提取后立即删除原始视频帧，仅保留几何坐标；2) 使用Gaze-LLE进行视觉注意力估计；3) 使用QwQ-32B-Reasoning进行零样本学生行为分析；4) 通过Web仪表板展示注意力热图和行为摘要。
AI.result: 初步研究表明，LLM在多模态行为理解方面显示出潜力，但仍在课堂布局的空间推理方面存在困难。系统能够在单个GPU上运行，确保符合FERPA隐私法规。
AI.conclusion: LLM在教育分析中具有应用前景，但需要改进其空间理解能力。提出的隐私保护管道为课堂行为分析提供了可行的技术方案。

title: Recurrent Quantum Feature Maps for Reservoir Computing
summary: Reservoir computing promises a fast method for handling large amounts of temporal data. This hinges on constructing a good reservoir--a dynamical system capable of transforming inputs into a high-dimensional representation while remembering properties of earlier data. In this work, we introduce a reservoir based on recurrent quantum feature maps where a fixed quantum circuit is reused to encode both current inputs and a classical feedback signal derived from previous outputs. We evaluate the model on the Mackey-Glass time-series prediction task using our recently introduced CP feature map, and find that it achieves lower mean squared error than standard classical baselines, including echo state networks and multilayer perceptrons, while maintaining compact circuit depth and qubit requirements. We further analyze memory capacity and show that the model effectively retains temporal information, consistent with its forecasting accuracy. Finally, we study the impact of realistic noise and find that performance is robust to several noise channels but remains sensitive to two-qubit gate errors, identifying a key limitation for near-term implementations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于循环量子特征映射的储层计算方法，用于时间序列预测任务，在Mackey-Glass数据集上表现优于经典基线模型，同时分析了噪声对性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 储层计算是处理时间数据的高效方法，但构建好的储层系统是关键。本文旨在探索量子计算在储层计算中的应用潜力，利用量子系统的优势来提升时间序列预测性能。
AI.method: 使用循环量子特征映射构建储层，固定量子电路同时编码当前输入和基于先前输出的经典反馈信号。采用CP特征映射，在Mackey-Glass时间序列预测任务上进行评估。
AI.result: 模型在Mackey-Glass任务上取得了比回声状态网络和多层感知机等经典基线更低的均方误差，同时保持了紧凑的电路深度和量子比特需求。模型能有效保留时间信息，但对两量子比特门误差敏感。
AI.conclusion: 量子储层计算在时间序列预测任务上具有潜力，性能优于经典方法，但实际部署需要考虑两量子比特门误差等噪声限制因素。

title: MedROI: Codec-Agnostic Region of Interest-Centric Compression for Medical Images
summary: Medical imaging archives are growing rapidly in both size and resolution, making efficient compression increasingly important for storage and data transfer. Most existing codecs compress full images/volumes(including non-diagnostic background) or apply differential ROI coding that still preserves background bits. We propose MedROI, a codec-agnostic, plug-and-play ROI-centric framework that discards background voxels prior to compression. MedROI extracts a tight tissue bounding box via lightweight intensity-based thresholding and stores a fixed 54byte meta data record to enable spatial restoration during decompression. The cropped ROI is then compressed using any existing 2D or 3D codec without architectural modifications or retraining. We evaluate MedROI on 200 T1-weighted brain MRI volumes from ADNI using 6 codec configurations spanning conventional codecs (JPEG2000 2D/3D, HEIF) and neural compressors (LIC_TCM, TCM+AuxT, BCM-Net, SirenMRI). MedROI yields statistically significant improvements in compression ratio and encoding/decoding time for most configurations (two-sided t-test with multiple-comparison correction), while maintaining comparable reconstruction quality when measured within the ROI; HEIF is the primary exception in compression-ratio gains. For example, on JPEG20002D (lv3), MedROI improves CR from 20.35 to 27.37 while reducing average compression time from 1.701s to 1.380s. Code is available at https://github.com/labhai/MedROI.

AI.tldr: MedROI提出了一种医学图像压缩框架，通过提取组织边界框去除背景体素，实现与编解码器无关的压缩效率提升。
AI.motivation: 医学影像档案在尺寸和分辨率上快速增长，现有编解码器要么压缩整个图像（包括非诊断背景），要么采用差分ROI编码但仍保留背景比特，导致存储和数据传输效率低下。
AI.method: MedROI采用轻量级基于强度的阈值分割提取紧密组织边界框，丢弃背景体素，仅存储54字节元数据用于空间恢复。裁剪后的ROI可使用任何现有2D或3D编解码器压缩，无需架构修改或重新训练。
AI.result: 在200个T1加权脑MRI体积上测试6种编解码器配置，MedROI在大多数配置中显著提升压缩比和编码/解码时间，同时保持ROI内可比较的重建质量。例如，JPEG2000 2D (lv3)的压缩比从20.35提升到27.37，平均压缩时间从1.701秒减少到1.380秒。
AI.conclusion: MedROI提供了一种编解码器无关、即插即用的ROI中心框架，通过去除背景体素显著提升医学图像压缩效率，适用于各种传统和神经编解码器。

title: Generative AI for material design: A mechanics perspective from burgers to matter
summary: Generative artificial intelligence offers a new paradigm to design matter in high-dimensional spaces. However, its underlying mechanisms remain difficult to interpret and limit adoption in computational mechanics. This gap is striking because its core tools-diffusion, stochastic differential equations, and inverse problems-are fundamental to the mechanics of materials. Here we show that diffusion-based generative AI and computational mechanics are rooted in the same principles. We illustrate this connection using a three-ingredient burger as a minimal benchmark for material design in a low-dimensional space, where both forward and reverse diffusion admit analytical solutions: Markov chains with Bayesian inversion in the discrete case and the Ornstein-Uhlenbeck process with score-based reversal in the continuous case. We extend this framework to a high-dimensional design space with 146 ingredients and 8.9x10^43 possible configurations, where analytical solutions become intractable. We therefore learn the discrete and continuous reverse processes using neural network models that infer inverse dynamics from data. We train the models on only 2,260 recipes and generate one million samples that capture the statistical structure of the data, including ingredient prevalence and quantitative composition. We further generate five new burgers and validate them in a restaurant-based sensory study with 100 participants, where three of the AI-designed burgers outperform the classical Big Mac in overall liking, flavor, and texture. These results establish diffusion-based generative modeling as a physically grounded approach to design in high-dimensional spaces. They position generative AI as a natural extension of computational mechanics, with applications from burgers to matter, and establish a path toward data-driven, physics-informed generative design.

AI.tldr: 该论文建立了基于扩散的生成式AI与计算力学之间的理论联系，并将其应用于高维材料设计，通过汉堡配方设计案例验证了方法的有效性。
AI.motivation: 生成式AI在材料设计等高维空间具有潜力，但其内在机制难以解释，限制了在计算力学领域的应用。作者发现扩散模型与计算力学共享相同的数学基础（扩散、随机微分方程、反问题），旨在建立两者之间的理论联系。
AI.method:
1. 使用三成分汉堡作为低维空间的基准案例，推导离散（马尔可夫链+贝叶斯反演）和连续（Ornstein-Uhlenbeck过程+基于分数的反转）情况下的解析解
2. 扩展到146种成分、8.9×10^43种可能配置的高维设计空间
3. 使用神经网络从数据中学习离散和连续的反向过程，仅用2,260个配方训练模型
4. 生成100万个样本，并通过100人参与的感官研究验证AI设计的汉堡
AI.result:
1. 成功建立了扩散生成模型与计算力学的理论联系
2. 在低维和高维空间均实现了有效的生成设计
3. 生成的样本能够捕捉数据的统计结构（成分流行度和定量组成）
4. 在感官研究中，5个AI设计的汉堡中有3个在总体喜好度、风味和质地方面优于经典巨无霸
AI.conclusion: 基于扩散的生成建模是一种具有物理基础的高维空间设计方法，将生成式AI定位为计算力学的自然延伸，为数据驱动、物理信息化的生成设计开辟了道路。

title: VisionClaw: Always-On AI Agents through Smart Glasses
comment: Submitted to UIST 2026. 10 pages, 11 figures, plus appendix
summary: We present VisionClaw, an always-on wearable AI agent that integrates live egocentric perception with agentic task execution. Running on Meta Ray-Ban smart glasses, VisionClaw continuously perceives real-world context and enables in-situ, speech-driven action initiation and delegation via OpenClaw AI agents. Therefore, users can directly execute tasks through the smart glasses, such as adding real-world objects to an Amazon cart, generating notes from physical documents, receiving meeting briefings on the go, creating events from posters, or controlling IoT devices. We evaluate VisionClaw through a controlled laboratory study (N=12) and a longitudinal deployment study (N=5). Results show that integrating perception and execution enables faster task completion and reduces interaction overhead compared to non-always-on and non-agent baselines. Beyond performance gains, deployment findings reveal a shift in interaction: tasks are initiated opportunistically during ongoing activities, and execution is increasingly delegated rather than manually controlled. These results suggest a new paradigm for wearable AI agents, where perception and action are continuously coupled to support situated, hands-free interaction.

AI.tldr: VisionClaw是一个运行在Meta Ray-Ban智能眼镜上的常开式可穿戴AI代理，结合实时自我中心感知与代理任务执行，支持语音驱动的任务执行和委托。
AI.motivation: 开发一种能够持续感知现实世界上下文并在现场执行任务的常开式可穿戴AI代理，减少用户交互开销，实现更自然的双手自由交互。
AI.method: 在Meta Ray-Ban智能眼镜上部署VisionClaw系统，集成实时自我中心感知与OpenClaw AI代理，支持语音驱动的任务执行。通过控制实验室研究(N=12)和纵向部署研究(N=5)进行评估。
AI.result: 相比非常开和非代理基线，集成感知与执行能实现更快的任务完成和更低的交互开销。部署研究发现交互模式转变：任务在持续活动中机会性启动，执行更多委托而非手动控制。
AI.conclusion: VisionClaw展示了可穿戴AI代理的新范式，其中感知与行动持续耦合，支持情境化的双手自由交互。

title: MPTF-Net: Multi-view Pyramid Transformer Fusion Network for LiDAR-based Place Recognition
summary: LiDAR-based place recognition (LPR) is essential for global localization and loop-closure detection in large-scale SLAM systems. Existing methods typically construct global descriptors from Range Images or BEV representations for matching. BEV is widely adopted due to its explicit 2D spatial layout encoding and efficient retrieval. However, conventional BEV representations rely on simple statistical aggregation, which fails to capture fine-grained geometric structures, leading to performance degradation in complex or repetitive environments. To address this, we propose MPTF-Net, a novel multi-view multi-scale pyramid Transformer fusion network. Our core contribution is a multi-channel NDT-based BEV encoding that explicitly models local geometric complexity and intensity distributions via Normal Distribution Transform, providing a noise-resilient structural prior. To effectively integrate these features, we develop a customized pyramid Transformer module that captures cross-view interactive correlations between Range Image Views (RIV) and NDT-BEV at multiple spatial scales. Extensive experiments on the nuScenes, KITTI and NCLT datasets demonstrate that MPTF-Net achieves state-of-the-art performance, specifically attaining a Recall@1 of 96.31\% on the nuScenes Boston split while maintaining an inference latency of only 10.02 ms, making it highly suitable for real-time autonomous unmanned systems.

AI.tldr: MPTF-Net：一种用于LiDAR地点识别的多视图多尺度金字塔Transformer融合网络，通过NDT-BEV编码和跨视图Transformer实现更好的几何结构建模
AI.motivation: 现有LiDAR地点识别方法通常使用Range Images或BEV表示构建全局描述符进行匹配。BEV因其明确的2D空间布局编码和高效检索而被广泛采用，但传统BEV表示依赖简单的统计聚合，无法捕捉细粒度几何结构，导致在复杂或重复环境中性能下降。
AI.method: 提出MPTF-Net，核心贡献包括：1）多通道NDT-based BEV编码，通过正态分布变换显式建模局部几何复杂度和强度分布，提供抗噪声的结构先验；2）定制的金字塔Transformer模块，在多个空间尺度上捕捉Range Image Views和NDT-BEV之间的跨视图交互相关性。
AI.result: 在nuScenes、KITTI和NCLT数据集上的广泛实验表明，MPTF-Net实现了最先进的性能，特别是在nuScenes Boston分割上达到96.31%的Recall@1，同时仅保持10.02ms的推理延迟，非常适合实时自主无人系统。
AI.conclusion: MPTF-Net通过创新的NDT-BEV编码和跨视图Transformer融合，显著提升了LiDAR地点识别的性能，特别是在复杂环境中的鲁棒性，同时保持了实时性要求。

title: StableTTA: Training-Free Test-Time Adaptation that Improves Model Accuracy on ImageNet1K to 96%
summary: Ensemble methods are widely used to improve predictive performance, but their effectiveness often comes at the cost of increased memory usage and computational complexity. In this paper, we identify a conflict in aggregation strategies that negatively impacts prediction stability. We propose StableTTA, a training-free method to improve aggregation stability and efficiency. Empirical results on ImageNet-1K show gains of 10.93--32.82\% in top-1 accuracy, with 33 models achieving over 95\% accuracy and several surpassing 96\%. Notably, StableTTA allows lightweight architectures to outperform ViT by 11.75\% in top-1 accuracy while using less than 5\% of parameters and reducing computational cost by approximately 89.1\% (in GFLOPs), enabling high-accuracy inference on resource-constrained devices.

AI.tldr: 提出StableTTA方法，解决集成方法中的聚合冲突问题，提升预测稳定性与效率，在ImageNet-1K上实现显著精度提升，轻量架构超越ViT且计算成本大幅降低。
AI.motivation: 集成方法虽然能提升预测性能，但通常以增加内存使用和计算复杂度为代价。本文发现聚合策略中存在冲突，负面影响预测稳定性，因此提出训练免费的方法来改进聚合稳定性和效率。
AI.method: 提出StableTTA（训练免费测试时增强稳定化方法），通过改进集成方法的聚合策略来解决稳定性问题，无需额外训练，直接在推理阶段应用。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-1K上获得10.93-32.82%的top-1准确率提升，33个模型超过95%准确率，多个超过96%。轻量架构在top-1准确率上超越ViT 11.75%，参数使用少于5%，计算成本降低约89.1%（以GFLOPs计）。
AI.conclusion: StableTTA能有效解决集成方法的聚合稳定性问题，在保持高精度的同时大幅降低计算资源需求，使资源受限设备也能进行高精度推理。

title: AEGIS: Scaling Long-Sequence Homomorphic Encrypted Transformer Inference via Hybrid Parallelism on Multi-GPU Systems
summary:
Fully Homomorphic Encryption (FHE) enables privacy-preserving Transformer inference, but long-sequence encrypted Transformers quickly exceed single-GPU memory capacity because encoded weights are already large and encrypted activations grow rapidly with sequence length. Multi-GPU execution therefore becomes unavoidable, yet scaling remains challenging because communication is jointly induced by application-level aggregation and encryption-level RNS coupling. Existing approaches either synchronize between devices frequently or replicate encrypted tensors across devices, leading to excessive communication and latency.
  We present AEGIS, an Application-Encryption Guided Inference System for scalable long-sequence encrypted Transformer inference on multi-GPU platforms. AEGIS derives device placement from ciphertext dependencies jointly induced by Transformer dataflow and CKKS polynomial coupling, co-locating modulus-coherent and token-coherent data so that communication is introduced only when application dependencies require it, while reordering polynomial operators to overlap the remaining collectives with computation.
  On 2048-token inputs, AEGIS reduces inter-GPU communication by up to 57.9% in feed-forward networks and 81.3% in self-attention versus prior state-of-the-art designs. On four GPUs, it achieves up to 96.62% scaling efficiency, 3.86x end-to-end speedup, and 69.1% per-device memory reduction. These results establish coordinated application-encryption parallelism as a practical foundation for scalable homomorphic Transformer inference.

AI.tldr: AEGIS系统通过联合优化Transformer数据流和同态加密多项式耦合的设备布局，减少多GPU上长序列加密Transformer推理的通信开销，实现高效扩展。
AI.motivation: 全同态加密(FHE)可实现隐私保护的Transformer推理，但长序列加密Transformer会快速超出单GPU内存容量。多GPU执行不可避免，但现有方法存在频繁同步或复制加密张量的问题，导致通信开销大和延迟高。
AI.method: AEGIS系统从Transformer数据流和CKKS多项式耦合共同诱导的密文依赖中推导设备布局，共置模数相干和令牌相干数据，仅在应用依赖需要时引入通信，同时重排多项式操作以重叠剩余集合操作与计算。
AI.result: 在2048令牌输入上，AEGIS在前馈网络中减少57.9%的GPU间通信，在自注意力中减少81.3%。在4个GPU上，实现高达96.62%的扩展效率、3.86倍端到端加速和69.1%的每设备内存减少。
AI.conclusion: 协调的应用-加密并行性为可扩展的同态Transformer推理奠定了实用基础。

title: Nonparametric Regression Discontinuity Designs with Survival Outcomes
summary: Quasi-experimental evaluations are central for generating real-world causal evidence and complementing insights from randomized trials. The regression discontinuity design (RDD) is a quasi-experimental design that can be used to estimate the causal effect of treatments that are assigned based on a running variable crossing a threshold. Such threshold-based rules are ubiquitous in healthcare, where predictive and prognostic biomarkers frequently guide treatment decisions. However, standard RD estimators rely on complete outcome data, an assumption often violated in time-to-event analyses where censoring arises from loss to follow-up. To address this issue, we propose a nonparametric approach that leverages doubly robust censoring corrections and can be paired with existing RD estimators. Our approach can handle multiple survival endpoints, long follow-up times, and covariate-dependent variation in survival and censoring. We discuss the relevance of our approach across multiple areas of applications and demonstrate its usefulness through simulations and the prostate component of the Prostate, Lung, Colorectal and Ovarian (PLCO) Cancer Screening Trial where our new approach offers several advantages, including higher efficiency and robustness to misspecification. We have also developed an open-source software package, $\texttt{rdsurvival}$, for the $\texttt{R}$ language.

AI.tldr: 提出一种处理生存分析中删失数据的非参数回归断点设计方法，结合双重稳健删失校正，适用于医疗等阈值规则场景。
AI.motivation: 回归断点设计(RDD)在医疗等领域广泛用于因果推断，但传统RDD方法要求完整结局数据，而生存分析中常存在删失问题（如失访），这限制了RDD在时间-事件分析中的应用。
AI.method: 提出非参数方法，结合双重稳健删失校正技术，可与现有RD估计器配合使用。该方法能处理多个生存终点、长随访时间和协变量依赖的生存/删失变异。
AI.result: 通过模拟和前列腺癌筛查试验(PLCO)应用验证，新方法具有更高效率和更强的模型误设稳健性。开发了开源R软件包rdsurvival。
AI.conclusion: 该方法解决了生存分析中RDD应用的删失问题，扩展了因果推断方法在医疗等领域的适用性，为阈值规则下的治疗效果评估提供了实用工具。

title: Relational Epipolar Graphs for Robust Relative Camera Pose Estimation
comment: 21 pages, 10 figures, yet to be submitted to IJCV
summary: A key component of Visual Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (VSLAM) is estimating relative camera poses using matched keypoints. Accurate estimation is challenged by noisy correspondences. Classical methods rely on stochastic hypothesis sampling and iterative estimation, while learning-based methods often lack explicit geometric structure. In this work, we reformulate relative pose estimation as a relational inference problem over epipolar correspondence graphs, where matched keypoints are nodes and nearby ones are connected by edges. Graph operations such as pruning, message passing, and pooling estimate a quaternion rotation, translation vector, and the Essential Matrix (EM). Minimizing a loss comprising (i) $\mathcal{L}_2$ differences with ground truth (GT), (ii) Frobenius norm between estimated and GT EMs, (iii) singular value differences, (iv) heading angle differences, and (v) scale differences, yields the relative pose between image pairs. The dense detector-free method LoFTR is used for matching. Experiments on indoor and outdoor benchmarks show improved robustness to dense noise and large baseline variation compared to classical and learning-guided approaches, highlighting the effectiveness of global relational consensus.

AI.tldr: 该论文将视觉SLAM中的相对位姿估计重新表述为极线对应图上的关系推理问题，通过图操作估计旋转、平移和本质矩阵，相比传统方法和学习引导方法在噪声和大基线变化下表现更鲁棒。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉SLAM中的相对位姿估计面临噪声对应点的挑战。经典方法依赖随机假设采样和迭代估计，而基于学习的方法通常缺乏显式几何结构。作者希望开发一种结合几何结构和学习优势的方法来提高估计的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 将相对位姿估计重新表述为极线对应图上的关系推理问题，其中匹配的关键点为节点，相邻节点通过边连接。通过图操作（剪枝、消息传递、池化）估计四元数旋转、平移向量和本质矩阵。使用包含5个分量的损失函数进行优化：与真值的L2差异、本质矩阵的Frobenius范数差异、奇异值差异、航向角差异和尺度差异。采用LoFTR进行无检测器的密集匹配。
AI.result: 在室内外基准测试中，该方法相比经典方法和学习引导方法，在密集噪声和大基线变化下表现出更好的鲁棒性，验证了全局关系共识的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过将相对位姿估计重新表述为图关系推理问题，结合几何结构和学习优势，该方法在噪声和大基线变化下实现了更鲁棒的估计性能，展示了全局关系共识在视觉SLAM中的有效性。

title: Optimizing Neurorobot Policy under Limited Demonstration Data through Preference Regret
summary: Robot reinforcement learning from demonstrations (RLfD) assumes that expert data is abundant; this is usually unrealistic in the real world given data scarcity as well as high collection cost. Furthermore, imitation learning algorithms assume that the data is independently and identically distributed, which ultimately results in poorer performance as gradual errors emerge and compound within test-time trajectories. We address these issues by introducing the "master your own expertise" (MYOE) framework, a self-imitation framework that enables robotic agents to learn complex behaviors from limited demonstration data samples. Inspired by human perception and action, we propose and design what we call the queryable mixture-of-preferences state space model (QMoP-SSM), which estimates the desired goal at every time step. These desired goals are used in computing the "preference regret", which is used to optimize the robot control policy. Our experiments demonstrate the robustness, adaptability, and out-of-sample performance of our agent compared to other state-of-the-art RLfD schemes. The GitHub repository that supports this work can be found at: https://github.com/rxng8/neurorobot-preference-regret-learning.

AI.tldr: 提出MYOE自模仿学习框架，通过QMoP-SSM模型估计每个时间步的期望目标，计算"偏好遗憾"来优化机器人控制策略，解决演示数据稀缺和分布假设问题。
AI.motivation: 传统机器人从演示中强化学习(RLfD)假设专家数据充足，但现实中数据稀缺且收集成本高。模仿学习算法假设数据独立同分布，导致测试时误差累积和性能下降。
AI.method: 提出"master your own expertise"(MYOE)自模仿框架，设计可查询的混合偏好状态空间模型(QMoP-SSM)，估计每个时间步的期望目标，计算"偏好遗憾"来优化控制策略。
AI.result: 实验表明，相比其他最先进的RLfD方案，该方法在鲁棒性、适应性和样本外性能方面表现更优。
AI.conclusion: MYOE框架能够从有限的演示数据中学习复杂行为，解决了数据稀缺和分布假设问题，提升了机器人学习的性能。

title: Temporal Inversion for Learning Interval Change in Chest X-Rays
summary: Recent advances in vision--language pretraining have enabled strong medical foundation models, yet most analyze radiographs in isolation, overlooking the key clinical task of comparing prior and current images to assess interval change. For chest radiographs (CXRs), capturing interval change is essential, as radiologists must evaluate not only the static appearance of findings but also how they evolve over time. We introduce TILA (Temporal Inversion-aware Learning and Alignment), a simple yet effective framework that uses temporal inversion, reversing image pairs, as a supervisory signal to enhance the sensitivity of existing temporal vision-language models to directional change. TILA integrates inversion-aware objectives across pretraining, fine-tuning, and inference, complementing conventional appearance modeling with explicit learning of temporal order. We also propose a unified evaluation protocol to assess order sensitivity and consistency under temporal inversion, and introduce MS-CXR-Tretrieval, a retrieval evaluation set constructed through a general protocol that can be applied to any temporal CXR dataset. Experiments on public datasets and real-world hospital cohorts demonstrate that TILA consistently improves progression classification and temporal embedding alignment when applied to multiple existing architectures.

AI.tldr: TILA框架通过时间反转监督信号增强现有医学视觉语言模型对时序变化的敏感性，专门针对胸部X光片的间隔变化评估任务。
AI.motivation: 现有医学基础模型大多单独分析放射影像，忽略了临床实践中比较前后影像评估间隔变化的关键任务。对于胸部X光片，捕捉时序变化至关重要，因为放射科医生不仅要评估发现的静态外观，还要评估它们随时间的变化。
AI.method: TILA框架使用时间反转（反转图像对）作为监督信号，通过预训练、微调和推理中的反转感知目标，在传统外观建模基础上显式学习时序顺序。还提出了统一的评估协议和MS-CXR-Tretrieval检索评估集。
AI.result: 在公共数据集和真实医院队列上的实验表明，TILA应用于多种现有架构时，能持续改进进展分类和时间嵌入对齐。
AI.conclusion: TILA通过简单有效的时间反转监督信号，显著增强了医学视觉语言模型对时序变化的敏感性，为医学影像的时序分析提供了新框架。

title: TAPE: A two-stage parameter-efficient adaptation framework for foundation models in OCT-OCTA analysis
comment: 5 pages, 2 figures, accepted by IEEE ISBI 2026
summary: Automated analysis of optical coherence tomography (OCT) and OCT angiography (OCTA) images is critical for robust ophthalmic diagnosis. Existing mainstream methods trained from scratch rely heavily on massive data and model scale, thereby hindering their practical deployment in resource-constrained clinical settings. Although transfer learning based on foundation models (FMs) is promising, it still faces significant challenges: domain shift and task misalignment. To address these, we propose TAPE: A Two-stage Adaptation Framework via Parameter-Efficient Fine-tuning, which strategically decouples adaptation into domain alignment and task fitting for downstream segmentation. The domain adaptation stage notably applies parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) in the context of masked image modeling for medical image domain adaptation, a novel approach to the best of our knowledge. Applying TAPE to retinal layer segmentation on both universal (masked auto-encoder, MAE) and specialized (RETFound) FMs, it demonstrates superior parameter efficiency and achieves state-of-the-art generalization performance across diverse pathologies.

AI.tldr: TAPE是一个两阶段适应框架，通过参数高效微调解决医学图像分析中的领域偏移和任务不对齐问题，在视网膜层分割任务上表现出优越的参数效率和泛化性能。
AI.motivation: 现有医学图像分析方法依赖大量数据和模型规模，在资源受限的临床环境中部署困难。基于基础模型的迁移学习面临领域偏移和任务不对齐的挑战。
AI.method: 提出TAPE两阶段适应框架：1) 领域适应阶段在掩码图像建模背景下应用参数高效微调进行医学图像领域适应；2) 任务适应阶段针对下游分割任务进行微调。
AI.result: 在通用基础模型(MAE)和专用基础模型(RETFound)上应用TAPE，在视网膜层分割任务中实现了优越的参数效率和最先进的泛化性能。
AI.conclusion: TAPE框架有效解决了医学图像分析中的领域适应问题，为资源受限的临床环境提供了高效的解决方案。

title: Erasure or Erosion? Evaluating Compositional Degradation in Unlearned Text-To-Image Diffusion Models
comment: Accepted at CVPR 2026 Workshop on Machine Unlearning for Computer Vision
summary: Post-hoc unlearning has emerged as a practical mechanism for removing undesirable concepts from large text-to-image diffusion models. However, prior work primarily evaluates unlearning through erasure success; its impact on broader generative capabilities remains poorly understood. In this work, we conduct a systematic empirical study of concept unlearning through the lens of compositional text-to-image generation. Focusing on nudity removal in Stable Diffusion 1.4, we evaluate a diverse set of state-of-the-art unlearning methods using T2I-CompBench++ and GenEval, alongside established unlearning benchmarks. Our results reveal a consistent trade-off between unlearning effectiveness and compositional integrity: methods that achieve strong erasure frequently incur substantial degradation in attribute binding, spatial reasoning, and counting. Conversely, approaches that preserve compositional structure often fail to provide robust erasure. These findings highlight limitations of current evaluation practices and underscore the need for unlearning objectives that explicitly account for semantic preservation beyond targeted suppression.

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了文本到图像扩散模型的后验遗忘方法，发现概念遗忘效果与组合生成能力之间存在权衡：强遗忘方法会损害属性绑定、空间推理和计数能力，而保持组合结构的方法则遗忘效果不佳。
AI.motivation: 现有后验遗忘研究主要关注概念擦除效果，但对模型整体生成能力的影响缺乏系统理解。本文旨在通过组合文本到图像生成的视角，全面评估概念遗忘方法的实际影响。
AI.method: 以Stable Diffusion 1.4为对象，聚焦裸体概念移除，使用T2I-CompBench++和GenEval等组合生成基准，系统评估多种最先进遗忘方法，同时结合传统遗忘评估指标。
AI.result: 发现遗忘效果与组合完整性之间存在一致权衡：强遗忘方法显著损害属性绑定、空间推理和计数能力；而保持组合结构的方法则无法提供鲁棒的遗忘效果。
AI.conclusion: 当前评估实践存在局限性，需要开发既能实现目标概念抑制又能保持语义完整性的遗忘目标，超越单纯的概念擦除评估。

title: Measuring LLM Trust Allocation Across Conflicting Software Artifacts
summary: LLM-based software engineering assistants fail not only by producing incorrect outputs, but also by allocating trust to the wrong artifact when code, documentation, and tests disagree. Existing evaluations focus mainly on downstream outcomes and therefore cannot reveal whether a model recognized degraded evidence, identified the unreliable source, or calibrated its trust across artifacts. We present TRACE (Trust Reasoning over Artifacts for Calibrated Evaluation), a framework that elicits structured artifact-level trust traces over Javadoc, method signatures, implementations, and test prefixes under blind perturbations. Using 22,339 valid traces from seven models on 456 curated Java method bundles, we evaluate per-artifact quality assessment, inconsistency detection, affected artifact attribution, and source prioritization. Across all models, quality penalties are largely localized to the perturbed artifact and increase with severity, but sensitivity is asymmetric across artifact types: documentation bugs induce a substantially larger heavy-to-subtle gap than implementation faults (0.152-0.253 vs. 0.049-0.123). Models detect explicit documentation bugs well (67-94%) and Javadoc and implementation contradictions at 50-91%, yet show a systematic blind spot when only the implementation drifts while the documentation remains plausible, with detection dropping by 7-42 percentage points. Confidence is poorly calibrated for six of seven models. These findings suggest that current LLMs are better at auditing natural-language specifications than at detecting subtle code-level drift, motivating explicit artifact-level trust reasoning before correctness-critical downstream use.

AI.tldr: TRACE框架评估LLM在代码、文档、测试等软件工件间的信任推理能力，发现模型能较好检测显式文档错误但难以识别代码漂移，且置信度校准不佳。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM软件工程助手评估主要关注下游结果，无法揭示模型是否识别了证据质量下降、定位了不可靠来源或在各工件间校准信任。需要评估模型在代码、文档、测试不一致时的信任推理能力。
AI.method: 提出TRACE框架，在Javadoc、方法签名、实现和测试前缀等Java工件上通过盲扰动生成结构化信任轨迹。使用7个模型在456个Java方法包上生成22,339个有效轨迹，评估各工件质量评估、不一致检测、受影响工件归因和来源优先级排序。
AI.result: 质量惩罚主要局限在扰动工件且随严重程度增加，但对不同工件类型的敏感性不对称：文档错误的严重-轻微差距远大于实现错误。模型能较好检测显式文档错误(67-94%)和文档与实现矛盾(50-91%)，但当只有实现漂移而文档保持合理时检测率下降7-42个百分点。7个模型中有6个置信度校准不佳。
AI.conclusion: 当前LLM在审计自然语言规范方面优于检测细微代码漂移，在关键下游使用前需要进行明确的工件级信任推理。

title: CRAFT: Video Diffusion for Bimanual Robot Data Generation
summary: Bimanual robot learning from demonstrations is fundamentally limited by the cost and narrow visual diversity of real-world data, which constrains policy robustness across viewpoints, object configurations, and embodiments. We present Canny-guided Robot Data Generation using Video Diffusion Transformers (CRAFT), a video diffusion-based framework for scalable bimanual demonstration generation that synthesizes temporally coherent manipulation videos while producing action labels. By conditioning video diffusion on edge-based structural cues extracted from simulator-generated trajectories, CRAFT produces physically plausible trajectory variations and supports a unified augmentation pipeline spanning object pose changes, camera viewpoints, lighting and background variations, cross-embodiment transfer, and multi-view synthesis. We leverage a pre-trained video diffusion model to convert simulated videos, along with action labels from the simulation trajectories, into action-consistent demonstrations. Starting from only a few real-world demonstrations, CRAFT generates a large, visually diverse set of photorealistic training data, bypassing the need to replay demonstrations on the real robot (Sim2Real). Across simulated and real-world bimanual tasks, CRAFT improves success rates over existing augmentation strategies and straightforward data scaling, demonstrating that diffusion-based video generation can substantially expand demonstration diversity and improve generalization for dual-arm manipulation tasks. Our project website is available at: https://craftaug.github.io/

AI.tldr: CRAFT：基于视频扩散Transformer的机器人数据生成框架，通过边缘引导从模拟轨迹生成多样化、物理合理的双手机器人演示视频和动作标签，显著提升策略泛化能力
AI.motivation: 双手机器人学习受限于真实世界数据的成本和视觉多样性不足，导致策略在不同视角、物体配置和机器人本体间的鲁棒性受限。需要一种可扩展的方法来生成多样化的演示数据。
AI.method: 提出CRAFT框架：1) 从模拟轨迹提取边缘结构线索；2) 基于预训练视频扩散模型，以边缘线索为条件生成物理合理的轨迹变体；3) 支持统一的数据增强管道，包括物体姿态变化、相机视角、光照背景变化、跨本体迁移和多视角合成；4) 将模拟视频和动作标签转换为动作一致的演示。
AI.result: 在模拟和真实世界双手机器人任务中，CRAFT相比现有增强策略和简单数据扩展显著提高了成功率。仅需少量真实演示即可生成大量视觉多样化的逼真训练数据，避免了在真实机器人上重放演示的需求。
AI.conclusion: 基于扩散的视频生成能够大幅扩展演示多样性，改善双手机器人操作的泛化能力。CRAFT为机器人学习提供了一种可扩展的数据生成方法，突破了真实世界数据的限制。

title: PR-IQA: Partial-Reference Image Quality Assessment for Diffusion-Based Novel View Synthesis
summary: Diffusion models are promising for sparse-view novel view synthesis (NVS), as they can generate pseudo-ground-truth views to aid 3D reconstruction pipelines like 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS). However, these synthesized images often contain photometric and geometric inconsistencies, and their direct use for supervision can impair reconstruction. To address this, we propose Partial-Reference Image Quality Assessment (PR-IQA), a framework that evaluates diffusion-generated views using reference images from different poses, eliminating the need for ground truth. PR-IQA first computes a geometrically consistent partial quality map in overlapping regions. It then performs quality completion to inpaint this partial map into a dense, full-image map. This completion is achieved via a cross-attention mechanism that incorporates reference-view context, ensuring cross-view consistency and enabling thorough quality assessment. When integrated into a diffusion-augmented 3DGS pipeline, PR-IQA restricts supervision to high-confidence regions identified by its quality maps. Experiments demonstrate that PR-IQA outperforms existing IQA methods, achieving full-reference-level accuracy without ground-truth supervision. Thus, our quality-aware 3DGS approach more effectively filters inconsistencies, producing superior 3D reconstructions and NVS results.The project page is available at https://kakaomacao.github.io/pr-iqa-project-page/.

AI.tldr: 提出PR-IQA框架，用于评估扩散模型生成的多视角图像质量，无需真实参考图像，通过部分参考图像计算几何一致的质量图，并集成到3D高斯泼溅重建流程中，提升3D重建质量。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型可用于稀疏视角的新视角合成，为3D重建提供伪真实视图，但生成的图像存在光度学和几何不一致问题，直接用于监督会损害重建质量。需要一种无需真实参考的图像质量评估方法来筛选高质量区域。
AI.method: 提出部分参考图像质量评估(PR-IQA)框架：1) 在不同姿态的参考图像重叠区域计算几何一致的部分质量图；2) 通过交叉注意力机制结合参考视图上下文，将部分质量图补全为密集的全图像质量图；3) 将PR-IQA集成到扩散增强的3D高斯泼溅流程中，仅对高置信度区域进行监督。
AI.result: PR-IQA在图像质量评估上优于现有方法，达到全参考级别的准确性而无需真实监督。质量感知的3D高斯泼溅方法能更有效过滤不一致性，产生更优的3D重建和新视角合成结果。
AI.conclusion: PR-IQA提供了一种无需真实参考的图像质量评估方法，能有效评估扩散生成视图的质量，通过限制对高置信度区域的监督，显著提升了3D重建的质量和一致性。

title: Firebolt-VL: Efficient Vision-Language Understanding with Cross-Modality Modulation
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2511.11177
summary: Recent advances in multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have enabled impressive progress in vision-language understanding, yet their high computational cost limits deployment in resource-constrained scenarios such as personal assistants, document understanding, and smart cameras. Most existing methods rely on Transformer-based cross-attention, whose quadratic complexity hinders efficiency. Moreover, small vision-language models often struggle to precisely capture fine-grained, task-relevant visual regions, leading to degraded performance on fine-grained reasoning tasks that limit their effectiveness in the real world. To address these issues, we introduce Firebolt-VL, an efficient vision-language model that replaces the Transformer-based decoder with a Liquid Foundation Model (LFM) decoder. To further enhance visual grounding, we propose a Token-Grid Correlation Module, which computes lightweight correlations between text tokens and image patches and modulates via the state-space model with FiLM conditioning. This enables the model to selectively emphasize visual regions relevant to the textual prompt while maintaining linear-time inference. Experimental results across multiple benchmarks demonstrate that Firebolt-VL achieves accurate, fine-grained understanding with significantly improved efficiency. Our model and code are available at: https://fireboltvl.github.io

AI.tldr: Firebolt-VL是一个高效的多模态大语言模型，用液态基础模型（LFM）解码器替代Transformer解码器，通过Token-Grid相关模块实现细粒度视觉定位，在保持线性时间推理的同时提升效率。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLMs计算成本高，难以部署到资源受限场景；基于Transformer的交叉注意力具有二次复杂度；小规模视觉语言模型难以精确捕捉细粒度视觉区域，影响细粒度推理任务性能。
AI.method: 1. 用液态基础模型（LFM）解码器替代Transformer解码器；2. 提出Token-Grid相关模块，计算文本token和图像patch之间的轻量级相关性，通过状态空间模型和FiLM条件进行调制，选择性强调与文本提示相关的视觉区域。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，Firebolt-VL实现了准确、细粒度的理解，同时显著提高了效率。
AI.conclusion: Firebolt-VL通过创新的架构设计，在保持线性时间推理的同时，解决了MLLMs的效率问题和细粒度视觉定位挑战，为资源受限场景提供了可行的解决方案。

title: Beyond Semantics: Uncovering the Physics of Fakes via Universal Physical Descriptors for Cross-Modal Synthetic Detection
summary: The rapid advancement of AI generated content (AIGC) has blurred the boundaries between real and synthetic images, exposing the limitations of existing deepfake detectors that often overfit to specific generative models. This adaptability crisis calls for a fundamental reexamination of the intrinsic physical characteristics that distinguish natural from AI-generated images. In this paper, we address two critical research questions: (1) What physical features can stably and robustly discriminate AI generated images across diverse datasets and generative architectures? (2) Can these objective pixel-level features be integrated into multimodal models like CLIP to enhance detection performance while mitigating the unreliability of language-based information? To answer these questions, we conduct a comprehensive exploration of 15 physical features across more than 20 datasets generated by various GANs and diffusion models. We propose a novel feature selection algorithm that identifies five core physical features including Laplacian variance, Sobel statistics, and residual noise variance that exhibit consistent discriminative power across all tested datasets. These features are then converted into text encoded values and integrated with semantic captions to guide image text representation learning in CLIP. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on multiple Genimage benchmarks, with near-perfect accuracy (99.8%) on datasets such as Wukong and SDv1.4. By bridging pixel level authenticity with semantic understanding, this work pioneers the use of physically grounded features for trustworthy vision language modeling and opens new directions for mitigating hallucinations and textual inaccuracies in large multimodal models.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于物理特征的AI生成图像检测方法，通过分析15种物理特征，筛选出5种核心特征，并将其与CLIP模型结合，在多数据集上实现了SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 随着AIGC技术的快速发展，真实与合成图像的界限日益模糊，现有深度伪造检测器往往过拟合于特定生成模型，存在适应性危机。需要重新审视区分自然图像与AI生成图像的内在物理特征。
AI.method: 1) 全面探索15种物理特征在20多个GAN和扩散模型生成的数据集上的表现；2) 提出新颖的特征选择算法，识别出5种核心物理特征（拉普拉斯方差、Sobel统计量、残差噪声方差等）；3) 将这些特征转换为文本编码值，与语义描述结合，指导CLIP中的图像-文本表示学习。
AI.result: 在多个Genimage基准测试中实现了最先进的性能，在Wukong和SDv1.4等数据集上达到接近完美的准确率（99.8%）。
AI.conclusion: 通过将像素级真实性特征与语义理解相结合，这项工作开创了基于物理特征的可信视觉语言建模新方向，为缓解大型多模态模型中的幻觉和文本不准确问题开辟了新途径。

title: Multimodal Backdoor Attack on VLMs for Autonomous Driving via Graffiti and Cross-Lingual Triggers
comment: This is a submission to the "Pattern Analysis and Applications". The manuscript includes 14 pages and 6 figures. All authors have approved the submission, and there is no conflict of interest to declare
