Our analysis yields a nearly optimal high-probability sample-complexity upper bound, up to log factors and an additive $d^2$ term, and experiments on synthetic instances and the Jester dataset show clear gains over prior baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了半参数赌博机中的固定置信度最佳臂识别问题，其中奖励是臂特征的线性函数加上未知的基线偏移。作者建立了可达到的实例相关下界，并提出了一种基于XY设计的相位消除算法，实现了接近最优的样本复杂度。
AI.motivation: 传统线性赌博机BAI假设奖励完全由臂特征线性决定，但实际应用中常存在未知的基线偏移（如用户偏好、环境因素）。半参数模型更贴近现实，但其最优样本复杂度问题一直未解决，需要新的正交化回归方法。
AI.method: 提出基于XY设计的相位消除算法：1) 使用正交化回归处理基线偏移；2) 设计新的XY实验设计来估计参数；3) 采用相位消除策略逐步淘汰次优臂；4) 算法计算高效，适用于高维特征。
AI.result: 理论分析得到接近最优的高概率样本复杂度上界（达到对数因子和加性d²项）。在合成实例和Jester数据集上的实验显示，相比现有基线方法有明显性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次解决了半参数赌博机BAI的实例最优样本复杂度问题，提出的XY设计相位消除算法在理论和实验上都表现出色，为处理带基线偏移的线性奖励模型提供了有效解决方案。

title: Unified Vector Floorplan Generation via Markup Representation
summary: Automatic residential floorplan generation has long been a central challenge bridging architecture and computer graphics, aiming to make spatial design more efficient and accessible. While early methods based on constraint satisfaction or combinatorial optimization ensure feasibility, they lack diversity and flexibility. Recent generative models achieve promising results but struggle to generalize across heterogeneous conditional tasks, such as generation from site boundaries, room adjacency graphs, or partial layouts, due to their suboptimal representations. To address this gap, we introduce Floorplan Markup Language (FML), a general representation that encodes floorplan information within a single structured grammar, which casts the entire floorplan generation problem into a next token prediction task. Leveraging FML, we develop a transformer-based generative model, FMLM, capable of producing high-fidelity and functional floorplans under diverse conditions. Comprehensive experiments on the RPLAN dataset demonstrate that FMLM, despite being a single model, surpasses the previous task-specific state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: 提出Floorplan Markup Language (FML)作为通用表示法，将平面图生成转化为下一个token预测任务，并开发基于Transformer的FMLM模型，在多样化条件下生成高质量平面图。
AI.motivation: 自动住宅平面图生成是建筑与计算机图形学的核心挑战。现有方法存在局限性：早期基于约束满足或组合优化的方法缺乏多样性和灵活性；最近的生成模型难以泛化到异构条件任务（如从场地边界、房间邻接图或部分布局生成），因为表示方法不够优化。
AI.method: 引入Floorplan Markup Language (FML)，一种在单一结构化语法中编码平面图信息的通用表示法，将整个平面图生成问题转化为下一个token预测任务。基于FML开发了Transformer生成模型FMLM。
AI.result: 在RPLAN数据集上的综合实验表明，FMLM虽然是单一模型，但超越了之前任务特定的最先进方法，能够生成高保真且功能性的平面图。
AI.conclusion: FML表示法和FMLM模型解决了平面图生成中的泛化问题，通过结构化表示和Transformer架构实现了在多样化条件下的高质量生成。

title: Persistent Cross-Attempt State Optimization for Repository-Level Code Generation
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have achieved substantial progress in repository-level code generation. However, solving the same repository-level task often requires multiple attempts, while existing methods still optimize each attempt in isolation and do not preserve or reuse task-specific state across attempts. In this paper, we propose LiveCoder, a novel framework for repository-level code generation based on cross-attempt knowledge optimization. LiveCoder maintains persistent task-specific state from prior attempts to guide subsequent generation. This state includes success knowledge, which captures reusable signals from previously strong repositories, failure knowledge, which records unsuccessful outcomes and their diagnostic signals, and a historical-best repository, which preserves the strongest result found so far and prevents regression. These components collectively transform repeated repository generation into a persistent, knowledge-driven optimization process. We evaluate LiveCoder using four frontier LLMs on two representative repository-level code generation benchmarks. Extensive experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness and efficiency of LiveCoder, improving the functional score by up to 22.94 percentage points, increasing repository reuse to 81.58%, and reducing cost by up to 53.63% on RAL-Bench while maintaining broadly stable non-functional quality.

AI.tldr: LiveCoder：基于跨尝试知识优化的仓库级代码生成框架，通过维护任务特定状态（成功知识、失败知识、历史最佳仓库）来指导后续生成，将重复的仓库生成转变为持续的知识驱动优化过程。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM在仓库级代码生成中，解决同一任务通常需要多次尝试，但现有方法仍孤立地优化每次尝试，没有在尝试间保留或重用任务特定状态，导致效率低下。
AI.method: LiveCoder维护持久化的任务特定状态：1) 成功知识：从先前强仓库中捕获可重用信号；2) 失败知识：记录不成功结果及其诊断信号；3) 历史最佳仓库：保留迄今找到的最强结果防止回归。这些组件共同将重复仓库生成转变为知识驱动的优化过程。
AI.result: 在四个前沿LLM和两个代表性仓库级代码生成基准上的实验表明：功能分数提升高达22.94个百分点，仓库重用率达到81.58%，在RAL-Bench上成本降低高达53.63%，同时保持广泛稳定的非功能性质量。
AI.conclusion: LiveCoder通过跨尝试知识优化显著提升了仓库级代码生成的效率和效果，为LLM在复杂代码生成任务中的实际应用提供了有效框架。

title: Beyond the Global Scores: Fine-Grained Token Grounding as a Robust Detector of LVLM Hallucinations
summary: Large vision-language models (LVLMs) achieve strong performance on visual reasoning tasks but remain highly susceptible to hallucination. Existing detection methods predominantly rely on coarse, whole-image measures of how an object token relates to the input image. This global strategy is limited: hallucinated tokens may exhibit weak but widely scattered correlations across many local regions, which aggregate into deceptively high overall relevance, thus evading the current global hallucination detectors. We begin with a simple yet critical observation: a faithful object token must be strongly grounded in a specific image region. Building on this insight, we introduce a patch-level hallucination detection framework that examines fine-grained token-level interactions across model layers. Our analysis uncovers two characteristic signatures of hallucinated tokens: (i) they yield diffuse, non-localized attention patterns, in contrast to the compact, well-focused attention seen in faithful tokens; and (ii) they fail to exhibit meaningful semantic alignment with any visual region. Guided by these findings, we develop a lightweight and interpretable detection method that leverages patch-level statistical features, combined with hidden-layer representations. Our approach achieves up to 90% accuracy in token-level hallucination detection, demonstrating the superiority of fine-grained structural analysis for detecting hallucinations.

AI.tldr: 提出基于图像块级别的幻觉检测框架，通过分析细粒度token级交互来检测大视觉语言模型中的幻觉，准确率达90%
AI.motivation: 现有的大视觉语言模型在视觉推理任务中表现良好但容易产生幻觉，现有检测方法主要依赖粗粒度的全局图像度量，无法有效检测那些与多个局部区域有微弱但广泛相关性的幻觉token
AI.method: 基于"忠实对象token必须与特定图像区域强相关"的观察，提出图像块级别的幻觉检测框架，分析跨模型层的细粒度token级交互，识别幻觉token的两个特征：1) 扩散的非局部化注意力模式；2) 与任何视觉区域缺乏有意义的语义对齐
AI.result: 提出的轻量级可解释检测方法在token级幻觉检测中达到90%的准确率，证明了细粒度结构分析在检测幻觉方面的优越性
AI.conclusion: 细粒度的图像块级别分析比全局检测方法更有效地识别大视觉语言模型中的幻觉，为幻觉检测提供了新的结构分析方法

title: Free-Range Gaussians: Non-Grid-Aligned Generative 3D Gaussian Reconstruction
summary: We present Free-Range Gaussians, a multi-view reconstruction method that predicts non-pixel, non-voxel-aligned 3D Gaussians from as few as four images. This is done through flow matching over Gaussian parameters. Our generative formulation of reconstruction allows the model to be supervised with non-grid-aligned 3D data, and enables it to synthesize plausible content in unobserved regions. Thus, it improves on prior methods that produce highly redundant grid-aligned Gaussians, and suffer from holes or blurry conditional means in unobserved regions. To handle the number of Gaussians needed for high-quality results, we introduce a hierarchical patching scheme to group spatially related Gaussians into joint transformer tokens, halving the sequence length while preserving structure. We further propose a timestep-weighted rendering loss during training, and photometric gradient guidance and classifier-free guidance at inference to improve fidelity. Experiments on Objaverse and Google Scanned Objects show consistent improvements over pixel and voxel-aligned methods while using significantly fewer Gaussians, with large gains when input views leave parts of the object unobserved.

AI.tldr: Free-Range Gaussians：一种多视角三维重建方法，通过流匹配预测非像素对齐的3D高斯分布，仅需4张图像即可生成高质量重建结果，解决了传统方法在未观测区域产生空洞或模糊的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统多视角重建方法通常产生高度冗余的网格对齐高斯分布，在未观测区域会出现空洞或模糊的均值条件问题。作者希望开发一种能够从少量图像生成非网格对齐3D高斯分布的方法，从而在未观测区域合成合理内容。
AI.method: 1. 使用高斯参数上的流匹配进行生成式重建；2. 引入分层分块方案，将空间相关的高斯分组到联合Transformer token中，减少序列长度；3. 训练时使用时间步加权渲染损失；4. 推理时采用光度梯度引导和分类器无关引导提高保真度。
AI.result: 在Objaverse和Google Scanned Objects数据集上的实验表明，该方法相比像素和体素对齐方法有持续改进，使用更少的高斯分布，在输入视角未覆盖物体部分时优势更明显。
AI.conclusion: Free-Range Gaussians通过生成式重建和分层分块方案，实现了从少量图像的高质量3D重建，解决了未观测区域的内容合成问题，为多视角重建提供了新思路。

title: Jellyfish: Zero-Shot Federated Unlearning Scheme with Knowledge Disentanglement
summary: With the increasing importance of data privacy and security, federated unlearning emerges as a new research field dedicated to ensuring that once specific data is deleted, federated learning models no longer retain or disclose related information. In this paper, we propose a zero-shot federated unlearning scheme, named Jellyfish. It distinguishes itself from conventional federated unlearning frameworks in four key aspects: synthetic data generation, knowledge disentanglement, loss function design, and model repair. To preserve the privacy of forgotten data, we design a zero-shot unlearning mechanism that generates error-minimization noise as proxy data for the data to be forgotten. To maintain model utility, we first propose a knowledge disentanglement mechanism that regularises the output of the final convolutional layer by restricting the number of activated channels for the data to be forgotten and encouraging activation sparsity. Next, we construct a comprehensive loss function that incorporates multiple components, including hard loss, confusion loss, distillation loss, model weight drift loss, gradient harmonization, and gradient masking, to effectively align the learning trajectories of the objectives of ``forgetting" and ``retaining". Finally, we propose a zero-shot repair mechanism that leverages proxy data to restore model accuracy within acceptable bounds without accessing users' local data. To evaluate the performance of the proposed zero-shot federated unlearning scheme, we conducted comprehensive experiments across diverse settings. The results validate the effectiveness and robustness of the scheme.

AI.tldr: 提出Jellyfish零样本联邦遗忘方案，通过合成数据生成、知识解耦、损失函数设计和模型修复实现隐私保护下的模型遗忘，无需访问原始遗忘数据
AI.motivation: 随着数据隐私和安全重要性增加，联邦遗忘成为新兴研究领域，旨在确保删除特定数据后，联邦学习模型不再保留或泄露相关信息。传统方法需要访问遗忘数据，存在隐私风险
AI.method: 1) 零样本遗忘机制：生成误差最小化噪声作为遗忘数据的代理数据；2) 知识解耦机制：通过限制遗忘数据的激活通道数并鼓励稀疏性来正则化卷积层输出；3) 综合损失函数设计：包含硬损失、混淆损失、蒸馏损失、模型权重漂移损失、梯度协调和梯度掩码；4) 零样本修复机制：利用代理数据恢复模型精度
AI.result: 在多种设置下进行综合实验，验证了方案的有效性和鲁棒性。能够在保护隐私的同时实现遗忘目标，并保持模型效用
AI.conclusion: Jellyfish为零样本联邦遗忘提供了有效解决方案，通过创新的代理数据生成和知识解耦机制，在保护隐私的同时实现模型遗忘，并维持模型性能

title: DIRECT: Video Mashup Creation via Hierarchical Multi-Agent Planning and Intent-Guided Editing
summary: Video mashup creation represents a complex video editing paradigm that recomposes existing footage to craft engaging audio-visual experiences, demanding intricate orchestration across semantic, visual, and auditory dimensions and multiple levels. However, existing automated editing frameworks often overlook the cross-level multimodal orchestration to achieve professional-grade fluidity, resulting in disjointed sequences with abrupt visual transitions and musical misalignment. To address this, we formulate video mashup creation as a Multimodal Coherency Satisfaction Problem (MMCSP) and propose the DIRECT framework. Simulating a professional production pipeline, our hierarchical multi-agent framework decomposes the challenge into three cascade levels: the Screenwriter for source-aware global structural anchoring, the Director for instantiating adaptive editing intent and guidance, and the Editor for intent-guided shot sequence editing with fine-grained optimization. We further introduce Mashup-Bench, a comprehensive benchmark with tailored metrics for visual continuity and auditory alignment. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DIRECT significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in both objective metrics and human subjective evaluation. Project page and code: https://github.com/AK-DREAM/DIRECT

AI.tldr: DIRECT是一个用于视频混剪创作的多模态协调框架，将视频混剪建模为多模态一致性满足问题，采用分层多智能体架构模拟专业制作流程，显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有自动化视频编辑框架往往忽视跨层次的多模态协调，导致视频序列不连贯、视觉过渡突兀和音乐对齐不佳。专业级视频混剪需要在语义、视觉和听觉多个维度进行复杂编排。
AI.method: 将视频混剪建模为多模态一致性满足问题，提出DIRECT分层多智能体框架：Screenwriter负责源感知的全局结构锚定，Director负责实例化自适应编辑意图和指导，Editor负责意图引导的镜头序列编辑和细粒度优化。
AI.result: DIRECT在客观指标和人类主观评价上均显著优于现有最先进基线方法。同时提出了Mashup-Bench基准测试，包含视觉连续性和听觉对齐的专门指标。
AI.conclusion: DIRECT框架通过模拟专业制作流程，有效解决了视频混剪中的多模态协调问题，实现了更专业、流畅的视频编辑效果。

title: Topological Sensitivity in Connectome-Constrained Neural Networks
summary: Connectome-constrained neural networks are often evaluated against sparse random controls and then interpreted as evidence that biological graph topology improves learning efficiency. We revisit that claim in a controlled flyvis-based study using a Drosophila connectome, a naive self-loop-matched random graph, and a degree-preserving rewired null. Under weak controls, in which both models were recovered from a connectome-trained checkpoint and the null matched only global graph counts, the connectome appeared substantially better in early loss, mean activity, and runtime. That picture changed under stricter controls. Training both graphs from a shared random initialization removed the early loss advantage, and replacing the naive null by a degree-preserving null removed the apparent activity advantage. A five-sample degree-preserving ensemble and a pre-training activity-scale diagnostic further strengthened this revised interpretation. We also report a descriptive mechanism analysis of the earlier weak-control comparison, but we treat it as behavioral characterization rather than proof of causal superiority. We show that previously reported topology advantages in connectome-constrained neural networks can arise from initialization and null-model confounds, and largely disappear under fair from-scratch initialization and degree-preserving controls.

AI.tldr: 重新评估果蝇连接组约束神经网络中拓扑优势的声称，发现先前报告的拓扑优势主要源于初始化偏差和无效模型设计问题，在公平的从头初始化和度保持控制下基本消失。
AI.motivation: 重新审视连接组约束神经网络中"生物图拓扑提高学习效率"的声称，质疑先前研究中使用稀疏随机控制组的有效性，以及初始化偏差对结果的影响。
AI.method: 使用果蝇连接组，通过三种控制条件进行对比：1) 朴素自环匹配随机图；2) 度保持重连无效模型；3) 五样本度保持集合。采用公平的从头初始化，并进行预训练活动尺度诊断。
AI.result: 在弱控制条件下（从连接组训练检查点恢复），连接组在早期损失、平均活动和运行时间上表现更好。但在严格控制下（共享随机初始化、度保持无效模型），这些优势基本消失。早期损失优势在公平初始化后消失，活动优势在度保持控制后消失。
AI.conclusion: 先前报告的连接组约束神经网络中的拓扑优势主要源于初始化偏差和无效模型设计问题，而非真正的拓扑优势。在公平比较下，生物连接组的优势大大减弱。

title: HorizonWeaver: Generalizable Multi-Level Semantic Editing for Driving Scenes
summary: Ensuring safety in autonomous driving requires scalable generation of realistic, controllable driving scenes beyond what real-world testing provides. Yet existing instruction guided image editors, trained on object-centric or artistic data, struggle with dense, safety-critical driving layouts. We propose HorizonWeaver, which tackles three fundamental challenges in driving scene editing: (1) multi-level granularity, requiring coherent object- and scene-level edits in dense environments; (2) rich high-level semantics, preserving diverse objects while following detailed instructions; and (3) ubiquitous domain shifts, handling changes in climate, layout, and traffic across unseen environments. The core of HorizonWeaver is a set of complementary contributions across data, model, and training: (1) Data: Large-scale dataset generation, where we build a paired real/synthetic dataset from Boreas, nuScenes, and Argoverse2 to improve generalization; (2) Model: Language-Guided Masks for fine-grained editing, where semantics-enriched masks and prompts enable precise, language-guided edits; and (3) Training: Content preservation and instruction alignment, where joint losses enforce scene consistency and instruction fidelity. Together, HorizonWeaver provides a scalable framework for photorealistic, instruction-driven editing of complex driving scenes, collecting 255K images across 13 editing categories and outperforming prior methods in L1, CLIP, and DINO metrics, achieving +46.4% user preference and improving BEV segmentation IoU by +33%. Project page: https://msoroco.github.io/horizonweaver/

AI.tldr: HorizonWeaver是一个用于自动驾驶场景编辑的框架，通过大规模数据集生成、语言引导掩码和内容保持训练，实现复杂驾驶场景的逼真指令驱动编辑。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶安全需要可扩展的现实可控驾驶场景生成，现有基于指令的图像编辑方法在处理密集、安全关键的驾驶布局时存在困难，需要解决多粒度编辑、丰富语义保持和领域迁移三大挑战。
AI.method: 1) 数据：从Boreas、nuScenes和Argoverse2构建大规模配对真实/合成数据集；2) 模型：语言引导掩码实现细粒度编辑；3) 训练：联合损失函数确保场景一致性和指令对齐。
AI.result: 收集255K图像覆盖13个编辑类别，在L1、CLIP和DINO指标上优于现有方法，获得+46.4%用户偏好，BEV分割IoU提升+33%。
AI.conclusion: HorizonWeaver为复杂驾驶场景提供了可扩展的逼真指令驱动编辑框架，解决了自动驾驶场景编辑的关键挑战。

title: FileGram: Grounding Agent Personalization in File-System Behavioral Traces
summary: Coworking AI agents operating within local file systems are rapidly emerging as a paradigm in human-AI interaction; however, effective personalization remains limited by severe data constraints, as strict privacy barriers and the difficulty of jointly collecting multimodal real-world traces prevent scalable training and evaluation, and existing methods remain interaction-centric while overlooking dense behavioral traces in file-system operations; to address this gap, we propose FileGram, a comprehensive framework that grounds agent memory and personalization in file-system behavioral traces, comprising three core components: (1) FileGramEngine, a scalable persona-driven data engine that simulates realistic workflows and generates fine-grained multimodal action sequences at scale; (2) FileGramBench, a diagnostic benchmark grounded in file-system behavioral traces for evaluating memory systems on profile reconstruction, trace disentanglement, persona drift detection, and multimodal grounding; and (3) FileGramOS, a bottom-up memory architecture that builds user profiles directly from atomic actions and content deltas rather than dialogue summaries, encoding these traces into procedural, semantic, and episodic channels with query-time abstraction; extensive experiments show that FileGramBench remains challenging for state-of-the-art memory systems and that FileGramEngine and FileGramOS are effective, and by open-sourcing the framework, we hope to support future research on personalized memory-centric file-system agents.

AI.tldr: FileGram：一个基于文件系统行为轨迹的AI代理记忆与个性化框架，包含数据引擎、评测基准和内存架构三部分，旨在解决文件系统AI代理的个性化数据限制问题。
AI.motivation: 当前文件系统AI代理面临严重的数据限制：严格的隐私壁垒和多模态真实世界轨迹的联合收集困难，阻碍了可扩展的训练和评估。现有方法过于关注交互而忽视了文件系统操作中的密集行为轨迹。
AI.method: 提出FileGram框架，包含三个核心组件：1) FileGramEngine：可扩展的人物驱动数据引擎，模拟真实工作流程并生成细粒度多模态动作序列；2) FileGramBench：基于文件系统行为轨迹的诊断基准，评估记忆系统在档案重建、轨迹解耦、人物漂移检测和多模态基础等方面的能力；3) FileGramOS：自底向上的内存架构，直接从原子动作和内容增量构建用户档案，将轨迹编码为程序性、语义性和情景性通道，并在查询时进行抽象。
AI.result: 实验表明：FileGramBench对当前最先进的记忆系统仍然具有挑战性；FileGramEngine和FileGramOS是有效的；通过开源该框架，支持未来个性化记忆中心文件系统代理的研究。
AI.conclusion: FileGram通过将代理记忆和个性化建立在文件系统行为轨迹上，解决了文件系统AI代理的个性化数据限制问题，为未来研究提供了全面的框架支持。

title: Extended Hybrid Timed Petri Nets with Semi-Supervised Anomaly Detection for Switched Systems, Modelling and Fault Detection
summary: Hybrid physical systems combine continuous and discrete dynamics, which can be simultaneously affected by faults. Conventional fault detection methods often treat these dynamics separately, limiting their ability to capture interacting fault patterns. This paper proposes a unified fault detection framework for hybrid dynamical systems by integrating an Extended Timed Continuous Petri Net (ETCPN) model with semi-supervised anomaly detection. The proposed ETCPN extends existing Petri net formalisms by introducing marking-dependent flow functions, enabling intrinsic coupling between discrete and continuous dynamics. Based on this structure, a mode-dependent hybrid observer is designed, whose stability under arbitrary switching is ensured via Linear Matrix Inequalities (LMIs), solved offline to determine observer gains. The observer generates residuals that reflect discrepancies between the estimated and measured outputs. These residuals are processed using semi-supervised methods, including One-Class SVM (OC-SVM), Support Vector Data Description (SVDD), and Elliptic Envelope (EE), trained exclusively on normal data to avoid reliance on labeled faults. The framework is validated through simulations involving discrete faults, continuous faults, and hybrid faults. Results demonstrate high detection accuracy, fast convergence, and robust performance, with OC-SVM and SVDD providing the best trade-off between detection rate and false alarms. The framework is computationally efficient for real-time deployment, as the main complexity is confined to the offline LMI design phase.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种混合动力系统统一故障检测框架，结合扩展时间连续Petri网模型与半监督异常检测，实现离散和连续故障的联合检测。
AI.motivation: 混合物理系统同时包含连续和离散动态，传统故障检测方法通常分开处理这两种动态，难以捕捉相互作用的故障模式，需要统一的检测框架。
AI.method: 扩展时间连续Petri网（ETCPN）模型引入标记依赖流函数，实现离散与连续动态的内在耦合；设计模式依赖混合观测器，通过LMI保证任意切换下的稳定性；使用半监督异常检测方法（OC-SVM、SVDD、EE）处理残差信号。
AI.result: 仿真验证显示高检测准确率、快速收敛和鲁棒性能，OC-SVM和SVDD在检测率和误报率之间提供最佳平衡，计算效率适合实时部署。
AI.conclusion: 提出的统一框架有效处理混合动力系统中的离散、连续和混合故障，通过离线LMI设计确保实时性能，为复杂系统故障检测提供新方法。

title: ClickAIXR: On-Device Multimodal Vision-Language Interaction with Real-World Objects in Extended Reality
summary: We present ClickAIXR, a novel on-device framework for multimodal vision-language interaction with objects in extended reality (XR). Unlike prior systems that rely on cloud-based AI (e.g., ChatGPT) or gaze-based selection (e.g., GazePointAR), ClickAIXR integrates an on-device vision-language model (VLM) with a controller-based object selection paradigm, enabling users to precisely click on real-world objects in XR. Once selected, the object image is processed locally by the VLM to answer natural language questions through both text and speech. This object-centered interaction reduces ambiguity inherent in gaze- or voice-only interfaces and improves transparency by performing all inference on-device, addressing concerns around privacy and latency. We implemented ClickAIXR in the Magic Leap SDK (C API) with ONNX-based local VLM inference. We conducted a user study comparing ClickAIXR with Gemini 2.5 Flash and ChatGPT 5, evaluating usability, trust, and user satisfaction. Results show that latency is moderate and user experience is acceptable. Our findings demonstrate the potential of click-based object selection combined with on-device AI to advance trustworthy, privacy-preserving XR interactions. The source code and supplementary materials are available at: nanovis.org/ClickAIXR.html

AI.tldr: ClickAIXR是一个在XR设备上本地运行的多模态视觉语言交互框架，通过控制器点击选择真实世界物体，使用本地VLM处理图像并回答自然语言问题，实现隐私保护和低延迟的交互。
AI.motivation: 现有XR交互系统主要依赖云端AI（如ChatGPT）或视线选择（如GazePointAR），存在隐私泄露、网络延迟和交互模糊性问题。ClickAIXR旨在通过本地化处理和控制器点击选择，提供更精确、透明且隐私保护的XR交互体验。
AI.method: 1. 集成设备端视觉语言模型（VLM）与控制器对象选择范式；2. 用户通过控制器点击选择XR中的真实世界物体；3. 选择后物体图像在本地由VLM处理；4. 通过文本和语音回答自然语言问题；5. 基于Magic Leap SDK（C API）实现，使用ONNX进行本地VLM推理。
AI.result: 用户研究比较ClickAIXR与Gemini 2.5 Flash和ChatGPT 5，评估可用性、信任度和用户满意度。结果显示延迟适中，用户体验可接受。ClickAIXR展示了基于点击的对象选择与设备端AI结合在推进可信、隐私保护XR交互方面的潜力。
AI.conclusion: ClickAIXR证明了控制器点击选择与设备端AI结合的有效性，为XR交互提供了更精确、透明且隐私保护的解决方案，推动了可信AI在扩展现实领域的发展。

title: SpatialEdit: Benchmarking Fine-Grained Image Spatial Editing
summary: Image spatial editing performs geometry-driven transformations, allowing precise control over object layout and camera viewpoints. Current models are insufficient for fine-grained spatial manipulations, motivating a dedicated assessment suite. Our contributions are listed: (i) We introduce SpatialEdit-Bench, a complete benchmark that evaluates spatial editing by jointly measuring perceptual plausibility and geometric fidelity via viewpoint reconstruction and framing analysis. (ii) To address the data bottleneck for scalable training, we construct SpatialEdit-500k, a synthetic dataset generated with a controllable Blender pipeline that renders objects across diverse backgrounds and systematic camera trajectories, providing precise ground-truth transformations for both object- and camera-centric operations. (iii) Building on this data, we develop SpatialEdit-16B, a baseline model for fine-grained spatial editing. Our method achieves competitive performance on general editing while substantially outperforming prior methods on spatial manipulation tasks. All resources will be made public at https://github.com/EasonXiao-888/SpatialEdit.

AI.tldr: 提出了SpatialEdit-Bench基准测试、SpatialEdit-500k合成数据集和SpatialEdit-16B基线模型，用于评估和提升图像空间编辑能力，重点关注几何驱动的对象布局和相机视角变换。
AI.motivation: 当前图像空间编辑模型在细粒度空间操作方面能力不足，缺乏专门的评估基准和训练数据，需要系统化的评估框架和可扩展的训练数据集来推动该领域发展。
AI.method: 1) 创建SpatialEdit-Bench基准，通过视角重建和构图分析联合评估感知合理性和几何保真度；2) 使用可控Blender流水线生成SpatialEdit-500k合成数据集，包含多样化背景和系统相机轨迹；3) 基于该数据开发SpatialEdit-16B基线模型。
AI.result: 该方法在通用编辑任务上具有竞争力，在空间操作任务上显著优于先前方法，提供了完整的评估框架、大规模训练数据和有效的基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为图像空间编辑领域提供了系统化的评估基准、可扩展的训练数据和有效的基线模型，推动了细粒度空间操作能力的发展。

title: A Frame is Worth One Token: Efficient Generative World Modeling with Delta Tokens
summary: Anticipating diverse future states is a central challenge in video world modeling. Discriminative world models produce a deterministic prediction that implicitly averages over possible futures, while existing generative world models remain computationally expensive. Recent work demonstrates that predicting the future in the feature space of a vision foundation model (VFM), rather than a latent space optimized for pixel reconstruction, requires significantly fewer world model parameters. However, most such approaches remain discriminative. In this work, we introduce DeltaTok, a tokenizer that encodes the VFM feature difference between consecutive frames into a single continuous "delta" token, and DeltaWorld, a generative world model operating on these tokens to efficiently generate diverse plausible futures. Delta tokens reduce video from a three-dimensional spatio-temporal representation to a one-dimensional temporal sequence, for example yielding a 1,024x token reduction with 512x512 frames. This compact representation enables tractable multi-hypothesis training, where many futures are generated in parallel and only the best is supervised. At inference, this leads to diverse predictions in a single forward pass. Experiments on dense forecasting tasks demonstrate that DeltaWorld forecasts futures that more closely align with real-world outcomes, while having over 35x fewer parameters and using 2,000x fewer FLOPs than existing generative world models. Code and weights: https://deltatok.github.io.

AI.tldr: DeltaWorld：基于DeltaTok的生成式世界模型，通过编码VFM特征差异为delta token，实现高效多假设未来预测
AI.motivation: 视频世界建模中预测多样化未来状态是一个核心挑战。判别式模型产生确定性预测，隐含了对可能未来的平均，而现有生成式模型计算成本高。虽然已有工作在VFM特征空间预测未来，但大多仍是判别式的。
AI.method: 提出DeltaTok tokenizer，将连续帧间的VFM特征差异编码为单个连续的"delta" token；DeltaWorld生成式世界模型在这些token上操作，高效生成多样化合理未来。delta token将视频从三维时空表示降为一维时间序列，实现紧凑表示，支持可处理的多假设训练。
AI.result: 在密集预测任务上，DeltaWorld预测的未来更接近真实世界结果，同时比现有生成式世界模型参数少35倍以上，FLOPs少2000倍。
AI.conclusion: DeltaWorld通过delta token表示和生成式建模，实现了高效、多样化的未来预测，显著优于现有方法。

title: Fusion and Alignment Enhancement with Large Language Models for Tail-item Sequential Recommendation
summary: Sequential Recommendation (SR) learns user preferences from their historical interaction sequences and provides personalized suggestions. In real-world scenarios, most items exhibit sparse interactions, known as the tail-item problem. This issue limits the model's ability to accurately capture item transition patterns. To tackle this, large language models (LLMs) offer a promising solution by capturing semantic relationships between items. Despite previous efforts to leverage LLM-derived embeddings for enriching tail items, they still face the following limitations: 1) They struggle to effectively fuse collaborative signals with semantic knowledge, leading to suboptimal item embedding quality. 2) Existing methods overlook the structural inconsistency between the ID and LLM embedding spaces, causing conflicting signals that degrade recommendation accuracy. In this work, we propose a Fusion and Alignment Enhancement framework with LLMs for Tail-item Sequential Recommendation (FAERec), which improves item representations by generating coherently-fused and structurally consistent embeddings. For the information fusion challenge, we design an adaptive gating mechanism that dynamically fuses ID and LLM embeddings. Then, we propose a dual-level alignment approach to mitigate structural inconsistency. The item-level alignment establishes correspondences between ID and LLM embeddings of the same item through contrastive learning, while the feature-level alignment constrains the correlation patterns between corresponding dimensions across the two embedding spaces. Furthermore, the weights of the two alignments are adjusted by a curriculum learning scheduler to avoid premature optimization of the complex feature-level objective. Extensive experiments across three widely used datasets with multiple representative SR backbones demonstrate the effectiveness and generalizability of our framework.

AI.tldr: FAERec是一个用于尾部物品序列推荐的融合与对齐增强框架，通过自适应门控机制融合ID和LLM嵌入，并使用双重对齐方法解决结构不一致问题。
AI.motivation: 解决序列推荐中的尾部物品问题。尾部物品交互稀疏，传统模型难以准确捕捉物品转移模式。现有LLM方法存在两个局限：1) 难以有效融合协同信号与语义知识；2) 忽视ID嵌入空间与LLM嵌入空间的结构不一致性，导致信号冲突。
AI.method: 提出FAERec框架：1) 自适应门控机制动态融合ID和LLM嵌入；2) 双重对齐方法：物品级对齐通过对比学习建立相同物品ID与LLM嵌入的对应关系，特征级对齐约束两个嵌入空间对应维度间的相关模式；3) 使用课程学习调度器调整两个对齐的权重。
AI.result: 在三个广泛使用的数据集上，与多个代表性序列推荐骨干模型进行实验，证明了框架的有效性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: FAERec通过融合LLM语义知识和协同信号，并解决嵌入空间结构不一致问题，有效提升了尾部物品序列推荐的性能。

title: RDEx-CMOP: Feasibility-Aware Indicator-Guided Differential Evolution for Fixed-Budget Constrained Multiobjective Optimization
summary: Constrained multiobjective optimisation requires fast feasibility attainment together with stable convergence and diversity preservation under strict evaluation budgets. This report documents RDEx-CMOP, the differential evolution variant used in the IEEE CEC 2025 numerical optimisation competition (C06 special session) constrained multiobjective track. RDEx-CMOP integrates an ε-level feasibility schedule, a SPEA2-style indicator-driven fitness assignment, and a fitness-oriented current-to-pbest/1 mutation operator. We evaluate RDEx-CMOP on the official CEC 2025 CMOP benchmark using the median-target U-score framework and the released trace data. Experimental results show that RDEx-CMOP achieves the highest total score and the best overall average rank among all released comparison algorithms, with strong target-attainment behaviour and near-zero final violation on most problems.

AI.tldr: RDEx-CMOP是一种用于约束多目标优化的差分进化变体，在IEEE CEC 2025竞赛中表现最佳，集成了ε级可行性调度、SPEA2风格指标驱动适应度分配和适应度导向的变异算子。
AI.motivation: 约束多目标优化需要在严格评估预算下实现快速可行性达成、稳定收敛和多样性保持。IEEE CEC 2025竞赛需要高效的优化算法来处理这些挑战。
AI.method: RDEx-CMOP集成了三个关键技术：1) ε级可行性调度机制，2) SPEA2风格的指标驱动适应度分配，3) 适应度导向的current-to-pbest/1变异算子。这些组件共同工作以平衡可行性、收敛性和多样性。
AI.result: 在CEC 2025 CMOP基准测试中，RDEx-CMOP获得了最高总分和最佳平均排名，表现出强大的目标达成能力和在大多数问题上接近零的最终约束违反。
AI.conclusion: RDEx-CMOP是约束多目标优化的有效方法，在严格评估预算下表现出色，为实际工程优化问题提供了实用解决方案。

title: Efficient Onboard Spacecraft Pose Estimation with Event Cameras and Neuromorphic Hardware
summary: Reliable relative pose estimation is a key enabler for autonomous rendezvous and proximity operations, yet space imagery is notoriously challenging due to extreme illumination, high contrast, and fast target motion. Event cameras provide asynchronous, change-driven measurements that can remain informative when frame-based imagery saturates or blurs, while neuromorphic processors can exploit sparse activations for low-latency, energy-efficient inferences. This paper presents a spacecraft 6-DoF pose-estimation pipeline that couples event-based vision with the BrainChip Akida neuromorphic processor. Using the SPADES dataset, we train compact MobileNet-style keypoint regression networks on lightweight event-frame representations, apply quantization-aware training (8/4-bit), and convert the models to Akida-compatible spiking neural networks. We benchmark three event representations and demonstrate real-time, low-power inference on Akida V1 hardware. We additionally design a heatmap-based model targeting Akida V2 and evaluate it on Akida Cloud, yielding improved pose accuracy. To our knowledge, this is the first end-to-end demonstration of spacecraft pose estimation running on Akida hardware, highlighting a practical route to low-latency, low-power perception for future autonomous space missions.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种基于事件相机和神经形态处理器（BrainChip Akida）的航天器6自由度姿态估计流水线，实现了低延迟、低功耗的实时推理，适用于自主交会对接任务。
AI.motivation: 空间成像面临极端光照、高对比度和快速目标运动等挑战，传统帧式相机容易饱和或模糊。事件相机提供异步、变化驱动的测量，神经形态处理器能利用稀疏激活实现低延迟、高能效的推理，为自主空间任务提供实用解决方案。
AI.method: 使用SPADES数据集，在轻量级事件帧表示上训练紧凑的MobileNet风格关键点回归网络，应用量化感知训练（8/4位），并将模型转换为Akida兼容的脉冲神经网络。评估了三种事件表示，并在Akida V1硬件上实现实时低功耗推理。还设计了针对Akida V2的基于热图的模型，并在Akida Cloud上评估。
AI.result: 在Akida硬件上实现了首个端到端的航天器姿态估计演示，展示了实时、低功耗的推理能力。针对Akida V2的热图模型在Akida Cloud上获得了改进的姿态估计精度。
AI.conclusion: 这项工作展示了事件视觉与神经形态处理器结合在自主空间任务中的实际应用路径，为未来低延迟、低功耗的空间感知系统提供了可行方案。

title: Your Pre-trained Diffusion Model Secretly Knows Restoration
summary: Pre-trained diffusion models have enabled significant advancements in All-in-One Restoration (AiOR), offering improved perceptual quality and generalization. However, diffusion-based restoration methods primarily rely on fine-tuning or Control-Net style modules to leverage the pre-trained diffusion model's priors for AiOR. In this work, we show that these pre-trained diffusion models inherently possess restoration behavior, which can be unlocked by directly learning prompt embeddings at the output of the text encoder. Interestingly, this behavior is largely inaccessible through text prompts and text-token embedding optimization. Furthermore, we observe that naive prompt learning is unstable because the forward noising process using degraded images is misaligned with the reverse sampling trajectory. To resolve this, we train prompts within a diffusion bridge formulation that aligns training and inference dynamics, enforcing a coherent denoising path from noisy degraded states to clean images. Building on these insights, we introduce our lightweight learned prompts on the pre-trained WAN video model and FLUX image models, converting them into high-performing restoration models. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach achieves competitive performance and generalization across diverse degradations, while avoiding fine-tuning and restoration-specific control modules.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种通过直接学习文本编码器输出的提示嵌入来解锁预训练扩散模型固有修复能力的方法，无需微调或Control-Net模块，实现了高性能的All-in-One图像修复。
AI.motivation: 现有基于扩散模型的修复方法主要依赖微调或Control-Net模块来利用预训练模型的先验知识，但作者发现预训练扩散模型本身具有修复能力，只是需要通过合适的提示学习来解锁。
AI.method: 1) 直接在文本编码器输出端学习提示嵌入，而非使用文本提示或文本标记嵌入优化；2) 采用扩散桥公式训练提示，对齐训练和推理动态，确保从噪声退化状态到干净图像的一致去噪路径；3) 在预训练的WAN视频模型和FLUX图像模型上应用轻量级学习提示。
AI.result: 该方法在多种退化类型上实现了竞争性性能和泛化能力，避免了模型微调和修复专用控制模块，将预训练扩散模型转化为高性能修复模型。
AI.conclusion: 预训练扩散模型具有固有的修复能力，可通过适当的提示学习和扩散桥公式解锁，为All-in-One修复提供了一种轻量级、高效的解决方案。

title: Measuring Robustness of Speech Recognition from MEG Signals Under Distribution Shift
summary: This study investigates robust speech-related decoding from non-invasive MEG signals using the LibriBrain phoneme-classification benchmark from the 2025 PNPL competition. We compare residual convolutional neural networks (CNNs), an STFT-based CNN, and a CNN--Transformer hybrid, while also examining the effects of group averaging, label balancing, repeated grouping, normalization strategies, and data augmentation. Across our in-house implementations, preprocessing and data-configuration choices matter more than additional architectural complexity, among which instance normalization emerges as the most influential modification for generalization. The strongest of our own models, a CNN with group averaging, label balancing, repeated grouping, and instance normalization, achieves 60.95% F1-macro on the test split, compared with 39.53% for the plain CNN baseline. However, most of our models, without instance normalization, show substantial validation-to-test degradation, indicating that distribution shift induced by different normalization statistics is a major obstacle to generalization in our experiments. By contrast, MEGConformer maintains 64.09% F1-macro on both validation and test, and saliency-map analysis is qualitatively consistent with this contrast: weaker models exhibit more concentrated or repetitive phoneme-sensitive patterns across splits, whereas MEGConformer appears more distributed. Overall, the results suggest that improving the reliability of non-invasive phoneme decoding will likely require better handling of normalization-related distribution shift while also addressing the challenge of single-trial decoding.

AI.tldr: 研究比较了多种神经网络架构在非侵入式MEG信号语音解码任务上的表现，发现预处理和数据配置选择比架构复杂性更重要，其中实例归一化对泛化影响最大。
AI.motivation: 研究旨在提高非侵入式MEG信号中语音相关解码的鲁棒性，特别是针对PNPL 2025竞赛中的LibriBrain音素分类基准任务。
AI.method: 比较了残差CNN、STFT-based CNN和CNN-Transformer混合架构，同时研究了组平均、标签平衡、重复分组、归一化策略和数据增强的影响。
AI.result: 最佳模型（CNN+组平均+标签平衡+重复分组+实例归一化）在测试集上达到60.95% F1-macro，相比基线39.53%有显著提升。但大多数模型在没有实例归一化时出现显著的验证-测试性能下降，表明归一化相关的分布偏移是主要泛化障碍。
AI.conclusion: 提高非侵入式音素解码可靠性需要更好地处理归一化相关的分布偏移，同时解决单次试验解码的挑战。MEGConformer在验证和测试集上保持64.09% F1-macro，表现更稳定。

title: Fully Procedural Synthetic Data from Simple Rules for Multi-View Stereo
summary: In this paper, we explore the design space of procedural rules for multi-view stereo (MVS). We demonstrate that we can generate effective training data using SimpleProc: a new, fully procedural generator driven by a very small set of rules using Non-Uniform Rational Basis Splines (NURBS), as well as basic displacement and texture patterns. At a modest scale of 8,000 images, our approach achieves superior results compared to manually curated images (at the same scale) sourced from games and real-world objects. When scaled to 352,000 images, our method yields performance comparable to--and in several benchmarks, exceeding--models trained on over 692,000 manually curated images. The source code and the data are available at https://github.com/princeton-vl/SimpleProc.

AI.tldr: SimpleProc：一种完全程序化的多视角立体视觉训练数据生成方法，使用少量NURBS规则和基本位移/纹理模式，在小规模数据上优于人工标注数据，大规模时性能可媲美甚至超过更大规模人工数据。
AI.motivation: 多视角立体视觉（MVS）需要大量高质量训练数据，但人工收集和标注成本高昂。现有方法依赖游戏引擎或真实世界数据，存在数据获取困难、标注不一致等问题。本文旨在探索程序化规则的设计空间，开发一种完全程序化的数据生成方法，以低成本生成高质量训练数据。
AI.method: 提出SimpleProc方法：1）使用非均匀有理B样条（NURBS）作为基础几何表示；2）结合基本位移和纹理模式；3）通过少量规则驱动完全程序化生成；4）生成多视角图像对用于MVS训练。该方法无需人工干预，可自动生成大规模、多样化的训练数据。
AI.result: 1）在8,000张图像规模下，SimpleProc生成的数据优于同规模游戏和真实世界人工数据；2）扩展到352,000张图像时，性能可媲美甚至超过使用692,000张人工标注图像训练的模型；3）在多个基准测试中表现优异，证明了程序化数据生成的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 程序化数据生成是解决MVS数据稀缺问题的有效途径。SimpleProc展示了通过少量规则即可生成高质量训练数据，在小规模和大规模场景下均表现优异。该方法为计算机视觉任务的数据生成提供了新思路，代码和数据已开源。

title: 15 Years of Augmented Human(s) Research: Where Do We Stand?
comment: Accepted to Augmented Humans International Conference 2026
summary: The Augmented Human vision broadly seeks to improve or expand baseline human functioning through the restoration or extension of physical, intellectual, and social capabilities. However, given the rapid pace of technology development, we ask: what exactly does Augmented Human research involve, what are its core themes, and how has the Augmented Human(s) conference series evolved over time? To answer this, we conducted a scientometric analysis on the past 15 years of the Augmented Human(s) conference (N=735 paper), focusing on: geographical aspects, submissions and citation timelines, author frequency and popularity, and topic modeling. We find that: (a) Number of papers in the conference exhibit a bimodal distribution, peaking in 2015 and 2025, but showing periods of stagnant growth; (b) key topics over time include Haptics, Wearable Sensing, Vision & Eye Tracking, Embodied Interaction, and Sports / Motion; (c) some seminal papers on AH are not published in AH(s), but rather at related venues (e.g., CHI); (d) the conference has an active Japanese HCI community despite its historical Eurocentric location dominance. We contribute a closer look at the trajectory of the AH(s) field, and raise considerations of definitional and research scope ambiguities given the core problems/enhancements the field seeks to address.

AI.tldr: 对Augmented Human(s)会议15年（735篇论文）进行科学计量分析，发现论文数量呈双峰分布（2015和2025年峰值），核心主题包括触觉、可穿戴传感、视觉与眼动追踪、具身交互、运动等，日本HCI社区活跃，但该领域存在定义和研究范围模糊的问题。
AI.motivation: 随着增强人类技术快速发展，需要明确该研究领域的具体内容、核心主题以及Augmented Human(s)会议系列随时间的发展演变，以理解该领域的现状和未来方向。
AI.method: 对Augmented Human(s)会议过去15年的735篇论文进行科学计量分析，包括地理分布、提交和引用时间线、作者频率和流行度、主题建模等多个维度。
AI.result: 1) 会议论文数量呈双峰分布，峰值在2015和2025年，但存在增长停滞期；2) 核心主题包括触觉、可穿戴传感、视觉与眼动追踪、具身交互、运动等；3) 一些开创性论文发表在相关会议（如CHI）而非AH(s)；4) 日本HCI社区活跃，尽管会议历史上以欧洲为中心。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了AH(s)领域的发展轨迹，并指出由于该领域试图解决的核心问题/增强目标，存在定义和研究范围的模糊性，需要进一步澄清。

title: Primal-Dual Methods for Nonsmooth Nonconvex Optimization with Orthogonality Constraints
summary: Recent advancements in data science have significantly elevated the importance of orthogonally constrained optimization problems. The Riemannian approach has become a popular technique for addressing these problems due to the advantageous computational and analytical properties of the Stiefel manifold. Nonetheless, the interplay of nonsmoothness alongside orthogonality constraints introduces substantial challenges to current Riemannian methods, including scalability, parallelizability, complicated subproblems, and cumulative numerical errors that threaten feasibility. In this paper, we take a retraction-free primal-dual approach and propose a linearized smoothing augmented Lagrangian method specifically designed for nonsmooth and nonconvex optimization with orthogonality constraints. Our proposed method is single-loop and free of subproblem solving. We establish its iteration complexity of $O(ε^{-3})$ for finding $ε$-KKT points, matching the best-known results in the Riemannian optimization literature. Additionally, by invoking the standard Kurdyka-Lojasiewicz (KL) property, we demonstrate asymptotic sequential convergence of the proposed algorithm. Numerical experiments on both smooth and nonsmooth orthogonal constrained problems demonstrate the superior computational efficiency and scalability of the proposed method compared with state-of-the-art algorithms.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种用于非光滑非凸正交约束优化的线性化平滑增广拉格朗日方法，无需子问题求解，具有O(ε⁻³)迭代复杂度
AI.motivation: 正交约束优化在数据科学中日益重要，但非光滑性与正交约束的结合给现有黎曼方法带来挑战，包括可扩展性、并行性、复杂子问题和累积数值误差等问题
AI.method: 采用无回缩的原始-对偶方法，提出线性化平滑增广拉格朗日方法，单循环且无需子问题求解，适用于非光滑非凸正交约束优化
AI.result: 证明了O(ε⁻³)的迭代复杂度用于找到ε-KKT点，与黎曼优化文献中最佳结果匹配；通过KL性质证明了算法的渐近序列收敛性；数值实验显示在光滑和非光滑问题上均优于现有算法
AI.conclusion: 该方法在计算效率和可扩展性方面优于现有算法，为处理非光滑正交约束优化问题提供了有效的解决方案

title: Rethinking Model Efficiency: Multi-Agent Inference with Large Models
summary: Most vision-language models (VLMs) apply a large language model (LLM) as the decoder, where the response tokens are generated sequentially through autoregression. Therefore, the number of output tokens can be the bottleneck of the end-to-end latency. However, different models may require vastly different numbers of output tokens to achieve comparable performance. In this work, we conduct a comprehensive analysis of the latency across different components of VLMs on simulated data. The experiment shows that a large model with fewer output tokens can be more efficient than a small model with a long output sequence. The empirical study on diverse real-world benchmarks confirms the observation that a large model can achieve better or comparable performance as a small model with significantly fewer output tokens. To leverage the efficiency of large models, we propose a multi-agent inference framework that keeps large models with short responses but transfers the key reasoning tokens from the small model when necessary. The comparison on benchmark tasks demonstrates that by reusing the reasoning tokens from small models, it can help approach the performance of a large model with its own reasoning, which confirms the effectiveness of our proposal.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了视觉语言模型（VLM）中输出token数量对延迟的影响，发现大模型用更少的输出token可以比小模型更高效，并提出了一个多智能体推理框架来提升效率。
AI.motivation: 当前视觉语言模型通常使用大语言模型作为解码器，采用自回归方式生成响应token，输出token数量成为端到端延迟的瓶颈。不同模型需要不同数量的输出token才能达到可比性能，需要研究如何优化这一效率问题。
AI.method: 1. 对VLM不同组件的延迟进行综合分析；2. 在模拟数据和真实世界基准测试上进行实证研究；3. 提出多智能体推理框架，保持大模型的短响应，但在必要时从小模型转移关键推理token。
AI.result: 实验表明：大模型用更少的输出token可以比小模型更高效；实证研究证实大模型可以用显著更少的输出token达到更好或可比的性能；多智能体框架通过重用小模型的推理token，能够接近大模型自身推理的性能。
AI.conclusion: 输出token数量是VLM延迟的关键瓶颈，大模型在减少输出token方面具有效率优势。提出的多智能体推理框架能有效平衡效率与性能，通过token转移机制提升推理效率。

title: LoMa: Local Feature Matching Revisited
summary: Local feature matching has long been a fundamental component of 3D vision systems such as Structure-from-Motion (SfM), yet progress has lagged behind the rapid advances of modern data-driven approaches. The newer approaches, such as feed-forward reconstruction models, have benefited extensively from scaling dataset sizes, whereas local feature matching models are still only trained on a few mid-sized datasets. In this paper, we revisit local feature matching from a data-driven perspective. In our approach, which we call LoMa, we combine large and diverse data mixtures, modern training recipes, scaled model capacity, and scaled compute, resulting in remarkable gains in performance. Since current standard benchmarks mainly rely on collecting sparse views from successful 3D reconstructions, the evaluation of progress in feature matching has been limited to relatively easy image pairs. To address the resulting saturation of benchmarks, we collect 1000 highly challenging image pairs from internet data into a new dataset called HardMatch. Ground truth correspondences for HardMatch are obtained via manual annotation by the authors. In our extensive benchmarking suite, we find that LoMa makes outstanding progress across the board, outperforming the state-of-the-art method ALIKED+LightGlue by +18.6 mAA on HardMatch, +29.5 mAA on WxBS, +21.4 (1m, 10$^\circ$) on InLoc, +24.2 AUC on RUBIK, and +12.4 mAA on IMC 2022. We release our code and models publicly at https://github.com/davnords/LoMa.

AI.tldr: LoMa通过数据混合、现代训练方法、模型容量扩展和计算扩展，显著提升了局部特征匹配性能，并在新构建的HardMatch数据集上大幅超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 局部特征匹配作为3D视觉系统的基础组件，其发展滞后于现代数据驱动方法。现有方法仅在少数中型数据集上训练，而现代重建模型已从大规模数据集中受益。同时，当前基准测试主要基于成功的3D重建稀疏视图，导致评估局限于相对简单的图像对。
AI.method: 提出LoMa方法，结合：1）大规模多样化数据混合；2）现代训练方法；3）扩展模型容量；4）扩展计算资源。同时构建HardMatch数据集，包含1000个来自互联网的极具挑战性图像对，通过人工标注获得真实对应关系。
AI.result: LoMa在多个基准测试中取得显著进步：在HardMatch上超越ALIKED+LightGlue 18.6 mAA，在WxBS上提升29.5 mAA，在InLoc上提升21.4 (1m, 10°)，在RUBIK上提升24.2 AUC，在IMC 2022上提升12.4 mAA。
AI.conclusion: 通过数据驱动方法重新审视局部特征匹配，结合大规模数据、现代训练技术和计算扩展，可以显著提升性能。新构建的HardMatch数据集解决了现有基准饱和问题，为更全面的评估提供了基础。

title: Non-Equilibrium Stochastic Dynamics as a Unified Framework for Insight and Repetitive Learning: A Kramers Escape Approach to Continual Learning
summary: Continual learning in artificial neural networks is fundamentally limited by the stability--plasticity dilemma: systems that retain prior knowledge tend to resist acquiring new knowledge, and vice versa. Existing approaches, most notably elastic weight consolidation~(EWC), address this empirically without a physical account of why plasticity eventually collapses as tasks accumulate. Separately, the distinction between sudden insight and gradual skill acquisition through repetitive practice has lacked a unified theoretical description. Here, we show that both problems admit a common resolution within non-equilibrium statistical physics. We model the state of a learning system as a particle evolving under Langevin dynamics on a double-well energy landscape, with the noise amplitude governed by a time-dependent effective temperature $T(t)$. The probability density obeys a Fokker--Planck equation, and transitions between metastable states are governed by the Kramers escape rate $k = (ω_0ω_b/2π)\,e^{-ΔE/T}$. We make two contributions. First, we identify the EWC penalty term as an energy barrier whose height grows linearly with the number of accumulated tasks, yielding an exponential collapse of the transition rate predicted analytically and confirmed numerically. Second, we show that insight and repetitive learning correspond to two qualitatively distinct temperature protocols within the same Fokker--Planck equation: insight events produce transient spikes in $T(t)$ that drive rapid barrier crossing, whereas repetitive practice operates at a modestly elevated but fixed temperature, achieving transitions through sustained stochastic diffusion. These results establish a physically grounded framework for understanding plasticity and its failure in continual learning systems, and suggest principled design criteria for adaptive noise schedules in artificial intelligence.

AI.tldr: 该论文从非平衡统计物理角度，将持续学习中的稳定性-可塑性困境统一建模为双势阱能量景观上的朗之万动力学，解释了EWC惩罚项如何导致可塑性指数级崩溃，并区分了顿悟学习与重复练习的两种温度机制。
AI.motivation: 解决人工神经网络持续学习中的稳定性-可塑性困境：现有方法（如EWC）缺乏物理解释为什么随着任务积累可塑性最终崩溃；同时，顿悟学习与重复练习的区分缺乏统一理论描述。
AI.method: 采用非平衡统计物理框架，将学习系统状态建模为双势阱能量景观上的粒子朗之万动力学，噪声幅度由时变有效温度T(t)控制。概率密度服从Fokker-Planck方程，状态间转移由Kramers逃逸率描述。
AI.result: 1) 识别EWC惩罚项为能量屏障，其高度随累积任务数线性增长，导致转移率指数级崩溃；2) 顿悟学习对应T(t)的瞬态尖峰驱动快速势垒穿越，重复练习对应适度升高但固定的温度实现持续随机扩散。
AI.conclusion: 建立了理解持续学习系统可塑性及其失败的物理基础框架，为人工智能中自适应噪声调度提供了原则性设计标准。

title: PointTPA: Dynamic Network Parameter Adaptation for 3D Scene Understanding
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2026. The code is available at https://github.com/H-EmbodVis/PointTPA
summary: Scene-level point cloud understanding remains challenging due to diverse geometries, imbalanced category distributions, and highly varied spatial layouts. Existing methods improve object-level performance but rely on static network parameters during inference, limiting their adaptability to dynamic scene data. We propose PointTPA, a Test-time Parameter Adaptation framework that generates input-aware network parameters for scene-level point clouds. PointTPA adopts a Serialization-based Neighborhood Grouping (SNG) to form locally coherent patches and a Dynamic Parameter Projector (DPP) to produce patch-wise adaptive weights, enabling the backbone to adjust its behavior according to scene-specific variations while maintaining a low parameter overhead. Integrated into the PTv3 structure, PointTPA demonstrates strong parameter efficiency by introducing two lightweight modules of less than 2% of the backbone's parameters. Despite this minimal parameter overhead, PointTPA achieves 78.4% mIoU on ScanNet validation, surpassing existing parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) methods across multiple benchmarks, highlighting the efficacy of our test-time dynamic network parameter adaptation mechanism in enhancing 3D scene understanding. The code is available at https://github.com/H-EmbodVis/PointTPA.

AI.tldr: PointTPA：一种用于场景级点云理解的测试时参数自适应框架，通过动态生成输入感知的网络参数来适应不同场景变化，在保持低参数开销的同时显著提升3D场景理解性能。
AI.motivation: 场景级点云理解面临几何多样性、类别分布不平衡和空间布局变化大等挑战。现有方法在推理时使用静态网络参数，难以适应动态场景数据的变化。
AI.method: 提出PointTPA框架，包含：1）序列化邻域分组（SNG）形成局部一致补丁；2）动态参数投影器（DPP）生成补丁级自适应权重。集成到PTv3结构中，仅增加不到2%的参数。
AI.result: 在ScanNet验证集上达到78.4% mIoU，超越现有参数高效微调方法，在多个基准测试中表现优异，展示了测试时动态网络参数自适应机制的有效性。
AI.conclusion: PointTPA通过测试时动态参数自适应显著提升3D场景理解性能，同时保持高参数效率，为点云处理提供了新的自适应框架。

title: Vanast: Virtual Try-On with Human Image Animation via Synthetic Triplet Supervision
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2026, Project Page: https://hyunsoocha.github.io/vanast/
summary: We present Vanast, a unified framework that generates garment-transferred human animation videos directly from a single human image, garment images, and a pose guidance video. Conventional two-stage pipelines treat image-based virtual try-on and pose-driven animation as separate processes, which often results in identity drift, garment distortion, and front-back inconsistency. Our model addresses these issues by performing the entire process in a single unified step to achieve coherent synthesis. To enable this setting, we construct large-scale triplet supervision. Our data generation pipeline includes generating identity-preserving human images in alternative outfits that differ from garment catalog images, capturing full upper and lower garment triplets to overcome the single-garment-posed video pair limitation, and assembling diverse in-the-wild triplets without requiring garment catalog images. We further introduce a Dual Module architecture for video diffusion transformers to stabilize training, preserve pretrained generative quality, and improve garment accuracy, pose adherence, and identity preservation while supporting zero-shot garment interpolation. Together, these contributions allow Vanast to produce high-fidelity, identity-consistent animation across a wide range of garment types.

AI.tldr: Vanast是一个统一的框架，直接从单张人体图像、服装图像和姿态引导视频生成服装转移的人体动画视频，解决了传统两阶段流程中的身份漂移、服装变形和前后不一致问题。
AI.motivation: 传统虚拟试穿和姿态驱动动画的两阶段流程存在身份漂移、服装变形和前后不一致等问题，需要统一的端到端解决方案来生成连贯的服装转移动画。
AI.method: 1) 构建大规模三元组监督数据集；2) 提出数据生成流程，包括生成身份保持的换装图像、捕获完整上下装三元组、组装多样化野外三元组；3) 引入双模块视频扩散Transformer架构，稳定训练并提升生成质量。
AI.result: Vanast能够生成高保真、身份一致的人体动画视频，支持零样本服装插值，在服装准确性、姿态遵循和身份保持方面表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 通过统一框架、大规模数据生成和双模块架构，Vanast成功解决了服装转移动画中的关键挑战，实现了高质量、连贯的合成效果。

title: AutoReSpec: A Framework for Generating Specification using Large Language Models
summary: Formal specification generation has recently drawn attention in software engineering as a way to improve program correctness without requiring manual annotations. Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown promise in this area, but early results reveal several limitations. Generated specifications often fail verification due to syntax errors, logical inaccuracies, or incomplete reasoning, especially in programs with loops or branching logic. Techniques like SpecGen and FormalBench attempt to address this through prompting and benchmarking, but they typically rely on static prompts and do not offer mechanisms for recovering from failure or adapting to different program structures. In this paper, we present AutoReSpec, a collaborative framework that combines open and closed-source LLMs for verifiable specification generation. AutoReSpec dynamically chooses an LLM pair and prompt configuration based on the structure of the input program. If the primary LLM fails to produce a valid output, a collaborative model is invoked, using validator feedback to refine and correct the specification. This two-stage design enables both speed and robustness. We evaluate AutoReSpec on a new benchmark of 72 real-world and synthetic Java programs. Our results show that it achieves 67 passes out of 72, outperforming SpecGen and FormalBench in both Success Probability and Completeness. Our experimental evaluation achieves a 58.2% success probability and a 69.2% completeness score, while cutting evaluation time by 26.89% on average compared to prior methods. Together, these results demonstrate that AutoReSpec offers a scalable, efficient, and reliable approach to LLM-based formal specification generation.

AI.tldr: AutoReSpec：一个结合开源和闭源LLM的协作框架，用于生成可验证的形式化规范，通过动态选择LLM对和提示配置，利用验证器反馈进行错误恢复，在Java程序基准测试中表现优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM在形式化规范生成中存在局限性：生成的规范常因语法错误、逻辑不准确或不完整推理而验证失败，特别是在包含循环或分支逻辑的程序中。现有方法如SpecGen和FormalBench依赖静态提示，缺乏错误恢复机制和适应不同程序结构的能力。
AI.method: AutoReSpec采用协作框架设计：1）基于输入程序结构动态选择LLM对和提示配置；2）如果主LLM生成失败，调用协作模型利用验证器反馈来修正规范；3）两阶段设计兼顾速度和鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在72个真实世界和合成Java程序的新基准测试中：67/72通过，成功率58.2%，完整性得分69.2%，平均评估时间减少26.89%，在成功概率和完整性方面均优于SpecGen和FormalBench。
AI.conclusion: AutoReSpec为基于LLM的形式化规范生成提供了可扩展、高效且可靠的方法，通过协作框架和动态适应机制显著提升了规范生成的质量和效率。

title: PATHFINDER: Multi-objective discovery in structural and spectral spaces
summary: Automated decision-making is becoming key for automated characterization including electron and scanning probe microscopies and nano indentation. Most machine learning driven workflows optimize a single predefined objective and tend to converge prematurely on familiar responses, overlooking rare but scientifically important states. More broadly, the challenge is not only where to measure next, but how to coordinate exploration across structural, spectral, and measurement spaces under finite experimental budgets while balancing target-driven optimization with novelty discovery. Here we introduce PATHFINDER, a framework for autonomous microscopy that combines novelty driven exploration with optimization, helping the system discover more diverse and useful representations across structural, spectral, and measurement spaces. By combining latent space representations of local structure, surrogate modeling of functional response, and Pareto-based acquisition, the framework selects measurements that balance novelty discovery in feature and object space and are informative and experimentally actionable. Benchmarked on pre acquired STEM EELS data and realized experimentally in scanning probe microscopy of ferroelectric materials, this approach expands the accessible structure property landscape and avoids collapse onto a single apparent optimum. These results point to a new mode of autonomous microscopy that is not only optimization-driven, but also discovery-oriented, broad in its search, and responsive to human guidance.

AI.tldr: PATHFINDER是一个自主显微镜框架，结合了新颖性驱动探索与优化，在结构、光谱和测量空间中平衡目标驱动优化与新颖性发现。
AI.motivation: 当前机器学习驱动的自动化决策工作流程通常只优化单一预定义目标，容易过早收敛于熟悉响应，忽略了罕见但科学重要的状态。需要协调结构、光谱和测量空间的探索，在有限实验预算下平衡目标驱动优化与新颖性发现。
AI.method: 结合局部结构的潜在空间表示、功能响应的代理建模和基于帕累托的采集，选择在特征和对象空间中平衡新颖性发现且具有信息量和实验可操作性的测量。
AI.result: 在预采集的STEM EELS数据和铁电材料扫描探针显微镜实验中验证，该方法扩展了可访问的结构-性质景观，避免坍缩到单一明显最优解。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种新的自主显微镜模式，不仅是优化驱动的，而且是发现导向的、搜索广泛且能响应人类指导。

title: Build on Priors: Vision--Language--Guided Neuro-Symbolic Imitation Learning for Data-Efficient Real-World Robot Manipulation
summary: Enabling robots to learn long-horizon manipulation tasks from a handful of demonstrations remains a central challenge in robotics. Existing neuro-symbolic approaches often rely on hand-crafted symbolic abstractions, semantically labeled trajectories or large demonstration datasets, limiting their scalability and real-world applicability. We present a scalable neuro-symbolic framework that autonomously constructs symbolic planning domains and data-efficient control policies from as few as one to thirty unannotated skill demonstrations, without requiring manual domain engineering. Our method segments demonstrations into skills and employs a Vision-Language Model (VLM) to classify skills and identify equivalent high-level states, enabling automatic construction of a state-transition graph. This graph is processed by an Answer Set Programming solver to synthesize a PDDL planning domain, which an oracle function exploits to isolate the minimal, task-relevant and target relative observation and action spaces for each skill policy. Policies are learned at the control reference level rather than at the raw actuator signal level, yielding a smoother and less noisy learning target. Known controllers can be leveraged for real-world data augmentation by projecting a single demonstration onto other objects in the scene, simultaneously enriching the graph construction process and the dataset for imitation learning. We validate our framework primarily on a real industrial forklift across statistically rigorous manipulation trials, and demonstrate cross-platform generality on a Kinova Gen3 robotic arm across two standard benchmarks. Our results show that grounding control learning, VLM-driven abstraction, and automated planning synthesis into a unified pipeline constitutes a practical path toward scalable, data-efficient, expert-free and interpretable neuro-symbolic robotics.

AI.tldr: 提出一个可扩展的神经符号框架，能够从少量未标注演示中自主构建符号规划域和数据高效的控制策略，无需手动领域工程，在真实工业叉车和机械臂上验证。
AI.motivation: 解决机器人从少量演示中学习长时程操作任务的挑战。现有神经符号方法通常依赖手工符号抽象、语义标注轨迹或大型演示数据集，限制了可扩展性和实际应用性。
AI.method: 1) 将演示分割为技能，使用视觉语言模型(VLM)分类技能并识别等价高层状态，自动构建状态转移图；2) 使用答案集编程求解器合成PDDL规划域；3) 利用oracle函数为每个技能策略隔离最小化、任务相关且目标相关的观测和动作空间；4) 在控制参考层面而非原始执行器信号层面学习策略；5) 通过将单个演示投影到场景中其他物体来利用已知控制器进行真实世界数据增强。
AI.result: 在真实工业叉车和Kinova Gen3机械臂上验证，展示了框架的跨平台通用性。结果表明，将控制学习、VLM驱动的抽象和自动化规划合成统一到一个流程中，为可扩展、数据高效、无需专家且可解释的神经符号机器人提供了实用路径。
AI.conclusion: 提出的神经符号框架能够从少量未标注演示中自主构建符号规划域和控制策略，无需手动领域工程，在真实机器人平台上验证有效，为实现可扩展、数据高效且可解释的机器人学习提供了实用解决方案。

title: Relay-Assisted Activation-Integrated SIM for Wireless Physical Neural Networks
summary: Wireless physical neural networks (WPNNs) have emerged as a promising paradigm for performing neural computation directly in the physical layer of wireless systems, offering low latency and high energy efficiency. However, most existing WPNN implementations primarily rely on linear physical transformations, which fundamentally limits their expressiveness. In this work, we propose a relay-assisted WPNN architecture based on activation-integrated stacked intelligent metasurfaces (AI-SIMs), where each passive metasurface layer enabling linear wave manipulation is cascaded with an activation metasurface layer that realizes nonlinear processing in the analog domain. By deliberately structuring multi-hop wireless propagation, the relay amplification matrix and the metasurface phase-shift matrices jointly act as trainable network weights, while hardware-implemented activation functions provide essential nonlinearity. Simulation results demonstrate that the proposed architecture achieves high classification accuracy, and that incorporating hardware-based activation functions significantly improves representational capability and performance compared with purely linear physical implementations.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于激活集成堆叠智能超表面的中继辅助无线物理神经网络架构，通过多跳无线传播实现线性波操纵和非线性处理的物理层神经网络计算。
AI.motivation: 现有无线物理神经网络主要依赖线性物理变换，这从根本上限制了其表达能力。需要开发能够实现非线性处理的无线物理神经网络架构。
AI.method: 提出中继辅助的WPNN架构，基于激活集成堆叠智能超表面，每个被动超表面层实现线性波操纵，级联激活超表面层在模拟域实现非线性处理。多跳无线传播使中继放大矩阵和超表面相移矩阵共同作为可训练权重。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，该架构实现了高分类准确率，硬件实现的激活函数相比纯线性物理实现显著提高了表示能力和性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过将非线性激活函数集成到物理层，提出的AI-SIM架构显著增强了无线物理神经网络的表达能力，为低延迟、高能效的无线神经网络计算提供了新途径。

title: NeuralLVC: Neural Lossless Video Compression via Masked Diffusion with Temporal Conditioning
summary: While neural lossless image compression has advanced significantly with learned entropy models, lossless video compression remains largely unexplored in the neural setting. We present NeuralLVC, a neural lossless video codec that combines masked diffusion with an I/P-frame architecture for exploiting temporal redundancy. Our I-frame model compresses individual frames using bijective linear tokenization that guarantees exact pixel reconstruction. The P-frame model compresses temporal differences between consecutive frames, conditioned on the previous decoded frame via a lightweight reference embedding that adds only 1.3% trainable parameters. Group-wise decoding enables controllable speed-compression trade-offs. Our codec is lossless in the input domain: for video, it reconstructs YUV420 planes exactly; for image evaluation, RGB channels are reconstructed exactly. Experiments on 9 Xiph CIF sequences show that NeuralLVC outperforms H.264 and H.265 lossless by a significant margin. We verify exact reconstruction through end-to-end encode-decode testing with arithmetic coding. These results suggest that masked diffusion with temporal conditioning is a promising direction for neural lossless video compression.

AI.tldr: NeuralLVC：首个基于掩码扩散和I/P帧架构的神经无损视频编解码器，在Xiph CIF序列上显著优于H.264/H.265无损压缩
AI.motivation: 神经无损图像压缩已取得显著进展，但神经无损视频压缩领域仍未被充分探索。现有方法主要依赖传统编解码器，缺乏利用深度学习的潜力来有效压缩视频中的时空冗余。
AI.method:
1. I帧模型：使用双射线性标记化压缩单个帧，保证精确像素重建
2. P帧模型：压缩连续帧间的时域差异，通过轻量级参考嵌入（仅增加1.3%可训练参数）以前一解码帧为条件
3. 掩码扩散：结合掩码扩散技术进行概率建模
4. 分组解码：支持可控的速度-压缩权衡
5. 精确重建：在输入域实现无损，视频重建YUV420平面，图像重建RGB通道
AI.result: 在9个Xiph CIF序列上的实验表明，NeuralLVC显著优于H.264和H.265的无损压缩。通过算术编码的端到端编解码测试验证了精确重建能力。
AI.conclusion: 基于掩码扩散与时域条件化的方法在神经无损视频压缩领域具有广阔前景，为视频压缩提供了新的深度学习解决方案。

title: Sharp asymptotic theory for Q-learning with LDTZ learning rate and its generalization
summary: Despite the sustained popularity of Q-learning as a practical tool for policy determination, a majority of relevant theoretical literature deals with either constant ($η_{t}\equiv η$) or polynomially decaying ($η_{t} = ηt^{-α}$) learning schedules. However, it is well known that these choices suffer from either persistent bias or prohibitively slow convergence. In contrast, the recently proposed linear decay to zero (\texttt{LD2Z}: $η_{t,n}=η(1-t/n)$) schedule has shown appreciable empirical performance, but its theoretical and statistical properties remain largely unexplored, especially in the Q-learning setting. We address this gap in the literature by first considering a general class of power-law decay to zero (\texttt{PD2Z}-$ν$: $η_{t,n}=η(1-t/n)^ν$). Proceeding step-by-step, we present a sharp non-asymptotic error bound for Q-learning with \texttt{PD2Z}-$ν$ schedule, which then is used to derive a central limit theory for a new \textit{tail} Polyak-Ruppert averaging estimator. Finally, we also provide a novel time-uniform Gaussian approximation (also known as \textit{strong invariance principle}) for the partial sum process of Q-learning iterates, which facilitates bootstrap-based inference. All our theoretical results are complemented by extensive numerical experiments. Beyond being new theoretical and statistical contributions to the Q-learning literature, our results definitively establish that \texttt{LD2Z} and in general \texttt{PD2Z}-$ν$ achieve a best-of-both-worlds property: they inherit the rapid decay from initialization (characteristic of constant step-sizes) while retaining the asymptotic convergence guarantees (characteristic of polynomially decaying schedules). This dual advantage explains the empirical success of \texttt{LD2Z} while providing practical guidelines for inference through our results.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了Q-learning中学习率调度策略，提出了PD2Z-ν（幂律衰减到零）调度方法，并提供了非渐近误差界、中心极限理论和时间均匀高斯近似，证明了LD2Z调度兼具快速初始衰减和渐近收敛的双重优势。
AI.motivation: Q-learning中常用的常数学习率和多项式衰减学习率调度存在持续偏差或收敛过慢的问题，而线性衰减到零（LD2Z）调度在实证中表现良好但缺乏理论分析。本文旨在填补这一理论空白，为Q-learning提供更优的学习率调度方案和统计推断方法。
AI.method: 提出PD2Z-ν（幂律衰减到零）学习率调度类，包含LD2Z作为特例（ν=1）。通过逐步分析：1）推导PD2Z-ν调度的尖锐非渐近误差界；2）基于此建立新的尾部Polyak-Ruppert平均估计器的中心极限理论；3）提供Q-learning迭代部分和过程的时间均匀高斯近似（强不变原理），支持基于bootstrap的推断。
AI.result: 理论分析表明PD2Z-ν调度（特别是LD2Z）具有双重优势：继承了常数学习率的快速初始衰减特性，同时保持了多项式衰减调度的渐近收敛保证。这解释了LD2Z的实证成功，并为统计推断提供了实用指南。
AI.conclusion: PD2Z-ν调度为Q-learning提供了最佳的学习率调度方案，兼具快速收敛和渐近最优性。提出的统计推断方法（中心极限理论、强不变原理）为Q-learning的实践应用提供了理论支持。

title: DRIFT: Deep Restoration, ISP Fusion, and Tone-mapping
summary: Smartphone cameras have gained immense popularity with the adoption of high-resolution and high-dynamic range imaging. As a result, high-performance camera Image Signal Processors (ISPs) are crucial in generating high-quality images for the end user while keeping computational costs low. In this paper, we propose DRIFT (Deep Restoration, ISP Fusion, and Tone-mapping): an efficient AI mobile camera pipeline that generates high quality RGB images from hand-held raw captures. The first stage of DRIFT is a Multi-Frame Processing (MFP) network that is trained using a adversarial perceptual loss to perform multi-frame alignment, denoising, demosaicing, and super-resolution. Then, the output of DRIFT-MFP is processed by a novel deep-learning based tone-mapping (DRIFT-TM) solution that allows for tone tunability, ensures tone-consistency with a reference pipeline, and can be run efficiently for high-resolution images on a mobile device. We show qualitative and quantitative comparisons against state-of-the-art MFP and tone-mapping methods to demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach.

AI.tldr: DRIFT是一个高效的AI移动相机流水线，通过多帧处理和深度学习色调映射从原始RAW图像生成高质量RGB图像
AI.motivation: 随着智能手机相机采用高分辨率和高动态范围成像，需要高性能相机图像信号处理器（ISP）在保持低计算成本的同时生成高质量图像
AI.method: DRIFT包含两个阶段：1）多帧处理网络（DRIFT-MFP），使用对抗感知损失进行多帧对齐、去噪、去马赛克和超分辨率；2）深度学习色调映射（DRIFT-TM），支持色调可调性、确保与参考流水线的色调一致性，并能在移动设备上高效运行
AI.result: 通过定性和定量比较，DRIFT在MFP和色调映射方面优于最先进方法
AI.conclusion: DRIFT是一个高效的AI移动相机流水线，能够从手持原始捕获生成高质量RGB图像，在移动设备上实现高性能图像处理

title: An Improved Last-Iterate Convergence Rate for Anchored Gradient Descent Ascent
summary: We analyze the last-iterate convergence of the Anchored Gradient Descent Ascent algorithm for smooth convex-concave min-max problems. While previous work established a last-iterate rate of $\mathcal{O}(1/t^{2-2p})$ for the squared gradient norm, where $p \in (1/2, 1)$, it remained an open problem whether the improved exact $\mathcal{O}(1/t)$ rate is achievable. In this work, we resolve this question in the affirmative. This result was discovered autonomously by an AI system capable of writing formal proofs in Lean. The Lean proof can be accessed at https://github.com/google-deepmind/formal-conjectures/pull/3675/commits/a13226b49fd3b897f4c409194f3bcbeb96a08515

AI.tldr: 本文证明了Anchored Gradient Descent Ascent算法在光滑凸凹min-max问题中实现了最优的O(1/t)最后迭代收敛率，解决了该领域的开放问题。值得注意的是，这个证明是由能够编写形式化Lean证明的AI系统自主发现的。
AI.motivation: 在凸凹min-max问题的优化算法研究中，Anchored Gradient Descent Ascent算法虽然已有O(1/t^{2-2p})的最后迭代收敛率，但能否达到最优的O(1/t)收敛率一直是一个开放问题。本文旨在解决这个理论上的重要问题。
AI.method: 使用Anchored Gradient Descent Ascent算法处理光滑凸凹min-max问题，通过理论分析证明其收敛性。特别值得注意的是，证明过程是由能够编写形式化Lean证明的AI系统自主完成的。
AI.result: 成功证明了Anchored Gradient Descent Ascent算法在光滑凸凹min-max问题中实现了最优的O(1/t)最后迭代收敛率，解决了该领域的开放问题。
AI.conclusion: 该研究不仅解决了凸凹优化中的一个重要理论问题，还展示了AI系统在形式化数学证明方面的能力，为AI辅助数学研究提供了新的范例。

title: Transmission Neural Networks: Inhibitory and Excitatory Connections
summary: This paper extends the Transmission Neural Network model proposed by Gao and Caines in [1]-[3] to incorporate inhibitory connections and neurotransmitter populations. The extended network model contains binary neuronal states, transmission dynamics, and inhibitory and excitatory connections. Under technical assumptions, we establish the characterization of the firing probabilities of neurons, and show that such a characterization considering inhibitions can be equivalently represented by a neural network where each neuron has a continuous state of dimension 2. Moreover, we incorporated neurotransmitter populations into the modeling and establish the limit network model when the number of neurotransmitters at all synaptic connections go to infinity. Finally, sufficient conditions for stability and contraction properties of the limit network model are established.

AI.tldr: 将传输神经网络模型扩展为包含抑制性连接和神经递质群体，建立神经元放电概率的表征，并证明该模型可等价表示为二维连续状态神经网络，最后分析极限网络模型的稳定性和收缩性。
AI.motivation: 扩展现有的传输神经网络模型，使其更接近真实生物神经网络，通过纳入抑制性连接和神经递质群体来增强模型的生物学合理性，并研究这些扩展对网络动态特性的影响。
AI.method: 1) 扩展传输神经网络模型，包含二元神经元状态、传输动态、抑制性和兴奋性连接；2) 在技术假设下建立神经元放电概率的表征；3) 证明考虑抑制的模型可等价表示为二维连续状态神经网络；4) 纳入神经递质群体并建立当所有突触连接神经递质数量趋于无穷时的极限网络模型；5) 建立极限网络模型的稳定性和收缩性充分条件。
AI.result: 成功建立了包含抑制性连接和神经递质群体的扩展传输神经网络模型，证明了其与二维连续状态神经网络的等价性，并获得了极限网络模型的稳定性和收缩性条件。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为传输神经网络提供了更生物合理的扩展，建立了重要的理论结果，包括等价表征和稳定性条件，为理解包含抑制和神经递质动态的神经网络提供了理论框架。

title: RAIN-FIT: Learning of Fitting Surfaces and Noise Distribution from Large Data Sets
summary: This paper proposes a method for estimating a surface that contains a given set of points from noisy measurements. More precisely, by assuming that the surface is described by the zero set of a function in the span of a given set of features and a parametric description of the distribution of the noise, a computationally efficient method is described that estimates both the surface and the noise distribution parameters. In the provided examples, polynomial and sinusoidal basis functions were used. However, any chosen basis that satisfies the outlined conditions mentioned in the paper can be approximated as a combination of trigonometric, exponential, and/or polynomial terms, making the presented approach highly generalizable. The proposed algorithm exhibits linear computational complexity in the number of samples. Our approach requires no hyperparameter tuning or data preprocessing and effectively handles data in dimensions beyond 2D and 3D. The theoretical results demonstrating the convergence of the proposed algorithm have been provided. To highlight the performance of the proposed method, comprehensive numerical results are conducted, evaluating our method against state-of-the-art algorithms, including Poisson Reconstruction and the Neural Network-based Encoder-X, on 2D and 3D shapes. The results demonstrate the superiority of our method under the same conditions.

AI.tldr: 提出一种从噪声测量中估计包含给定点集的曲面的方法，使用特征函数展开和噪声分布参数估计，具有线性计算复杂度，无需超参数调优，在2D/3D形状重建中优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 从噪声测量中准确重建曲面是计算机图形学、医学成像和科学计算中的重要问题。现有方法通常需要复杂的超参数调优或预处理，且在高维数据上效果有限。本文旨在开发一种无需调优、计算高效且可扩展到高维的通用曲面重建方法。
AI.method: 假设曲面由特征函数展开的零集描述，同时估计曲面参数和噪声分布参数。使用多项式、正弦等基础函数，但可扩展到满足条件的任何基函数组合。算法具有线性计算复杂度，无需超参数调优或数据预处理。
AI.result: 在2D和3D形状重建实验中，该方法优于Poisson Reconstruction和Neural Network-based Encoder-X等先进算法。理论分析证明了算法的收敛性，且能有效处理高维数据。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种通用、高效且无需调优的曲面重建方法，在噪声环境下表现优异，具有理论保证和实际应用价值。

title: Avoiding Non-Integrable Beliefs in Expectation Propagation
summary: Expectation Propagation (EP) is a widely used iterative message-passing algorithm that decomposes a global inference problem into multiple local ones. It approximates marginal distributions as ``beliefs'' using intermediate functions called ``messages''. It has been shown that the stationary points of EP are the same as corresponding constrained Bethe Free Energy (BFE) optimization problem. Therefore, EP is an iterative method of optimizing the constrained BFE. However, the iterative method may fall out of the feasible set of the BFE optimization problem, i.e., the beliefs are not integrable. In most literature, the authors use various methods to keep all the messages integrable. In most Bayesian estimation problems, limiting the messages to be integrable shrinks the actual feasible set. Furthermore, in extreme cases where the factors are not integrable, making the message itself integrable is not enough to have integrable beliefs. In this paper, two EP frameworks are proposed to ensure that EP has integrable beliefs. Both of the methods allows non-integrable messages. We then investigate the signal recovery problem in Generalized Linear Model (GLM) using our proposed methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了两种新的期望传播（EP）框架，允许使用非可积消息，确保EP算法中的信念保持可积性，并在广义线性模型（GLM）的信号恢复问题中进行了验证。
AI.motivation: 期望传播（EP）算法在迭代过程中可能产生不可积的信念，超出Bethe自由能优化问题的可行集。传统方法限制消息为可积函数，但这缩小了实际可行集，且在因子本身不可积的极端情况下，仅使消息可积仍无法保证信念可积。
AI.method: 提出了两种EP框架：1）允许使用非可积消息但确保最终信念可积的方法；2）在EP迭代过程中直接约束信念可积性的方法。两种方法都放宽了对消息可积性的限制。
AI.result: 提出的新EP框架能够确保在迭代过程中信念保持可积性，即使在因子不可积的极端情况下也能正常工作。在广义线性模型的信号恢复问题中验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过允许非可积消息并确保信念可积，提出的EP框架扩展了传统EP的应用范围，解决了信念不可积的问题，为更广泛的贝叶斯估计问题提供了更灵活的推理工具。

title: A Logical-Rule Autoencoder for Interpretable Recommendations
summary: Most deep learning recommendation models operate as black boxes, relying on latent representations that obscure their decision process. This lack of intrinsic interpretability raises concerns in applications that require transparency and accountability. In this work, we propose a Logical-rule Interpretable Autoencoder (LIA) for collaborative filtering that is interpretable by design. LIA introduces a learnable logical rule layer in which each rule neuron is equipped with a gate parameter that automatically selects between AND and OR operators during training, enabling the model to discover diverse logical patterns directly from data. To support functional completeness without doubling the input dimensionality, LIA encodes negation through the sign of connection weights, providing a parameter-efficient mechanism for expressing both positive and negated item conditions within each rule. By learning explicit, human-readable reconstruction rules, LIA allows users to directly trace the decision process behind each recommendation. Extensive experiments show that our method achieves improved recommendation performance over traditional baselines while remaining fully interpretable. Code and data are available at https://github.com/weibowen555/LIA.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种用于协同过滤的逻辑规则可解释自编码器（LIA），通过可学习的逻辑规则层实现推荐系统的内在可解释性，在保持高性能的同时提供人类可读的决策规则。
AI.motivation: 大多数深度学习推荐模型作为黑箱运行，依赖潜在表示而缺乏内在可解释性，这在需要透明度和问责制的应用中存在问题。需要设计本质上可解释的推荐模型。
AI.method: 提出逻辑规则可解释自编码器（LIA），引入可学习的逻辑规则层，每个规则神经元配备门参数，在训练中自动选择AND或OR运算符。通过连接权重的符号编码否定，实现参数高效的功能完备性，无需加倍输入维度。
AI.result: 广泛实验表明，该方法在保持完全可解释性的同时，相比传统基线实现了改进的推荐性能。
AI.conclusion: LIA通过学习显式、人类可读的重构规则，允许用户直接追踪每个推荐背后的决策过程，为推荐系统提供了内在可解释性的解决方案。

title: HAD: Combining Hierarchical Diffusion with Metric-Decoupled RL for End-to-End Driving
summary: End-to-end planning has emerged as a dominant paradigm for autonomous driving, where recent models often adopt a scoring-selection framework to choose trajectories from a large set of candidates, with diffusion-based decoding showing strong promise. However, directly selecting from the entire candidate space remains difficult to optimize, and Gaussian perturbations used in diffusion often introduce unrealistic trajectories that complicate the denoising process. In addition, for training these models, reinforcement learning (RL) has shown promise, but existing end-to-end RL approaches typically rely on a single coupled reward without structured signals, limiting optimization effectiveness. To address these challenges, we propose HAD, an end-to-end planning framework with a Hierarchical Diffusion Policy that decomposes planning into a coarse-to-fine process. To improve trajectory generation, we introduce Structure-Preserved Trajectory Expansion, which produces realistic candidates while maintaining kinematic structure. For policy learning, we develop Metric-Decoupled Policy Optimization (MDPO) to enable structured RL optimization across multiple driving objectives. Extensive experiments show that HAD achieves new state-of-the-art performance on both NAVSIM and HUGSIM, outperforming prior arts by a huge margin: +2.3 EPDMS on NAVSIM and +4.9 Route Completion on HUGSIM.

AI.tldr: HAD：一种用于自动驾驶端到端规划的分层扩散策略框架，通过结构保持轨迹扩展和度量解耦策略优化，在NAVSIM和HUGSIM上实现了新的SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 当前端到端自动驾驶规划存在两个主要问题：1）基于评分选择的框架直接从整个候选空间选择轨迹难以优化，扩散解码中的高斯扰动会产生不现实的轨迹；2）强化学习方法通常使用单一耦合奖励，缺乏结构化信号，限制了优化效果。
AI.method: 提出HAD框架，包含：1）分层扩散策略，将规划分解为粗到细的过程；2）结构保持轨迹扩展，生成保持运动学结构的现实候选轨迹；3）度量解耦策略优化（MDPO），支持跨多个驾驶目标的结构化RL优化。
AI.result: 在NAVSIM和HUGSIM上实现了新的SOTA性能：NAVSIM上EPDMS提升+2.3，HUGSIM上路线完成率提升+4.9，大幅超越先前方法。
AI.conclusion: HAD通过分层扩散策略、结构保持轨迹扩展和度量解耦策略优化，有效解决了端到端自动驾驶规划中的轨迹生成和策略优化问题，显著提升了规划性能。

title: Enhancing behavioral nudges with large language model-based iterative personalization: A field experiment on electricity and hot-water conservation
summary: Nudging is widely used to promote behavioral change, but its effectiveness is often limited when recipients must repeatedly translate feedback into workable next steps under changing circumstances. Large language models (LLMs) may help reduce part of this cognitive work by generating personalized guidance and updating it iteratively across intervention rounds. We developed an LLM agent for iterative personalization and tested it in a three-arm randomized experiment among 233 university residents in China, using daily electricity and shower hot-water conservation as objectively measured cases differing in friction. LLM-personalized nudges (T2) produced the largest conservation effects, while image-enhanced conventional nudges (T1) and text-based conventional nudges (C) showed similar outcomes (omnibus p = 0.009). Relative to C, T2 reduced electricity consumption by 0.56 kWh per room-day (p = 0.014), corresponding to an 18.3 percentage-point higher adjusted saving rate. This advantage emerged within the first two intervention rounds, alongside iterative updating of personalized guidance, and persisted thereafter. Hot-water outcomes followed the same direction but were smaller, less precisely estimated, and attenuated over time, consistent with stronger friction in this domain. LLM-personalized nudges emphasized prospective and context-specific guidance and were associated with higher participant engagement. This study provides field evidence that LLM-based iterative personalization can enhance behavioral nudging, with behavioral friction as a potential boundary condition. Larger trials and extension to more behaviors are warranted.

AI.tldr: LLM代理通过迭代个性化生成指导，在节能行为干预中比传统推送更有效，尤其在低摩擦领域
AI.motivation: 传统行为推送（nudging）在需要接受者反复将反馈转化为可行步骤时效果有限，特别是在动态变化的环境中。LLM可能通过生成个性化指导并迭代更新来减少这种认知负担。
AI.method: 开发LLM代理进行迭代个性化，在中国233名大学居民中进行三臂随机实验：T2（LLM个性化推送）、T1（图像增强传统推送）、C（文本基础传统推送）。以每日用电和淋浴热水节能为客观测量案例，两者具有不同的行为摩擦程度。
AI.result: LLM个性化推送（T2）产生最大的节能效果，相比对照组（C）每天每房间减少0.56kWh用电（p=0.014），相当于调整后节省率提高18.3个百分点。优势在前两轮干预中出现并持续。热水结果方向相同但效果较小且随时间减弱，与更高摩擦一致。
AI.conclusion: LLM基于迭代个性化可以增强行为推送效果，行为摩擦是潜在的边界条件。LLM个性化推送强调前瞻性和情境特定指导，与更高参与度相关。
