title: A Family of Open Time-Series Foundation Models for the Radio Access Network
summary: The Radio Access Network (RAN) is evolving into a programmable and disaggregated infrastructure that increasingly relies on AI-native algorithms for optimization and closed-loop control. However, current RAN intelligence is still largely built from task-specific models tailored to individual functions, resulting in model fragmentation, limited knowledge sharing across tasks, poor generalization, and increased system complexity. To address these limitations, we introduce TimeRAN, a unified multi-task learning framework for time-series modeling in the RAN. TimeRAN leverages a lightweight time-series foundation model with few task-specific heads to learn transferable representations that can be efficiently adapted across diverse tasks with limited supervision. To enable large-scale pretraining, we further curate and open-source TimeRAN DataPile, the largest time-series corpus for RAN analytics to date, comprising over 355K time series and 0.56B measurements across diverse telemetry sources, protocol layers, and deployment scenarios. We evaluate TimeRAN across a comprehensive set of RAN analytics tasks, including anomaly detection, classification, forecasting, and imputation, and show that it achieves state-of-the-art performance with minimal or no task-specific fine-tuning. Finally, we integrate TimeRAN into a proof-of-concept 5G testbed and demonstrate that it operates efficiently with limited resource requirements in real-world scenarios.

AI.tldr: TimeRAN：用于无线接入网络（RAN）时间序列分析的多任务学习框架，基于轻量级时间序列基础模型，通过有限监督实现跨任务知识迁移，并开源了大规模RAN时间序列数据集。
AI.motivation: 当前RAN智能化主要依赖针对特定任务的模型，导致模型碎片化、跨任务知识共享有限、泛化能力差、系统复杂度高。需要统一的多任务学习框架来解决这些问题。
AI.method: 提出TimeRAN框架，采用轻量级时间序列基础模型配合少量任务特定头，学习可迁移的表征，能够以有限监督高效适应多样化任务。同时构建并开源TimeRAN DataPile数据集，包含超过35.5万条时间序列和5.6亿个测量值。
AI.result: TimeRAN在异常检测、分类、预测和插补等全面的RAN分析任务中实现了最先进的性能，仅需极少或无需任务特定微调。在5G测试床中验证了其在真实场景中的高效运行和有限资源需求。
AI.conclusion: TimeRAN为RAN时间序列分析提供了统一的解决方案，解决了当前任务特定模型的局限性，通过基础模型和多任务学习实现了更好的知识共享和泛化能力，为AI原生RAN优化提供了有效工具。

title: L-SPINE: A Low-Precision SIMD Spiking Neural Compute Engine for Resource-efficient Edge Inference
summary: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) offer a promising solution for energy-efficient edge intelligence; however, their hardware deployment is constrained by memory overhead, inefficient scaling operations, and limited parallelism. This work proposes L-SPINE, a low-precision SIMD-enabled spiking neural compute engine for efficient edge inference. The architecture features a unified multi-precision datapath supporting 2-bit, 4-bit, and 8-bit operations, leveraging a multiplier-less shift-add model for neuron dynamics and synaptic accumulation. Implemented on an AMD VC707 FPGA, the proposed neuron requires only 459 LUTs and 408 FFs, achieving a critical delay of 0.39 ns and 4.2 mW power. At the system level, L-SPINE achieves 46.37K LUTs, 30.4K FFs, 2.38 ms latency, and 0.54 W power. Compared to CPU and GPU platforms, it reduces inference latency from seconds to milliseconds, achieving an up to three orders-of-magnitude improvement in energy efficiency. Quantisation analysis shows that INT2/INT4 configurations significantly reduce memory footprint with minimal accuracy loss. These results establish L-SPINE as a scalable and efficient solution for real-time edge SNN deployment.

AI.tldr: L-SPINE是一个低精度SIMD脉冲神经网络计算引擎，专为边缘推理设计，支持2/4/8位操作，在FPGA上实现高效部署，相比CPU/GPU实现毫秒级延迟和3个数量级的能效提升。
AI.motivation: 脉冲神经网络（SNNs）在边缘智能中具有能效优势，但硬件部署面临内存开销大、缩放操作效率低和并行性有限等挑战。需要设计专门的计算引擎来解决这些问题。
AI.method: 提出L-SPINE架构，采用统一多精度数据通路支持2/4/8位操作，使用无乘法器的移位-加法模型处理神经元动态和突触累积。在AMD VC707 FPGA上实现，优化了硬件资源利用。
AI.result: 单个神经元仅需459 LUTs和408 FFs，关键延迟0.39 ns，功耗4.2 mW。系统级实现46.37K LUTs，30.4K FFs，延迟2.38 ms，功耗0.54 W。相比CPU/GPU，延迟从秒级降至毫秒级，能效提升3个数量级。
AI.conclusion: L-SPINE通过低精度量化显著减少内存占用且精度损失小，为实时边缘SNN部署提供了可扩展的高效解决方案。

title: UniSurgSAM: A Unified Promptable Model for Reliable Surgical Video Segmentation
comment: Extended version of MICCAI 2025 paper (ReSurgSAM2). 13 pages, 8 figures, 8 tables
summary: Surgical video segmentation is fundamental to computer-assisted surgery. In practice, surgeons need to dynamically specify targets throughout extended procedures, using heterogeneous cues such as visual selections, textual expressions, or audio instructions. However, existing Promptable Video Object Segmentation (PVOS) methods are typically restricted to a single prompt modality and rely on coupled frameworks that cause optimization interference between target initialization and tracking. Moreover, these methods produce hallucinated predictions when the target is absent and suffer from accumulated mask drift without failure recovery. To address these challenges, we present UniSurgSAM, a unified PVOS model enabling reliable surgical video segmentation through visual, textual, or audio prompts. Specifically, UniSurgSAM employs a decoupled two-stage framework that independently optimizes initialization and tracking to resolve the optimization interference. Within this framework, we introduce three key designs for reliability: presence-aware decoding that models target absence to suppress hallucinations; boundary-aware long-term tracking that prevents mask drift over extended sequences; and adaptive state transition that closes the loop between stages for failure recovery. Furthermore, we establish a multi-modal and multi-granular benchmark from four public surgical datasets with precise instance-level masklets. Extensive experiments demonstrate that UniSurgSAM achieves state-of-the-art performance in real time across all prompt modalities and granularities, providing a practical foundation for computer-assisted surgery. Code and datasets will be available at https://jinlab-imvr.github.io/UniSurgSAM.

AI.tldr: UniSurgSAM是一个统一的可提示视频对象分割模型，支持视觉、文本或音频提示，用于手术视频分割。它采用解耦的两阶段框架，解决了优化干扰问题，并通过存在感知解码、边界感知长期跟踪和自适应状态转换提高了可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有可提示视频对象分割方法通常局限于单一提示模态，使用耦合框架导致目标初始化和跟踪之间的优化干扰，且在目标缺失时产生幻觉预测，以及无失败恢复的累积掩码漂移。手术中需要动态指定目标，使用视觉选择、文本表达或音频指令等异构提示。
AI.method: 采用解耦的两阶段框架独立优化初始化和跟踪。关键设计包括：1) 存在感知解码，建模目标缺失以抑制幻觉；2) 边界感知长期跟踪，防止长时间序列中的掩码漂移；3) 自适应状态转换，在阶段间形成闭环以实现失败恢复。从四个公共手术数据集构建多模态多粒度基准。
AI.result: UniSurgSAM在所有提示模态和粒度上实现了实时的最先进性能，为计算机辅助手术提供了实用基础。代码和数据集将公开。
AI.conclusion: UniSurgSAM通过统一的多模态提示能力和解耦的可靠设计，解决了现有手术视频分割方法的局限性，为计算机辅助手术提供了实用的解决方案。

title: Latency-Aware Resource Allocation over Heterogeneous Networks: A Lorentz-Invariant Market Mechanism
summary: We present a telecom-native auction mechanism for allocating bandwidth and time slots across heterogeneous-delay networks, ranging from low-Earth-orbit (LEO) satellite constellations to delay-tolerant deep-space relays. The Lorentz-Invariant Auction (LIA) treats bids as spacetime events and reweights reported values based on the \emph{horizon slack}, a causal quantity derived from the earliest-arrival times relative to a public clearing horizon. Unlike other delay-equalization rules, LIA combines a causal-ordering formulation, a uniquely exponential slack correction implied by a semigroup-style invariance axiom, and a critical-value implementation that ensures truthful reported values once slacks are fixed by trusted infrastructure. We analyze the incentive result in the exogenous-slack regime and separately examine bounded slack-estimation error and endogenous-delay limitations. Under fixed feasible slacks, LIA is individually rational and achieves welfare at least \(e^{-λΔ}\) relative to the optimal feasible allocation, where \(Δ\) is the slack spread. We evaluate LIA on STARLINK-200, INTERNET-100, and DSN-30 across 52,500 baseline instances with market sizes \(n\in\{10,20,30,40,50\}\) and conduct additional robustness sweeps. On Starlink and Internet, LIA maintains near-efficiency while eliminating measured timing rents. However, on DSN, welfare is lower in thin markets but improves with depth. We also distinguish winner-determination time from the background cost of maintaining slack estimates and study robustness beyond independent and identically distributed (iid) noise through error-spread bounds and structured (distance-biased and subnetwork-correlated) noise models. These results suggest that causal-consistent mechanism design offers a practical non-buffering alternative to synchronized delay equalization in heterogeneous telecom infrastructures.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于洛伦兹不变性的电信拍卖机制（LIA），用于异构延迟网络中的带宽和时隙分配，通过因果排序和指数松弛校正实现激励兼容和高效资源分配。
AI.motivation: 异构延迟网络（从低轨卫星到深空中继）中的资源分配面临延迟差异大、同步困难的问题。传统缓冲延迟均衡方法效率低，需要一种因果一致的机制设计来替代。
AI.method: 将出价视为时空事件，基于"地平线松弛"（因果量）重新加权报告价值。结合因果排序公式、半群式不变性公理导出的指数松弛校正，以及关键值实现确保真实报告。
AI.result: 在固定可行松弛下，LIA具有个体理性，相对最优可行分配的福利至少为e^{-λΔ}（Δ为松弛扩展）。在Starlink和Internet上保持近效率并消除时序租金，在DSN上薄市场福利较低但随深度改善。
AI.conclusion: 因果一致的机制设计为异构电信基础设施提供了一种实用的非缓冲替代方案，可有效处理延迟差异，在多种网络场景下表现良好。

title: CavMerge: Merging K-means Based on Local Log-Concavity
summary: K-means clustering, a classic and widely-used clustering technique, is known to exhibit suboptimal performance when applied to non-linearly separable data. Numerous adjustments and modifications have been proposed to address this issue, including methods that merge K-means results from a relatively large K to obtain a final cluster assignment. However, existing methods of this nature often encounter computational inefficiencies and suffer from hyperparameter tuning. Here we present \emph{CavMerge}, a novel K-means merging algorithm that is intuitive, free of parameter tuning, and computationally efficient. Operating under minimal local distributional assumptions, our algorithm demonstrates strong consistency and rapid convergence guarantees. Empirical studies on various simulated and real datasets demonstrate that our method yields more reliable clusters in comparison to current state-of-the-art algorithms.

AI.tldr: 提出CavMerge算法，一种无需参数调优、计算高效的K-means合并方法，用于改善非线性可分数据的聚类效果
AI.motivation: 传统K-means聚类在处理非线性可分数据时性能不佳，现有合并方法存在计算效率低和超参数调优困难的问题
AI.method: CavMerge算法：从较大的K值开始进行K-means聚类，然后通过直观的合并策略将结果合并为最终聚类，无需参数调优
AI.result: 在各种模拟和真实数据集上，CavMerge相比现有最先进算法产生更可靠的聚类结果，具有强一致性和快速收敛保证
AI.conclusion: CavMerge是一种有效解决K-means在非线性可分数据上性能问题的实用算法，具有计算高效、无需调参的优点

title: Real-time Neural Six-way Lightmaps
summary: Participating media are a pervasive and intriguing visual effect in virtual environments. Unfortunately, rendering such phenomena in real-time is notoriously difficult due to the computational expense of estimating the volume rendering equation. While the six-way lightmaps technique has been widely used in video games to render smoke with a camera-oriented billboard and approximate lighting effects using six precomputed lightmaps, achieving a balance between realism and efficiency, it is limited to pre-simulated animation sequences and is ignorant of camera movement. In this work, we propose a neural six-way lightmaps method to strike a long-sought balance between dynamics and visual realism. Our approach first generates a guiding map from the camera view using ray marching with a large sampling distance to approximate smoke scattering and silhouette. Then, given a guiding map, we train a neural network to predict the corresponding six-way lightmaps. The resulting lightmaps can be seamlessly used in existing game engine pipelines. This approach supports visually appealing rendering effects while enabling real-time user interactivity, including smoke-obstacle interaction, camera movement, and light change. By conducting a series of comprehensive benchmarks, we demonstrate that our method is well-suited for real-time applications, such as games and VR/AR.

AI.tldr: 提出神经六向光照图方法，用于实时渲染参与性介质（如烟雾），平衡动态效果与视觉真实感
AI.motivation: 传统六向光照图技术虽然广泛用于游戏中的烟雾渲染，但仅限于预模拟动画序列，无法处理相机移动等动态交互。需要一种既能保持实时性又能支持动态交互的渲染方法。
AI.method: 1. 使用大步长光线步进从相机视角生成引导图，近似烟雾散射和轮廓；2. 基于引导图训练神经网络预测对应的六向光照图；3. 将生成的光照图无缝集成到现有游戏引擎管线中。
AI.result: 方法支持实时用户交互（烟雾-障碍物交互、相机移动、光照变化），在游戏和VR/AR应用中表现出色，通过综合基准测试验证了其实时适用性。
AI.conclusion: 神经六向光照图方法成功解决了传统技术的局限性，在动态交互和视觉真实感之间取得了良好平衡，适用于实时图形应用。

title: Out-of-Air Computation: Enabling Structured Extraction from Wireless Superposition
summary: Over-the-air computation (AirComp) has traditionally been built on the principle of pre-embedding computation into transmitted waveforms or on exploiting massive antenna arrays, often requiring the wireless multiple-access channel (MAC) to operate under conditions that approximate an ideal computational medium. This paper introduces a new computation framework, termed out-of-air computation (AirCPU), which establishes a joint source-channel coding foundation in which computation is not embedded before transmission but is instead extracted from the wireless superposition by exploiting structured coding. AirCPU operates directly on continuous-valued device data, avoiding the need for a separate source quantization stage, and employs a multi-layer nested lattice architecture that enables progressive resolution by decomposing each input into hierarchically scaled components, all transmitted over a common bounded digital constellation under a fixed power constraint. We formalize the notion of decoupled resolution, showing that in operating regimes where the decoding error probability is sufficiently small, the impact of channel noise and finite constellation constraints on distortion becomes negligible, and the resulting computation error is primarily determined by the target resolution set by the finest lattice. For fading MACs, we further introduce collective and successive computation mechanisms, in addition to the proposed direct computation, which exploit multiple decoded integer-coefficient functions and side-information functions as structural representations of the wireless superposition to significantly expand the reliable operating regime; in this context, we formulate and characterize the underlying reliability conditions and integer optimization problems, and develop a structured low-complexity two-group approximation to address them.

AI.tldr: 提出AirCPU框架，通过结构化编码从无线叠加信号中提取计算，而非传统AirComp的预嵌入计算方式，支持连续值数据直接处理和多层嵌套格架构实现渐进分辨率。
AI.motivation: 传统空中计算(AirComp)通常需要预嵌入计算到传输波形或依赖大规模天线阵列，要求无线多址信道近似理想计算媒介。本文旨在建立联合信源信道编码基础，直接从无线叠加信号中提取计算，避免单独量化阶段。
AI.method: 提出AirCPU框架：1) 直接处理连续值设备数据，避免单独量化；2) 采用多层嵌套格架构，将输入分解为分层缩放分量；3) 在固定功率约束下使用有界数字星座传输；4) 针对衰落MAC提出集体计算、逐次计算和直接计算机制。
AI.result: 形式化解耦分辨率概念，证明在解码错误概率足够小的操作机制下，信道噪声和有限星座约束对失真的影响可忽略，计算误差主要由最精细格设定的目标分辨率决定。针对衰落MAC扩展了可靠操作机制。
AI.conclusion: AirCPU为空中计算提供了新的联合信源信道编码基础，通过结构化编码从无线叠加中提取计算，支持连续值数据处理和渐进分辨率，显著扩展了可靠操作机制。

title: Cost-Efficient Multi-Scale Fovea for Semantic-Based Visual Search Attention
comment: The International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN) 2026
summary: Semantics are one of the primary sources of top-down preattentive information. Modern deep object detectors excel at extracting such valuable semantic cues from complex visual scenes. However, the size of the visual input to be processed by these detectors can become a bottleneck, particularly in terms of time costs, affecting an artificial attention system's biological plausibility and real-time deployability. Inspired by classical exponential density roll-off topologies, we apply a new artificial foveation module to our novel attention prediction pipeline: the Semantic-based Bayesian Attention (SemBA) framework. We aim at reducing detection-related computational costs without compromising visual task accuracy, thereby making SemBA more biologically plausible. The proposed multi-scale pyramidal field-of-view retains maximum acuity at an innermost level, around a focal point, while gradually increasing distortion for outer levels to mimic peripheral uncertainty via downsampling. In this work we evaluate the performance of our novel Multi-Scale Fovea, incorporated into \textit{SemBA}, on target-present visual search. We also compare it against other artificial foveal systems, and conduct ablation studies with different deep object detection models to assess the impact of the new topology in terms of computational costs. We experimentally demonstrate that including the new Multi-Scale Fovea module effectively reduces inherent processing costs while improving SemBA's scanpath prediction accuracy. Remarkably, we show that SemBA closely approximates human consistency while retaining the actual human fovea's proportions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SemBA框架，通过多尺度人工中央凹模块减少目标检测的计算成本，同时保持视觉任务准确性，使注意力系统更具生物合理性。
AI.motivation: 现代深度目标检测器在处理复杂视觉场景时，视觉输入的大小可能成为瓶颈，影响计算时间和生物合理性。需要减少检测相关的计算成本而不损害视觉任务准确性。
AI.method: 提出基于语义的贝叶斯注意力（SemBA）框架，包含新的多尺度人工中央凹模块。该模块采用金字塔式视野，在焦点周围保持最高清晰度，外围逐渐增加失真以模拟周边不确定性。
AI.result: 实验表明，多尺度中央凹模块有效降低了处理成本，同时提高了SemBA的扫描路径预测准确性。SemBA能近似人类一致性，并保持实际人类中央凹的比例。
AI.conclusion: SemBA框架通过多尺度人工中央凹实现了计算效率与生物合理性的平衡，为实时部署和生物启发的注意力系统提供了有效解决方案。

title: DC-Ada: Reward-Only Decentralized Observation-Interface Adaptation for Heterogeneous Multi-Robot Teams
summary: Heterogeneity is a defining feature of deployed multi-robot teams: platforms often differ in sensing modalities, ranges, fields of view, and failure patterns. Controllers trained under nominal sensing can degrade sharply when deployed on robots with missing or mismatched sensors, even when the task and action interface are unchanged. We present DC-Ada, a reward-only decentralized adaptation method that keeps a pretrained shared policy frozen and instead adapts compact per-robot observation transforms to map heterogeneous sensing into a fixed inference interface. DC-Ada is gradient-free and communication-minimal: it uses budgeted accept/reject random search with short common-random-number rollouts under a strict step budget. We evaluate DC-Ada against four baselines in a deterministic 2D multi-robot simulator covering warehouse logistics, search and rescue, and collaborative mapping, across four heterogeneity regimes (H0--H3) and five seeds with a matched budget of $200{,}000$ joint environment steps per run. Results show that heterogeneity can substantially degrade a frozen shared policy and that no single mitigation dominates across all tasks and metrics. Observation normalization is strongest for reward robustness in warehouse logistics and competitive in search and rescue, while the frozen shared policy is strongest for reward in collaborative mapping. DC-Ada offers a useful complementary operating point: it improves completion most clearly in severe coverage-based mapping while requiring only scalar team returns and no policy fine-tuning or persistent communication. These results position DC-Ada as a practical deploy-time adaptation method for heterogeneous teams.

AI.tldr: DC-Ada是一种用于异构多机器人团队的奖励驱动去中心化适应方法，通过调整每个机器人的观测变换来适应不同的传感器配置，而无需修改预训练的共享策略。
AI.motivation: 异构多机器人团队中的传感器差异（感知模态、范围、视野、故障模式）会导致在名义传感器配置下训练的控制器在实际部署时性能严重下降。现有方法通常需要重新训练策略或大量通信，不够实用。
AI.method: DC-Ada保持预训练的共享策略冻结，仅调整每个机器人的紧凑观测变换，将异构感知映射到固定的推理接口。采用无梯度、通信最小化的方法：使用预算化接受/拒绝随机搜索，在严格步数预算下进行短公共随机数滚动。
AI.result: 在2D多机器人模拟器中评估了四种异构机制（H0-H3），涵盖仓库物流、搜索救援和协作地图构建任务。结果显示：异构性会显著降低冻结共享策略性能；不同缓解方法在不同任务中表现各异；DC-Ada在严重覆盖式地图构建中改善完成度最明显，仅需标量团队回报，无需策略微调或持续通信。
AI.conclusion: DC-Ada为异构团队提供了一种实用的部署时适应方法，作为现有方法的补充方案，特别适用于需要最小通信和计算开销的场景。

title: Effects of Generative AI Errors on User Reliance Across Task Difficulty
summary: The capabilities of artificial intelligence (AI) lie along a jagged frontier, where AI systems surprisingly fail on tasks that humans find easy and succeed on tasks that humans find hard. To investigate user reactions to this phenomenon, we developed an incentive-compatible experimental methodology based on diagram generation tasks, in which we induce errors in generative AI output and test effects on user reliance. We demonstrate the interface in a preregistered 3x2 experiment (N = 577) with error rates of 10%, 30%, or 50% on easier or harder diagram generation tasks. We confirmed that observing more errors reduces use, but we unexpectedly found that easy-task errors did not significantly reduce use more than hard-task errors, suggesting that people are not averse to jaggedness in this experimental setting. We encourage future work that varies task difficulty at the same time as other features of AI errors, such as whether the jagged error patterns are easily learned.

AI.tldr: 研究用户对AI"锯齿边界"现象的反应：AI在人类觉得简单的任务上失败，在人类觉得难的任务上成功。通过图表生成任务实验，发现更多错误会减少使用，但简单任务错误并不比困难任务错误更显著减少使用。
AI.motivation: AI能力存在"锯齿边界"现象，即AI在人类觉得简单的任务上失败，在人类觉得难的任务上成功。研究用户对这种非直观错误模式的反应，了解错误率如何影响用户对AI系统的依赖。
AI.method: 开发了基于图表生成任务的激励相容实验方法，诱导生成AI输出错误。进行了预注册的3x2实验（N=577），在简单和困难图表生成任务上设置10%、30%或50%的错误率，测试对用户依赖的影响。
AI.result: 观察到更多错误会减少使用，但意外发现简单任务错误并不比困难任务错误更显著减少使用，表明人们在这种实验设置中并不特别反感锯齿边界现象。
AI.conclusion: 用户对AI错误模式的反应可能比预期更复杂，简单任务错误并不一定比困难任务错误更令人反感。建议未来研究同时变化任务难度和AI错误的其他特征，如锯齿错误模式是否容易学习。

title: Minimising Willmore Energy via Neural Flow
summary: The neural Willmore flow of a closed oriented $2$-surface in $\mathbb{R}^3$ is introduced as a natural evolution process to minimise the Willmore energy, which is the squared $L^2$-norm of mean curvature. Neural architectures are used to model maps from topological $2d$ domains to $3d$ Euclidean space, where the learning process minimises a PINN-style loss for the Willmore energy as a functional on the embedding. Training reproduces the expected round sphere for genus $0$ surfaces, and the Clifford torus for genus $1$ surfaces, respectively. Furthermore, the experiment in the genus $2$ case provides a novel approach to search for minimal Willmore surfaces in this open problem.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种神经Willmore流方法，用于最小化二维曲面在三维空间中的Willmore能量（平均曲率的平方L2范数）。使用神经网络架构建模从二维拓扑域到三维欧氏空间的映射，通过PINN风格损失函数进行训练。
AI.motivation: 研究如何通过神经网络方法最小化曲面的Willmore能量，这是一个经典的几何变分问题。传统方法在计算复杂曲面时面临挑战，神经网络提供了一种新的数值求解途径。
AI.method: 使用神经网络架构建模从二维拓扑域到三维欧氏空间的映射函数。采用PINN（物理信息神经网络）风格的损失函数，将Willmore能量作为嵌入泛函进行最小化。通过训练过程实现曲面的演化，使其收敛到Willmore能量最小的形状。
AI.result: 对于亏格0曲面，训练成功再现了预期的球面；对于亏格1曲面，得到了Clifford环面。在亏格2情况下，该方法为寻找最小Willmore曲面这一开放问题提供了新的搜索途径。
AI.conclusion: 神经Willmore流是一种有效的数值方法，能够求解经典几何变分问题。神经网络方法为复杂拓扑结构的最小曲面搜索提供了新的计算框架。

title: BAAI Cardiac Agent: An intelligent multimodal agent for automated reasoning and diagnosis of cardiovascular diseases from cardiac magnetic resonance imaging
summary: Cardiac magnetic resonance (CMR) is a cornerstone for diagnosing cardiovascular disease. However, it remains underutilized due to complex, time-consuming interpretation across multi-sequences, phases, quantitative measures that heavily reliant on specialized expertise. Here, we present BAAI Cardiac Agent, a multimodal intelligent system designed for end-to-end CMR interpretation. The agent integrates specialized cardiac expert models to perform automated segmentation of cardiac structures, functional quantification, tissue characterization and disease diagnosis, and generates structured clinical reports within a unified workflow. Evaluated on CMR datasets from two hospitals (2413 patients) spanning 7-types of major cardiovascular diseases, the agent achieved an area under the receiver-operating-characteristic curve exceeding 0.93 internally and 0.81 externally. In the task of estimating left ventricular function indices, the results generated by this system for core parameters such as ejection fraction, stroke volume, and left ventricular mass are highly consistent with clinical reports, with Pearson correlation coefficients all exceeding 0.90. The agent outperformed state-of-the-art models in segmentation and diagnostic tasks, and generated clinical reports showing high concordance with expert radiologists (six readers across three experience levels). By dynamically orchestrating expert models for coordinated multimodal analysis, this agent framework enables accurate, efficient CMR interpretation and highlights its potentials for complex clinical imaging workflows. Code is available at https://github.com/plantain-herb/Cardiac-Agent.

AI.tldr: BAAI Cardiac Agent是一个用于心脏磁共振（CMR）多模态智能分析系统，通过集成专家模型实现自动分割、功能量化、组织表征和疾病诊断，并生成结构化临床报告。
AI.motivation: 心脏磁共振（CMR）是心血管疾病诊断的关键工具，但由于其多序列、多相位、定量测量的复杂性，解读过程耗时且高度依赖专家经验，导致临床利用率不足。
AI.method: 开发了一个多模态智能系统，通过动态协调多个心脏专家模型，实现端到端的CMR解读。系统集成了专门的心脏专家模型，在统一工作流中执行自动化分割、功能量化、组织表征和疾病诊断，并生成结构化临床报告。
AI.result: 在两个医院的2413名患者数据集上评估，涵盖7种主要心血管疾病，内部AUC超过0.93，外部AUC超过0.81。左心室功能参数（射血分数、每搏输出量、左心室质量）与临床报告高度一致，Pearson相关系数均超过0.90。在分割和诊断任务上优于现有最佳模型，生成的临床报告与不同经验水平的放射科医生高度一致。
AI.conclusion: 通过动态协调专家模型进行协调的多模态分析，该智能代理框架能够实现准确、高效的CMR解读，展示了在复杂临床影像工作流程中的潜力。

title: Hierarchical Semantic Correlation-Aware Masked Autoencoder for Unsupervised Audio-Visual Representation Learning
comment: 6 pages, 2 tables, 4 figures. Accepted by IEEE ICME 2026
summary: Learning aligned multimodal embeddings from weakly paired, label-free corpora is challenging: pipelines often provide only pre-extracted features, clips contain multiple events, and spurious co-occurrences. We propose HSC-MAE (Hierarchical Semantic Correlation-Aware Masked Autoencoder), a dual-path teacher-student framework that enforces semantic consistency across three complementary levels of representation - from coarse to fine: (i) global-level canonical-geometry correlation via DCCA, which aligns audio and visual embeddings within a shared modality-invariant subspace; (ii) local-level neighborhood-semantics correlation via teacher-mined soft top-k affinities, which preserves multi-positive relational structure among semantically similar instances; and (iii) sample-level conditional-sufficiency correlation via masked autoencoding, which ensures individual embeddings retain discriminative semantic content under partial observation. Concretely, a student MAE path is trained with masked feature reconstruction and affinity-weighted soft top-k InfoNCE; an EMA teacher operating on unmasked inputs via the CCA path supplies stable canonical geometry and soft positives. Learnable multi-task weights reconcile competing objectives, and an optional distillation loss transfers teacher geometry into the student. Experiments on AVE and VEGAS demonstrate substantial mAP improvements over strong unsupervised baselines, validating that HSC-MAE yields robust and well-structured audio-visual representations.

AI.tldr: HSC-MAE：一种双路径师生框架，通过三个互补级别的语义一致性学习对齐的多模态嵌入，包括全局级规范几何相关、局部级邻域语义相关和样本级条件充分性相关。
AI.motivation: 从弱配对、无标签语料库中学习对齐的多模态嵌入具有挑战性：现有方法通常只提供预提取特征，视频片段包含多个事件，且存在虚假共现。需要一种能够跨多个语义级别强制一致性的方法。
AI.method: 提出HSC-MAE双路径师生框架：1）学生MAE路径使用掩码特征重建和亲和力加权的soft top-k InfoNCE训练；2）EMA教师通过CCA路径在未掩码输入上提供稳定的规范几何和软正样本；3）三个语义一致性级别：全局级DCCA对齐、局部级教师挖掘的软top-k亲和力、样本级掩码自编码；4）可学习的多任务权重协调竞争目标。
AI.result: 在AVE和VEGAS数据集上的实验显示，相比强无监督基线有显著的mAP提升，验证了HSC-MAE能够产生鲁棒且结构良好的音频-视觉表示。
AI.conclusion: HSC-MAE通过分层语义相关性感知的掩码自编码，有效地从弱配对无标签数据中学习对齐的多模态嵌入，在三个互补的表示级别上强制语义一致性。

title: Adversarial Robustness Analysis of Cloud-Assisted Autonomous Driving Systems
summary: Autonomous vehicles increasingly rely on deep learning-based perception and control, which impose substantial computational demands. Cloud-assisted architectures offload these functions to remote servers, enabling enhanced perception and coordinated decision-making through the Internet of Vehicles (IoV). However, this paradigm introduces cross-layer vulnerabilities, where adversarial manipulation of perception models and network impairments in the vehicle-cloud link can jointly undermine safety-critical autonomy. This paper presents a hardware-in-the-loop IoV testbed that integrates real-time perception, control, and communication to evaluate such vulnerabilities in cloud-assisted autonomous driving. A YOLOv8-based object detector deployed on the cloud is subjected to whitebox adversarial attacks using the Fast Gradient Sign Method (FGSM) and Projected Gradient Descent (PGD), while network adversaries induce delay and packet loss in the vehicle-cloud loop. Results show that adversarial perturbations significantly degrade perception performance, with PGD reducing detection precision and recall from 0.73 and 0.68 in the clean baseline to 0.22 and 0.15 at epsilon= 0.04. Network delays of 150-250 ms, corresponding to transient losses of approximately 3-4 frames, and packet loss rates of 0.5-5 % further destabilize closed-loop control, leading to delayed actuation and rule violations. These findings highlight the need for cross-layer resilience in cloud-assisted autonomous driving systems.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了一个硬件在环的IoV测试平台，评估云辅助自动驾驶系统中感知模型对抗攻击和网络延迟/丢包对系统安全的联合影响。
AI.motivation: 云辅助自动驾驶架构将感知和控制功能卸载到远程服务器，但引入了跨层安全漏洞：感知模型的对抗攻击与车辆-云链路的网络损伤可能共同破坏安全关键系统。
AI.method: 构建硬件在环IoV测试平台，集成实时感知、控制和通信。在云端部署YOLOv8目标检测器，使用FGSM和PGD进行白盒对抗攻击，同时在车辆-云环路中注入网络延迟和丢包。
AI.result: 对抗扰动显著降低感知性能：PGD攻击在epsilon=0.04时，将检测精度和召回率从基线0.73/0.68降至0.22/0.15。150-250ms网络延迟（约3-4帧丢失）和0.5-5%丢包率进一步破坏闭环控制，导致执行延迟和规则违反。
AI.conclusion: 云辅助自动驾驶系统需要跨层弹性设计，以应对感知模型对抗攻击和网络损伤的联合威胁。

title: OmniSonic: Towards Universal and Holistic Audio Generation from Video and Text
summary: In this paper, we propose Universal Holistic Audio Generation (UniHAGen), a task for synthesizing comprehensive auditory scenes that include both on-screen and off-screen sounds across diverse domains (e.g., ambient events, musical instruments, and human speech). Prior video-conditioned audio generation models typically focus on producing on-screen environmental sounds that correspond to visible sounding events, neglecting off-screen auditory events. While recent holistic joint text-video-to-audio generation models aim to produce auditory scenes with both on- and off-screen sound but they are limited to non-speech sounds, lacking the ability to generate or integrate human speech. To overcome these limitations, we introduce OmniSonic, a flow-matching-based diffusion framework jointly conditioned on video and text. It features a TriAttn-DiT architecture that performs three cross-attention operations to process on-screen environmental sound, off-screen environmental sound, and speech conditions simultaneously, with a Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) gating mechanism that adaptively balances their contributions during generation. Furthermore, we construct UniHAGen-Bench, a new benchmark with over one thousand samples covering three representative on/off-screen speech-environment scenarios. Extensive experiments show that OmniSonic consistently outperforms state-of-the-art approaches on both objective metrics and human evaluations, establishing a strong baseline for universal and holistic audio generation. Project page: https://weiguopian.github.io/OmniSonic_webpage/

AI.tldr: 提出了UniHAGen任务和OmniSonic框架，用于生成包含屏幕内外声音（环境音、音乐、人声）的完整听觉场景，解决了现有模型只能生成屏幕内环境音或无法处理人声的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有视频条件音频生成模型通常只关注屏幕内可见声音事件的环境音，忽略了屏幕外声音。最近的联合文本-视频到音频生成模型虽然尝试生成包含屏幕内外声音的听觉场景，但仅限于非语音声音，无法生成或整合人声。需要一种能够同时处理屏幕内外环境音和人声的通用音频生成方法。
AI.method: 提出了OmniSonic框架，基于流匹配扩散模型，联合以视频和文本为条件。采用TriAttn-DiT架构，通过三个交叉注意力操作同时处理屏幕内环境音、屏幕外环境音和语音条件，并使用混合专家门控机制自适应平衡它们在生成过程中的贡献。还构建了UniHAGen-Bench基准数据集。
AI.result: 在客观指标和人工评估中，OmniSonic始终优于最先进的方法，为通用和整体音频生成建立了强大的基线。
AI.conclusion: OmniSonic通过创新的TriAttn-DiT架构和MoE门控机制，成功实现了包含屏幕内外环境音和人声的完整听觉场景生成，为通用音频生成任务提供了有效解决方案。

title: NAIMA: Semantics Aware RGB Guided Depth Super-Resolution
summary: Guided depth super-resolution (GDSR) is a multi-modal approach for depth map super-resolution that relies on a low-resolution depth map and a high-resolution RGB image to restore finer structural details. However, the misleading color and texture cues indicating depth discontinuities in RGB images often lead to artifacts and blurred depth boundaries in the generated depth map. We propose a solution that introduces global contextual semantic priors, generated from pretrained vision transformer token embeddings. Our approach to distilling semantic knowledge from pretrained token embeddings is motivated by their demonstrated effectiveness in related monocular depth estimation tasks. We introduce a Guided Token Attention (GTA) module, which iteratively aligns encoded RGB spatial features with depth encodings, using cross-attention for selectively injecting global semantic context extracted from different layers of a pretrained vision transformer. Additionally, we present an architecture called Neural Attention for Implicit Multi-token Alignment (NAIMA), which integrates DINOv2 with GTA blocks for a semantics-aware GDSR. Our proposed architecture, with its ability to distill semantic knowledge, achieves significant improvements over existing methods across multiple scaling factors and datasets.

AI.tldr: 提出NAIMA架构，通过预训练视觉Transformer的token嵌入提取全局语义先验，结合GTA模块对齐RGB和深度特征，用于引导深度超分辨率任务。
AI.motivation: 传统引导深度超分辨率方法中，RGB图像的误导性颜色和纹理线索会导致深度图产生伪影和模糊边界。需要引入全局语义先验来改善深度边界恢复。
AI.method: 提出GTA模块迭代对齐RGB空间特征与深度编码，使用交叉注意力从预训练视觉Transformer不同层选择性注入全局语义上下文。构建NAIMA架构，集成DINOv2与GTA块实现语义感知的GDSR。
AI.result: 在多个缩放因子和数据集上显著优于现有方法，能够有效提取语义知识并改善深度超分辨率质量。
AI.conclusion: 通过从预训练视觉Transformer token嵌入中提取全局语义先验，可以有效解决RGB图像误导线索问题，提升引导深度超分辨率性能。

title: Symbolic-Vector Attention Fusion for Collective Intelligence
summary: When autonomous agents observe different domains of a shared environment, each signal they exchange mixes relevant and irrelevant dimensions. No existing mechanism lets the receiver evaluate which dimensions to absorb. We introduce Symbolic-Vector Attention Fusion (SVAF), the content-evaluation half of a two-level coupling engine for collective intelligence. SVAF decomposes each inter-agent signal into 7 typed semantic fields, evaluates each through a learned fusion gate, and produces a remix -- new knowledge from the intersection of two domains. A band-pass model yields four outcomes (redundant, aligned, guarded, rejected), solving both selectivity and redundancy. The fusion gate independently discovers a cross-domain relevance hierarchy: mood emerges as the highest-weight field by epoch 1, before accuracy plateaus -- consistent with independent mechanistic evidence that LLM emotion representations are structurally embedded along valence-arousal axes. SVAF forms Layer 4 of the Mesh Memory Protocol (MMP); the other half of the coupling engine is a per-agent Closed-form Continuous-time (CfC) neural network at Layer 6, whose learned per-neuron time constants (tau) create the temporal dynamics from which collective intelligence emerges: fast neurons synchronise affect across agents in seconds, while slow neurons preserve domain expertise indefinitely. SVAF determines what enters each agent's cognitive state; CfC determines how that state evolves. Trained on 237K samples from 273 narrative scenarios, SVAF achieves 78.7% three-class accuracy. We verify the complete mesh cognition loop -- from per-field evaluation through remix, CfC state evolution, tau-modulated peer blending, and autonomous action -- in a live deployment with 7 nodes across macOS, iOS, and web.

AI.tldr: SVAF是一种用于多智能体集体智能的两级耦合机制，通过符号-向量注意力融合实现跨领域信号的选择性吸收，结合CfC神经网络创建时间动态，形成完整的网格认知循环。
AI.motivation: 当自主智能体观察共享环境的不同领域时，它们交换的信号混合了相关和无关维度。现有机制无法让接收方评估应该吸收哪些维度，需要一种能够选择性吸收跨领域信号的新机制。
AI.method: 提出符号-向量注意力融合(SVAF)，将智能体间信号分解为7个类型化语义字段，通过学习融合门评估每个字段，产生重新混合的新知识。结合封闭形式连续时间(CfC)神经网络，通过学习的神经元时间常数创建时间动态。
AI.result: 在273个叙事场景的237K样本上训练，SVAF达到78.7%的三分类准确率。验证了完整的网格认知循环，包括从逐字段评估到重新混合、CfC状态演化、tau调制对等混合和自主行动。
AI.conclusion: SVAF和CfC共同构成了集体智能的两级耦合引擎，解决了跨领域信号的选择性和冗余问题，为多智能体系统提供了可解释的认知架构。

title: TM-BSN: Triangular-Masked Blind-Spot Network for Real-World Self-Supervised Image Denoising
summary: Blind-spot networks (BSNs) enable self-supervised image denoising by preventing access to the target pixel, allowing clean signal estimation without ground-truth supervision. However, this approach assumes pixel-wise noise independence, which is violated in real-world sRGB images due to spatially correlated noise from the camera's image signal processing (ISP) pipeline. While several methods employ downsampling to decorrelate noise, they alter noise statistics and limit the network's ability to utilize full contextual information. In this paper, we propose the Triangular-Masked Blind-Spot Network (TM-BSN), a novel blind-spot architecture that accurately models the spatial correlation of real sRGB noise. This correlation originates from demosaicing, where each pixel is reconstructed from neighboring samples with spatially decaying weights, resulting in a diamond-shaped pattern. To align the receptive field with this geometry, we introduce a triangular-masked convolution that restricts the kernel to its upper-triangular region, creating a diamond-shaped blind spot at the original resolution. This design excludes correlated pixels while fully leveraging uncorrelated context, eliminating the need for downsampling or post-processing. Furthermore, we use knowledge distillation to transfer complementary knowledge from multiple blind-spot predictions into a lightweight U-Net, improving both accuracy and efficiency. Extensive experiments on real-world benchmarks demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance, significantly outperforming existing self-supervised approaches. Our code is available at https://github.com/parkjun210/TM-BSN.

AI.tldr: TM-BSN是一种新型盲点网络，通过三角形掩码卷积准确建模真实sRGB噪声的空间相关性，无需下采样即可实现自监督图像去噪，并在真实世界基准测试中达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 传统盲点网络假设像素噪声独立，但真实sRGB图像由于相机ISP处理（特别是去马赛克）会产生空间相关噪声，现有方法使用下采样会改变噪声统计特性并限制上下文信息利用。
AI.method: 提出三角形掩码盲点网络（TM-BSN），使用三角形掩码卷积将核限制在上三角区域，形成钻石形盲点，与去马赛克产生的噪声相关性几何模式对齐；同时使用知识蒸馏将多个盲点预测的互补知识转移到轻量级U-Net中。
AI.result: 在真实世界基准测试中，TM-BSN显著优于现有自监督方法，达到最先进的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: TM-BSN通过准确建模真实sRGB噪声的空间相关性，无需下采样即可有效实现自监督图像去噪，为真实世界图像去噪提供了更优解决方案。

title: TraceGuard: Structured Multi-Dimensional Monitoring as a Collusion-Resistant Control Protocol
summary: AI control protocols use monitors to detect attacks by untrusted AI agents, but standard single-score monitors face two limitations: they miss subtle attacks where outputs look clean but reasoning is off, and they collapse to near-zero safety when the monitor is the same model as the agent (collusion). We present TraceGuard, a structured multi-dimensional monitoring protocol that evaluates agent actions across five dimensions -- goal alignment, constraint adherence, reasoning coherence, safety awareness, and action-trace consistency -- scored in parallel by independent LLM calls, augmented by seven heuristic detectors and an LLM-based intent analyzer. We evaluate on BashArena (637 bash tasks, 4 attack categories) within the ControlArena framework. Our results on 519 samples (279 honest, 240 attack) show that: (1) the hybrid approach achieves clear attack-honest separation (attack mean 0.616 vs. honest mean 0.206, Delta=0.410); (2) structured scoring constrains collusion -- the untrusted structured monitor achieves 95% safety vs. 0% for single-score untrusted monitoring; (3) goal alignment and constraint adherence are the most discriminative dimensions; and (4) a separation-of-duties variant splitting dimensions across trusted and untrusted models achieves 100% safety while preventing any single model from seeing the full evaluation. TraceGuard is implemented as a new monitor type for the open-source ControlArena framework.

AI.tldr: TraceGuard提出结构化多维监控协议，通过五个维度的并行评估、七个启发式检测器和LLM意图分析器，解决AI控制中单分数监控的局限性，显著提升攻击检测和防共谋能力。
AI.motivation: 传统AI控制协议使用单分数监控器检测不可信AI代理的攻击，但面临两个主要问题：1) 无法检测输出看似正常但推理有问题的微妙攻击；2) 当监控器与代理为同一模型时，安全性会崩溃到接近零（共谋问题）。需要更强大的监控机制来应对这些挑战。
AI.method: 提出TraceGuard结构化多维监控协议，通过五个维度并行评估代理行为：目标对齐、约束遵守、推理一致性、安全意识、行动轨迹一致性。使用独立的LLM调用进行评分，并辅以七个启发式检测器和基于LLM的意图分析器。在ControlArena框架内的BashArena（637个bash任务，4种攻击类别）上进行评估。
AI.result: 在519个样本（279个诚实，240个攻击）上的结果显示：1) 混合方法实现清晰的攻击-诚实分离（攻击均值0.616 vs 诚实均值0.206，Delta=0.410）；2) 结构化评分约束共谋——不可信结构化监控器达到95%安全性，而单分数不可信监控为0%；3) 目标对齐和约束遵守是最具区分性的维度；4) 职责分离变体在可信和不可信模型间分割维度，实现100%安全性，同时防止任何单个模型看到完整评估。
AI.conclusion: TraceGuard通过结构化多维监控有效解决了AI控制中的微妙攻击检测和共谋问题，显著提升了监控安全性，并已作为新型监控器集成到开源的ControlArena框架中。

title: ReinVBC: A Model-based Reinforcement Learning Approach to Vehicle Braking Controller
summary: Braking system, the key module to ensure the safety and steer-ability of current vehicles, relies on extensive manual calibration during production. Reducing labor and time consumption while maintaining the Vehicle Braking Controller (VBC) performance greatly benefits the vehicle industry. Model-based methods in offline reinforcement learning, which facilitate policy exploration within a data-driven dynamics model, offer a promising solution for addressing real-world control tasks. This work proposes ReinVBC, which applies an offline model-based reinforcement learning approach to deal with the vehicle braking control problem. We introduce useful engineering designs into the paradigm of model learning and utilization to obtain a reliable vehicle dynamics model and a capable braking policy. Several results demonstrate the capability of our method in real-world vehicle braking and its potential to replace the production-grade anti-lock braking system.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出ReinVBC方法，使用基于模型的离线强化学习解决车辆制动控制问题，通过工程化设计获得可靠的车辆动力学模型和制动策略，展示了替代生产级防抱死制动系统的潜力。
AI.motivation: 车辆制动系统作为确保安全性和操控性的关键模块，在生产过程中需要大量人工校准。减少人工和时间消耗同时保持车辆制动控制器性能，对汽车行业有重要意义。
AI.method: 提出ReinVBC方法，采用基于模型的离线强化学习框架。在模型学习和利用范式中引入工程化设计，以获得可靠的车辆动力学模型和有效的制动策略。
AI.result: 多个结果表明该方法在真实世界车辆制动中具有良好能力，并显示出替代生产级防抱死制动系统的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 基于模型的离线强化学习为实际控制任务提供了有前景的解决方案，ReinVBC方法在车辆制动控制问题上展现了实用价值。

title: G-EDF-Loc: 3D Continuous Gaussian Distance Field for Robust Gradient-Based 6DoF Localization
summary: This paper presents a robust 6-DoF localization framework based on a direct, CPU-based scan-to-map registration pipeline. The system leverages G-EDF, a novel continuous and memory-efficient 3D distance field representation. The approach models the Euclidean Distance Field (EDF) using a Block-Sparse Gaussian Mixture Model with adaptive spatial partitioning, ensuring $C^1$ continuity across block transitions and mitigating boundary artifacts. By leveraging the analytical gradients of this continuous map, which maintain Eikonal consistency, the proposed method achieves high-fidelity spatial reconstruction and real-time localization. Experimental results on large-scale datasets demonstrate that G-EDF-Loc performs competitively against state-of-the-art methods, exhibiting exceptional resilience even under severe odometry degradation or in the complete absence of IMU priors.

AI.tldr: 提出基于G-EDF（连续内存高效3D距离场表示）的6-DoF定位框架，通过块稀疏高斯混合模型实现连续距离场表示，支持实时定位并具有强鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有6-DoF定位方法在里程计退化或缺乏IMU先验时性能下降，需要一种鲁棒的定位框架，能够在恶劣条件下保持稳定性能，同时实现实时计算。
AI.method: 采用基于CPU的直接扫描到地图配准流水线，提出G-EDF连续距离场表示，使用块稀疏高斯混合模型建模欧几里得距离场，通过自适应空间分区确保C¹连续性，利用解析梯度实现高保真空间重建。
AI.result: 在大规模数据集上，G-EDF-Loc与最先进方法竞争性相当，在严重里程计退化或完全缺乏IMU先验条件下表现出卓越的鲁棒性，实现实时定位。
AI.conclusion: G-EDF-Loc框架通过连续距离场表示和解析梯度利用，实现了鲁棒高效的6-DoF定位，在恶劣条件下仍能保持稳定性能。

title: Visual Prompt Based Reasoning for Offroad Mapping using Multimodal LLMs
summary: Traditional approaches to off-road autonomy rely on separate models for terrain classification, height estimation, and quantifying slip or slope conditions. Utilizing several models requires training each component separately, having task specific datasets, and fine-tuning. In this work, we present a zero-shot approach leveraging SAM2 for environment segmentation and a vision-language model (VLM) to reason about drivable areas. Our approach involves passing to the VLM both the original image and the segmented image annotated with numeric labels for each mask. The VLM is then prompted to identify which regions, represented by these numeric labels, are drivable. Combined with planning and control modules, this unified framework eliminates the need for explicit terrain-specific models and relies instead on the inherent reasoning capabilities of the VLM. Our approach surpasses state-of-the-art trainable models on high resolution segmentation datasets and enables full stack navigation in our Isaac Sim offroad environment.

AI.tldr: 提出一种零样本的越野自动驾驶方法，利用SAM2进行环境分割和视觉语言模型（VLM）推理可行驶区域，无需单独训练地形分类、高度估计等专门模型
AI.motivation: 传统越野自动驾驶方法需要分别训练地形分类、高度估计、滑移/坡度量化等多个专门模型，这需要单独训练每个组件、特定任务的数据集和微调，过程复杂且效率低
AI.method: 1) 使用SAM2进行环境分割；2) 将原始图像和带有数字标签标注的分割图像输入VLM；3) 通过提示让VLM识别哪些数字标签对应的区域是可行驶的；4) 结合规划和控制模块形成统一框架
AI.result: 在高分辨率分割数据集上超越了最先进的可训练模型，并在Isaac Sim越野环境中实现了完整的堆栈导航
AI.conclusion: 该方法利用VLM的固有推理能力，无需显式的地形特定模型，为零样本越野自动驾驶提供了统一框架

title: Eliminating Vendor Lock-In in Quantum Machine Learning via Framework-Agnostic Neural Networks
summary: Quantum machine learning (QML) stands at the intersection of quantum computing and artificial intelligence, offering the potential to solve problems that remain intractable for classical methods. However, the current landscape of QML software frameworks suffers from severe fragmentation: models developed in TensorFlow Quantum cannot execute on PennyLane backends, circuits authored in Qiskit Machine Learning cannot be deployed to Amazon Braket hardware, and researchers who invest in one ecosystem face prohibitive switching costs when migrating to another. This vendor lock-in impedes reproducibility, limits hardware access, and slows the pace of scientific discovery. In this paper, we present a framework-agnostic quantum neural network (QNN) architecture that abstracts away vendor-specific interfaces through a unified computational graph, a hardware abstraction layer (HAL), and a multi-framework export pipeline. The core architecture supports simultaneous integration with TensorFlow, PyTorch, and JAX as classical co-processors, while the HAL provides transparent access to IBM Quantum, Amazon Braket, Azure Quantum, IonQ, and Rigetti backends through a single application programming interface (API). We introduce three pluggable data encoding strategies (amplitude, angle, and instantaneous quantum polynomial encoding) that are compatible with all supported backends. An export module leveraging Open Neural Network Exchange (ONNX) metadata enables lossless circuit translation across Qiskit, Cirq, PennyLane, and Braket representations. We benchmark our framework on the Iris, Wine, and MNIST-4 classification tasks, demonstrating training time parity (within 8\% overhead) compared to native framework implementations, while achieving identical classification accuracy.

AI.tldr: 提出一个框架无关的量子神经网络架构，通过统一计算图、硬件抽象层和多框架导出管道，解决当前量子机器学习软件框架碎片化和供应商锁定的问题。
AI.motivation: 当前量子机器学习软件框架严重碎片化，不同框架（如TensorFlow Quantum、Qiskit Machine Learning、PennyLane）之间互不兼容，导致供应商锁定、阻碍可重复性、限制硬件访问并减缓科学发现速度。
AI.method: 1) 统一计算图抽象供应商特定接口；2) 硬件抽象层提供单一API访问多种量子后端（IBM Quantum、Amazon Braket等）；3) 多框架导出管道支持TensorFlow、PyTorch、JAX作为经典协处理器；4) 引入三种可插拔数据编码策略；5) 利用ONNX元数据实现无损电路转换。
AI.result: 在Iris、Wine和MNIST-4分类任务上基准测试显示：训练时间与原生框架实现相比仅有8%的开销，同时达到相同的分类准确率。
AI.conclusion: 该框架无关的QNN架构成功解决了量子机器学习中的框架碎片化问题，实现了跨框架和硬件的互操作性，为量子机器学习研究提供了统一的基础设施。

title: LP-GEMM: Integrating Layout Propagation into GEMM Operations
summary:
In Scientific Computing and modern Machine Learning (ML) workloads, sequences of dependent General Matrix Multiplications (GEMMs) often dominate execution time. While state-of-the-art BLAS libraries aggressively optimize individual GEMM calls, they remain constrained by the BLAS API, which requires each call to independently pack input matrices and restore outputs to a canonical memory layout. In sequential GEMMs, these constraints cause redundant packing and unpacking, wasting valuable computational resources.
  This paper introduces LP-GEMM, a decomposition of the GEMM kernel that enables packing-layout propagation across sequential GEMM operations. This approach eliminates unnecessary data repacking while preserving full BLAS semantic correctness at the boundaries. We evaluate LP-GEMM on x86 (AVX-512) and RISC-V (RVV 1.0) architectures across MLP-like and Attention-like workloads. Our results show average speedups of 2.25x over OpenBLAS on Intel x86 for sequential GEMMs and competitive gains relative to vendor-optimized libraries such as Intel MKL.
  We demonstrate the practicality of the approach beyond microbenchmarks by implementing a standalone C++ version of the Llama-3.2 inference path using exclusively BLAS-level GEMM calls. These results confirm that leveraging data layout propagation between operations can significantly boost performance.

AI.tldr: LP-GEMM提出了一种GEMM核分解方法，通过跨序列GEMM操作的打包布局传播消除冗余数据重打包，在x86和RISC-V架构上实现显著加速
AI.motivation: 科学计算和现代机器学习中，依赖的GEMM序列常占主导执行时间。现有BLAS库受API限制，每个GEMM调用需独立打包输入矩阵并恢复输出到规范内存布局，导致序列GEMM中冗余打包/解包，浪费计算资源
AI.method: 引入LP-GEMM（Layout-Propagating GEMM），分解GEMM核以支持跨序列GEMM操作的打包布局传播，消除不必要的数据重打包，同时在边界保持完整的BLAS语义正确性
AI.result: 在x86（AVX-512）和RISC-V（RVV 1.0）架构上评估MLP-like和Attention-like工作负载，相比OpenBLAS平均加速2.25倍，与Intel MKL等供应商优化库相比也有竞争力。用纯BLAS级GEMM调用实现Llama-3.2推理路径，验证了实际应用价值
AI.conclusion: 利用操作间的数据布局传播可显著提升性能，LP-GEMM方法在保持BLAS兼容性的同时解决了序列GEMM中的冗余打包问题

title: Causality Laundering: Denial-Feedback Leakage in Tool-Calling LLM Agents
summary: Tool-calling LLM agents can read private data, invoke external services, and trigger real-world actions, creating a security problem at the point of tool execution. We identify a denial-feedback leakage pattern, which we term causality laundering, in which an adversary probes a protected action, learns from the denial outcome, and exfiltrates the inferred information through a later seemingly benign tool call. This attack is not captured by flat provenance tracking alone because the leaked information arises from causal influence of the denied action, not direct data flow. We present the Agentic Reference Monitor (ARM), a runtime enforcement layer that mediates every tool invocation by consulting a provenance graph over tool calls, returned data, field-level provenance, and denied actions. ARM propagates trust through an integrity lattice and augments the graph with counterfactual edges from denied-action nodes, enabling enforcement over both transitive data dependencies and denial-induced causal influence. In a controlled evaluation on three representative attack scenarios, ARM blocks causality laundering, transitive taint propagation, and mixed-provenance field misuse that a flat provenance baseline misses, while adding sub-millisecond policy evaluation overhead. These results suggest that denial-aware causal provenance is a useful abstraction for securing tool-calling agent systems.

AI.tldr: 论文提出ARM系统，通过因果溯源图防止工具调用LLM代理中的因果关系泄露攻击，相比传统溯源方法能更好地保护敏感数据。
AI.motivation: 工具调用LLM代理在执行工具时可能泄露敏感数据，存在安全风险。现有基于数据流溯源的防护方法无法捕捉"因果关系清洗"攻击模式，即攻击者通过被拒绝的操作推断信息并通过后续看似良性的工具调用泄露。
AI.method: 提出Agentic Reference Monitor (ARM)运行时执行层，构建包含工具调用、返回数据、字段级溯源和被拒绝操作的溯源图。通过完整性格传播信任，并在图中添加被拒绝操作的"反事实边"来捕捉因果关系。
AI.result: 在三个代表性攻击场景的评估中，ARM成功阻止了因果关系清洗、传递性污点传播和混合溯源字段滥用，而传统平面溯源方法无法检测。系统仅增加亚毫秒级的策略评估开销。
AI.conclusion: 基于拒绝感知的因果溯源是保护工具调用代理系统的有效抽象方法，能够同时处理直接数据依赖和拒绝操作引起的因果影响。

title: Explainable Autonomous Cyber Defense using Adversarial Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
summary: Autonomous agents are increasingly deployed in both offensive and defensive cyber operations, creating high-speed, closed-loop interactions in critical infrastructure environments. Advanced Persistent Threat (APT) actors exploit "Living off the Land" techniques and targeted telemetry perturbations to induce ambiguity in monitoring systems, causing automated defenses to overreact or misclassify benign behavior as malicious activity. Existing monolithic and multi-agent defense pipelines largely operate on correlation-based signals, lack structural constraints on response actions, and are vulnerable to reasoning drift under ambiguous or adversarial inputs. We present the Causal Multi-Agent Decision Framework (C-MADF), a structurally constrained architecture for autonomous cyber defense that integrates causal modeling with adversarial dual-policy control. C-MADF first learns a Structural Causal Model (SCM) from historical telemetry and compiles it into an investigation-level Directed Acyclic Graph (DAG) that defines admissible response transitions. This roadmap is formalized as a Markov Decision Process (MDP) whose action space is explicitly restricted to causally consistent transitions. Decision-making within this constrained space is performed by a dual-agent reinforcement learning system in which a threat-optimizing Blue-Team policy is counterbalanced by a conservatively shaped Red-Team policy. Inter-policy disagreement is quantified through a Policy Divergence Score and exposed via a human-in-the-loop interface equipped with an Explainability-Transparency Score that serves as an escalation signal under uncertainty. On the real-world CICIoT2023 dataset, C-MADF reduces the false-positive rate from 11.2%, 9.7%, and 8.4% in three cutting-edge literature baselines to 1.8%, while achieving 0.997 precision, 0.961 recall, and 0.979 F1-score.

AI.tldr: C-MADF是一个用于自主网络防御的因果多智能体决策框架，通过结构因果模型约束响应行动，结合对抗性双策略强化学习，在真实网络数据集上显著降低误报率并实现高性能检测。
AI.motivation: 当前自主网络防御系统存在三个主要问题：1）基于相关性信号而非因果推理，2）缺乏对响应行动的结构约束，3）在模糊或对抗性输入下容易产生推理漂移。APT攻击者利用"Living off the Land"技术和遥测扰动制造模糊性，导致自动化防御系统过度反应或误分类良性行为。
AI.method: C-MADF框架包含三个核心组件：1）从历史遥测数据学习结构因果模型（SCM）并编译为调查级有向无环图（DAG），定义可接受的响应转换；2）将DAG形式化为马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），其动作空间被限制在因果一致的转换内；3）采用双智能体强化学习系统，其中威胁优化的蓝队策略与保守塑造的红队策略相互制衡，通过策略分歧分数和可解释性-透明度分数实现人机交互。
AI.result: 在CICIoT2023真实数据集上，C-MADF将误报率从三个最先进基线的11.2%、9.7%和8.4%降低到1.8%，同时达到0.997精确率、0.961召回率和0.979 F1分数。
AI.conclusion: C-MADF通过因果建模和结构约束有效解决了自主网络防御中的推理漂移问题，结合对抗性双策略强化学习和人机交互机制，在保持高性能检测的同时显著降低了误报率。

title: Generative modeling of granular flow on inclined planes using conditional flow matching
summary: Granular flows govern many natural and industrial processes, yet their interior kinematics and mechanics remain largely unobservable, as experiments access only boundaries or free surfaces. Conventional numerical simulations are computationally expensive for fast inverse reconstruction, and deterministic models tend to collapse to over-smoothed mean predictions in ill-posed settings. This study, to the best of the authors' knowledge, presents the first conditional flow matching (CFM) framework for granular-flow reconstruction from sparse boundary observations. Trained on high-fidelity particle-resolved discrete element simulations, the generative model is guided at inference by a differentiable forward operator with a sparsity-aware gradient guidance mechanism, which enforces measurement consistency without hyperparameter tuning and prevents unphysical velocity predictions in non-material regions. A physics decoder maps the reconstructed velocity fields to stress states and energy fluctuation quantities, including mean stress, deviatoric stress, and granular temperature. The framework accurately recovers interior flow fields from full observation to only 16% of the informative window, and it remains effective under strongly diluted spatial resolution with only 11% of data. It also outperforms a deterministic CNN baseline in the most ill-posed reconstruction regime and provides spatially resolved uncertainty estimates through ensemble generation. These results demonstrate that conditional generative modeling offers a practical route for non-invasive inference of hidden bulk mechanics in granular media, with broader applicability for inverse problems in particulate and multiphase systems.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了首个基于条件流匹配（CFM）的框架，用于从稀疏边界观测重建颗粒流，通过生成模型和可微分前向算子实现非侵入式内部力学推断。
AI.motivation: 颗粒流在自然和工业过程中广泛存在，但其内部运动学和力学难以直接观测。传统数值模拟计算成本高，确定性模型在不适定问题中容易过度平滑。需要一种能够从稀疏边界观测准确重建内部流场的方法。
AI.method: 提出条件流匹配（CFM）框架：1）在高保真粒子离散元模拟上训练生成模型；2）推理时使用可微分前向算子，具有稀疏感知梯度引导机制，无需超参数调优；3）物理解码器将重建速度场映射到应力状态和能量波动量。
AI.result: 框架能够从完整观测到仅16%信息窗口准确恢复内部流场，在仅11%数据的情况下仍保持有效。在最不适定的重建情况下优于确定性CNN基线，并通过集成生成提供空间分辨的不确定性估计。
AI.conclusion: 条件生成建模为颗粒介质中隐藏体力学非侵入式推断提供了实用途径，对颗粒和多相系统中的反问题具有更广泛的适用性。

title: Unsharp Measurement with Adaptive Gaussian POVMs for Quantum-Inspired Image Processing
summary: We propose a quantum measurement-based framework for probabilistic transformation of grayscale images using adaptive positive operator-valued measures (POVMs). In contrast, to existing approaches that are largely centered around segmentation or thresholding, the transformation is formulated here as a measurement-induced process acting directly on pixel intensities. The intensity values are embedded in a finite-dimensional Hilbert space, which allows the construction of data-adaptive measurement operators derived from Gaussian models of the image histogram. These operators naturally define an unsharp measurement of the intensity observable, with the reconstructed image obtained through expectation values of the measurement outcomes. To control the degree of measurement localization, we introduce a nonlinear sharpening transformation with a sharpening parameter, $γ$, that induces a continuous transition from unsharp measurements to projective measurements. This transition reflects an inherent trade-off between probabilistic smoothing and localization of intensity structures. In addition to the nonlinear sharpening parameter, we introduce another parameter $k$ (number of gaussian centers) which controls the resolution of the image during the transformation. Experimental results on standard benchmark images show that the proposed method gives effective data-adaptive transformations while preserving structural information.

AI.tldr: 提出基于量子测量的概率性灰度图像变换框架，使用自适应POVM直接作用于像素强度，通过高斯模型构建测量算子，引入锐化参数γ控制测量定位程度，参数k控制变换分辨率。
AI.motivation: 现有图像处理方法主要集中于分割或阈值化，本文提出一种基于量子测量的新框架，将图像变换视为测量诱导的过程，直接在像素强度上操作，实现数据自适应的概率性变换。
AI.method: 将强度值嵌入有限维希尔伯特空间，基于图像直方图的高斯模型构建数据自适应测量算子，定义强度可观测量的非尖锐测量，通过测量结果的期望值重建图像，引入锐化参数γ控制从非尖锐测量到投影测量的连续过渡。
AI.result: 在标准基准图像上的实验结果表明，该方法能有效实现数据自适应变换，同时保持结构信息，通过参数γ和k可灵活控制变换效果。
AI.conclusion: 提出的量子测量框架为图像处理提供了新的概率性方法，通过测量定位与平滑的权衡实现灵活的图像变换，具有理论新颖性和实用价值。

title: CoopGuard: Stateful Cooperative Agents Safeguarding LLMs Against Evolving Multi-Round Attacks
summary: As Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in complex applications, their vulnerability to adversarial attacks raises urgent safety concerns, especially those evolving over multi-round interactions. Existing defenses are largely reactive and struggle to adapt as adversaries refine strategies across rounds. In this work, we propose CoopGuard , a stateful multi-round LLM defense framework based on cooperative agents that maintains and updates an internal defense state to counter evolving attacks. It employs three specialized agents (Deferring Agent, Tempting Agent, and Forensic Agent) for complementary round-level strategies, coordinated by System Agent, which conditions decisions on the evolving defense state (interaction history) and orchestrates agents over time. To evaluate evolving threats, we introduce the EMRA benchmark with 5,200 adversarial samples across 8 attack types, simulating progressively LLM multi-round attacks. Experiments show that CoopGuard reduces attack success rate by 78.9% over state-of-the-art defenses, while improving deceptive rate by 186% and reducing attack efficiency by 167.9%, offering a more comprehensive assessment of multi-round defense. These results demonstrate that CoopGuard provides robust protection for LLMs in multi-round adversarial scenarios.

AI.tldr: CoopGuard是一个基于协作智能体的多轮LLM防御框架，通过维护和更新内部防御状态来对抗演化攻击，在EMRA基准测试中显著降低攻击成功率
AI.motivation: 随着LLM在复杂应用中的部署增加，其对抗多轮交互攻击的脆弱性引发安全担忧。现有防御大多是反应式的，难以适应攻击者在多轮交互中演化的策略。
AI.method: 提出CoopGuard框架，基于协作智能体维护内部防御状态。包含三个专门智能体（延迟智能体、诱惑智能体、取证智能体），由系统智能体协调，根据演化防御状态（交互历史）做出决策。
AI.result: 在EMRA基准测试（包含5,200个对抗样本，覆盖8种攻击类型）中，CoopGuard将攻击成功率降低78.9%，欺骗率提高186%，攻击效率降低167.9%，显著优于现有防御方法。
AI.conclusion: CoopGuard为LLM在多轮对抗场景中提供了鲁棒的保护，展示了基于状态的多轮防御框架的有效性。

title: SLSREC: Self-Supervised Contrastive Learning for Adaptive Fusion of Long- and Short-Term User Interests
summary: User interests typically encompass both long-term preferences and short-term intentions, reflecting the dynamic nature of user behaviors across different timeframes. The uneven temporal distribution of user interactions highlights the evolving patterns of interests, making it challenging to accurately capture shifts in interests using comprehensive historical behaviors. To address this, we propose SLSRec, a novel Session-based model with the fusion of Long- and Short-term Recommendations that effectively captures the temporal dynamics of user interests by segmenting historical behaviors over time. Unlike conventional models that combine long- and short-term user interests into a single representation, compromising recommendation accuracy, SLSRec utilizes a self-supervised learning framework to disentangle these two types of interests. A contrastive learning strategy is introduced to ensure accurate calibration of long- and short-term interest representations. Additionally, an attention-based fusion network is designed to adaptively aggregate interest representations, optimizing their integration to enhance recommendation performance. Extensive experiments on three public benchmark datasets demonstrate that SLSRec consistently outperforms state-of-the-art models while exhibiting superior robustness across various scenarios.We will release all source code upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: SLSRec是一个基于会话的推荐模型，通过融合长期和短期兴趣来捕捉用户兴趣的时间动态。它使用自监督学习框架分离这两种兴趣，引入对比学习策略进行校准，并通过注意力融合网络自适应聚合兴趣表示。
AI.motivation: 用户兴趣包含长期偏好和短期意图，反映了用户行为在不同时间尺度上的动态性。用户交互的时间分布不均匀，使得使用完整历史行为准确捕捉兴趣变化具有挑战性。现有模型通常将长短期兴趣合并为单一表示，这会损害推荐准确性。
AI.method: 1) 按时间分割历史行为以捕捉兴趣动态；2) 使用自监督学习框架分离长期和短期兴趣；3) 引入对比学习策略校准兴趣表示；4) 设计基于注意力的融合网络自适应聚合兴趣表示。
AI.result: 在三个公共基准数据集上的广泛实验表明，SLSRec始终优于最先进的模型，并在各种场景中表现出卓越的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: SLSRec通过有效分离和融合长期与短期兴趣表示，显著提升了推荐系统的性能，为解决用户兴趣动态变化问题提供了有效解决方案。

title: AnyUser: Translating Sketched User Intent into Domestic Robots
comment: Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Robotics (T-RO)
summary: We introduce AnyUser, a unified robotic instruction system for intuitive domestic task instruction via free-form sketches on camera images, optionally with language. AnyUser interprets multimodal inputs (sketch, vision, language) as spatial-semantic primitives to generate executable robot actions requiring no prior maps or models. Novel components include multimodal fusion for understanding and a hierarchical policy for robust action generation. Efficacy is shown via extensive evaluations: (1) Quantitative benchmarks on the large-scale dataset showing high accuracy in interpreting diverse sketch-based commands across various simulated domestic scenes. (2) Real-world validation on two distinct robotic platforms, a statically mounted 7-DoF assistive arm (KUKA LBR iiwa) and a dual-arm mobile manipulator (Realman RMC-AIDAL), performing representative tasks like targeted wiping and area cleaning, confirming the system's ability to ground instructions and execute them reliably in physical environments. (3) A comprehensive user study involving diverse demographics (elderly, simulated non-verbal, low technical literacy) demonstrating significant improvements in usability and task specification efficiency, achieving high task completion rates (85.7%-96.4%) and user satisfaction. AnyUser bridges the gap between advanced robotic capabilities and the need for accessible non-expert interaction, laying the foundation for practical assistive robots adaptable to real-world human environments.

AI.tldr: AnyUser是一个统一的机器人指令系统，允许用户通过在相机图像上自由绘制草图（可选结合语言）来直观地指导家庭任务。系统将多模态输入解释为空间语义基元，生成可执行的机器人动作，无需先验地图或模型。
AI.motivation: 动机是弥合先进机器人能力与非专家用户可访问交互之间的差距。当前机器人系统通常需要专业知识或复杂的编程，限制了在家庭环境中的实际应用。需要一种直观、自然的方式让不同技术背景的用户（包括老年人、非言语用户）能够有效地指导机器人执行日常任务。
AI.method: 方法包括：1）多模态融合模块，用于理解草图、视觉和语言输入，将其解释为空间语义基元；2）分层策略，用于生成鲁棒的机器人动作；3）无需先验地图或模型，直接从输入生成可执行指令。
AI.result: 结果包括：1）在大规模数据集上的定量基准测试显示，在各种模拟家庭场景中解释多样化草图指令的高准确性；2）在两个不同机器人平台上的真实世界验证（KUKA LBR iiwa和Realman RMC-AIDAL），成功执行针对性擦拭和区域清洁等任务；3）用户研究显示高任务完成率（85.7%-96.4%）和用户满意度，特别是在老年人、模拟非言语用户和低技术素养用户中。
AI.conclusion: 结论是AnyUser成功弥合了先进机器人能力与可访问的非专家交互之间的差距，为适应真实世界人类环境的实用辅助机器人奠定了基础。系统展示了通过自然、直观的多模态界面实现可靠机器人任务执行的可行性。

title: Safe and Near-Optimal Gate Control: A Case Study from the Danish West Coast
summary: Ringkoebing Fjord is an inland water basin on the Danish west coast separated from the North Sea by a set of gates used to control the amount of water entering and leaving the fjord. Currently, human operators decide when and how many gates to open or close for controlling the fjord's water level, with the goal to satisfy a range of conflicting safety and performance requirements such as keeping the water level in a target range, allowing maritime traffic, and enabling fish migration. Uppaal Stratego. We then use this digital twin along with forecasts of the sea level and the wind speed to learn a gate controller in an online fashion. We evaluate the learned controllers under different sea-level scenarios, representing normal tidal behavior, high waters, and low waters. Our evaluation demonstrates that, unlike a baseline controller, the learned controllers satisfy the safety requirements, while performing similarly regarding the other requirements.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种基于数字孪生和在线学习的闸门控制器，用于丹麦Ringkoebing Fjord的水位控制，相比人工操作能更好地满足安全要求。
AI.motivation: 目前Ringkoebing Fjord的水位控制依赖人工操作，需要同时满足水位目标范围、航运交通和鱼类迁徙等多个冲突的安全与性能要求。人工决策难以优化这些复杂约束。
AI.method:
1. 构建系统的数字孪生模型（使用Uppaal Stratego工具）
2. 结合海平面和风速预测数据
3. 采用在线学习方式训练闸门控制器
AI.result: 在不同海平面情景（正常潮汐、高水位、低水位）下评估学习控制器。相比基线控制器，学习控制器能完全满足安全要求，在其他性能要求上表现相似。
AI.conclusion: 基于数字孪生和在线学习的控制器能有效解决复杂环境下的多目标控制问题，在保证安全的同时维持其他性能指标。

title: Parent Selection Mechanisms in Elitist Crossover-Based Algorithms
summary:
Parent selection methods are widely used in evolutionary computation to accelerate the optimization process, yet their theoretical benefits are still poorly understood. In this paper, we address this gap by incorporating different parent selection strategies into the $(μ+1)$ genetic algorithm (GA). We show that, with an appropriately chosen population size and a parent selection strategy that selects a pair of maximally distant parents with probability $Ω(1)$ for crossover, the resulting algorithm solves the Jump$_k$ problem in $O(k4^kn\log(n))$ expected time. This bound is significantly smaller than the best known bound of $O(nμ\log(μ)+n\log(n)+n^{k-1})$ for any $(μ+1)$~GA using no explicit diversity-preserving mechanism and a constant crossover probability.
  To establish this result, we introduce a novel diversity metric that captures both the maximum distance between pairs of individuals in the population and the number of pairs achieving this distance. The crucial point of our analysis is that it relies on crossover as a mechanism for creating and maintaining diversity throughout the run, rather than using crossover only in the final step to combine already diversified individuals, as it has been done in many previous works. The insights provided by our analysis contribute to a deeper theoretical understanding of the role of crossover in the population dynamics of genetic algorithms.

AI.tldr: 该论文将不同父代选择策略引入(μ+1)遗传算法，通过选择最大距离父代进行交叉，显著提升了Jump_k问题的求解效率，时间复杂度从O(nμlog(μ)+nlog(n)+n^{k-1})降低到O(k4^knlog(n))。
AI.motivation: 进化计算中广泛使用父代选择方法来加速优化过程，但其理论优势尚未得到充分理解。本文旨在填补这一空白，通过将不同父代选择策略纳入(μ+1)遗传算法，深入理解父代选择的理论效益。
AI.method: 将不同父代选择策略整合到(μ+1)遗传算法中，提出一种选择最大距离父代进行交叉的策略。引入新的多样性度量指标，该指标同时考虑种群中个体对之间的最大距离以及达到该距离的对数。分析重点在于将交叉作为创建和维持多样性的机制，而非仅在最后一步结合已多样化的个体。
AI.result: 当选择适当种群大小且以Ω(1)概率选择最大距离父代进行交叉时，算法在Jump_k问题上的期望时间复杂度为O(k4^knlog(n))，显著优于已知的O(nμlog(μ)+nlog(n)+n^{k-1})边界。这证明了父代选择策略在加速优化方面的理论优势。
AI.conclusion: 通过理论分析证明了父代选择策略在遗传算法中的重要性，特别是选择最大距离父代进行交叉的策略能显著提升算法性能。研究为理解交叉在种群动态中的作用提供了新的理论视角，强调了交叉作为多样性创建和维持机制的价值。

title: Generative Modeling under Non-Monotonic MAR Missingness via Approximate Wasserstein Gradient Flows
summary: The prevalence of missing values in data science poses a substantial risk to any further analyses. Despite a wealth of research, principled nonparametric methods to deal with general non-monotone missingness are still scarce. Instead, ad-hoc imputation methods are often used, for which it remains unclear whether the correct distribution can be recovered. In this paper, we propose FLOWGEM, a principled iterative method for generating a complete dataset from a dataset with values Missing at Random (MAR). Motivated by convergence results of the ignoring maximum likelihood estimator, our approach minimizes the expected Kullback-Leibler (KL) divergence between the observed data distribution and the distribution of the generated sample over different missingness patterns. To minimize the KL divergence, we employ a discretized particle evolution of the corresponding Wasserstein Gradient Flow, where the velocity field is approximated using a local linear estimator of the density ratio. This construction yields a data generation scheme that iteratively transports an initial particle ensemble toward the target distribution. Simulation studies and real-data benchmarks demonstrate that FLOWGEM achieves state-of-the-art performance across a range of settings, including the challenging case of non-monotonic MAR mechanisms. Together, these results position FLOWGEM as a principled and practical alternative to existing imputation methods, and a decisive step towards closing the gap between theoretical rigor and empirical performance.

AI.tldr: FLOWGEM是一种处理随机缺失数据的迭代生成方法，通过最小化观测数据与生成样本之间的KL散度，使用Wasserstein梯度流实现数据补全
AI.motivation: 数据科学中普遍存在的缺失值问题对后续分析构成重大风险。尽管已有大量研究，但处理一般非单调缺失模式的原理性非参数方法仍然稀缺。目前常使用临时插补方法，但这些方法是否能恢复正确分布尚不明确。
AI.method: 提出FLOWGEM方法：1) 基于忽略最大似然估计的收敛结果，最小化观测数据分布与生成样本分布在不同缺失模式下的期望KL散度；2) 使用离散化粒子演化的Wasserstein梯度流最小化KL散度；3) 使用密度比局部线性估计器近似速度场；4) 通过迭代传输初始粒子集合向目标分布移动。
AI.result: 模拟研究和真实数据基准测试表明，FLOWGEM在一系列设置中实现了最先进的性能，包括具有挑战性的非单调MAR机制情况。
AI.conclusion: FLOWGEM作为现有插补方法的原理性和实用替代方案，在理论严谨性和实证性能之间架起了桥梁。

title: SAIL: Scene-aware Adaptive Iterative Learning for Long-Tail Trajectory Prediction in Autonomous Vehicles
summary: Autonomous vehicles (AVs) rely on accurate trajectory prediction for safe navigation in diverse traffic environments, yet existing models struggle with long-tail scenarios-rare but safety-critical events characterized by abrupt maneuvers, high collision risks, and complex interactions. These challenges stem from data imbalance, inadequate definitions of long-tail trajectories, and suboptimal learning strategies that prioritize common behaviors over infrequent ones. To address this, we propose SAIL, a novel framework that systematically tackles the long-tail problem by first defining and modeling trajectories across three key attribute dimensions: prediction error, collision risk, and state complexity. Our approach then synergizes an attribute-guided augmentation and feature extraction process with a highly adaptive contrastive learning strategy. This strategy employs a continuous cosine momentum schedule, similarity-weighted hard-negative mining, and a dynamic pseudo-labeling mechanism based on evolving feature clustering. Furthermore, it incorporates a focusing mechanism to intensify learning on hard-positive samples within each identified class. This comprehensive design enables SAIL to excel at identifying and forecasting diverse and challenging long-tail events. Extensive evaluations on the nuScenes and ETH/UCY datasets demonstrate SAIL's superior performance, achieving up to 28.8% reduction in prediction error on the hardest 1% of long-tail samples compared to state-of-the-art baselines, while maintaining competitive accuracy across all scenarios. This framework advances reliable AV trajectory prediction in real-world, mixed-autonomy settings.

AI.tldr: SAIL框架通过定义轨迹的三个关键属性维度（预测误差、碰撞风险、状态复杂度），结合属性引导的数据增强和自适应对比学习策略，显著提升了自动驾驶车辆在长尾场景下的轨迹预测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶轨迹预测模型在处理长尾场景（罕见但安全关键的事件）时表现不佳，主要原因是数据不平衡、长尾轨迹定义不充分，以及学习策略优先考虑常见行为而非罕见行为。
AI.method: 提出SAIL框架：1) 定义和建模轨迹的三个关键属性维度；2) 属性引导的数据增强和特征提取；3) 自适应对比学习策略，包括连续余弦动量调度、相似度加权的困难负样本挖掘、基于动态聚类的伪标签机制，以及针对每个类别内困难正样本的聚焦机制。
AI.result: 在nuScenes和ETH/UCY数据集上的评估显示，SAIL在最困难的1%长尾样本上相比最先进的基线方法减少了28.8%的预测误差，同时在所有场景中保持竞争力的准确性。
AI.conclusion: SAIL框架通过系统性地解决长尾问题，提升了自动驾驶在真实世界混合自主环境中的可靠轨迹预测能力。

title: From Paper to Program: A Multi-Stage LLM-Assisted Workflow for Accelerating Quantum Many-Body Algorithm Development
summary: Translating quantum many-body theory into scalable software traditionally requires months of effort. Zero-shot generation of tensor network algorithms by Large Language Models (LLMs) frequently fails due to spatial reasoning errors and memory bottlenecks. We resolve this using a multi-stage workflow that mimics a physics research group. By generating a mathematically rigorous LaTeX specification as an intermediate blueprint, we constrain the coding LLM to produce exact, matrix-free $\mathcal{O}(D^3)$ operations. We validate this approach by generating a Density-Matrix Renormalization Group (DMRG) engine that accurately captures the critical entanglement scaling of the Spin-$1/2$ Heisenberg model and the symmetry-protected topological (SPT) order of the Spin-$1$ AKLT model. Testing across 16 combinations of leading foundation models yielded a 100\% success rate. By compressing a months-long development cycle into under 24 hours ($\sim 14$ active hours), this framework offers a highly reproducible paradigm for accelerating computational physics research.

AI.tldr: LLM驱动的多阶段工作流，通过生成LaTeX规范作为中间蓝图，实现零样本生成精确的矩阵无关O(D³)张量网络算法，将数月开发周期压缩至24小时内。
AI.motivation: 传统量子多体理论软件开发需要数月时间，而LLM的零样本生成常因空间推理错误和内存瓶颈而失败。需要一种可靠的方法来自动化张量网络算法的生成。
AI.method: 采用多阶段工作流模拟物理研究小组：首先生成数学严谨的LaTeX规范作为中间蓝图，然后约束编码LLM生成精确的矩阵无关O(D³)操作。验证了16种基础模型组合。
AI.result: 成功生成了密度矩阵重整化群(DMRG)引擎，准确捕捉了Spin-1/2 Heisenberg模型的临界纠缠标度和Spin-1 AKLT模型的对称保护拓扑序。在16种模型组合中实现了100%成功率。
AI.conclusion: 该框架将数月开发周期压缩至24小时内，为加速计算物理研究提供了高度可复现的范式，展示了LLM在复杂科学计算任务中的潜力。

title: Noisy Nonreciprocal Pairwise Comparisons: Scale Variation, Noise Calibration, and Admissible Ranking Regions
summary:
Pairwise comparisons are widely used in decision analysis, preference modeling, and evaluation problems. In many practical situations, the observed comparison matrix is not reciprocal. This lack of reciprocity is often treated as a defect to be corrected immediately. In this article, we adopt a different point of view: part of the nonreciprocity may reflect a genuine variation in the evaluation scale, while another part is due to random perturbations.
  We introduce an additive model in which the unknown underlying comparison matrix is consistent but not necessarily reciprocal. The reciprocal component carries the global ranking information, whereas the symmetric component describes possible scale variation. Around this structured matrix, we add a random perturbation and show how to estimate the noise level, assess whether the scale variation remains moderate, and assign probabilities to admissible ranking regions in the sense of strict ranking by pairwise comparisons. We also compare this approach with the brutal projection onto reciprocal matrices, which suppresses all symmetric information at once.
  The Gaussian perturbation model is used here not because human decisions are exactly Gaussian, but because observed judgment errors often result from the accumulation of many small effects. In such a context, the central limit principle provides a natural heuristic justification for Gaussian noise. This makes it possible to derive explicit estimators and probability assessments while keeping the model interpretable for decision problems.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种处理非互易成对比较矩阵的新方法，将非互易性分解为真实的尺度变化和随机扰动，而非简单修正为互易矩阵。
AI.motivation: 传统方法将非互易比较矩阵视为缺陷并立即修正，但作者认为部分非互易性反映了真实的评估尺度变化，另一部分才是随机扰动，需要更细致的分析方法。
AI.method: 引入加性模型：底层比较矩阵一致但不一定互易，包含互易成分（全局排名信息）和对称成分（尺度变化）。添加高斯随机扰动，推导噪声水平估计、尺度变化评估和排名区域概率分配方法。
AI.result: 提出了可解释的统计框架，能够区分尺度变化和随机噪声，与简单投影到互易矩阵的方法相比，能保留更多信息并做出更准确的概率评估。
AI.conclusion: 非互易性不应被简单视为缺陷而修正，而应分解为有意义的尺度变化和随机噪声，该框架为决策分析提供了更精细的工具。

title: Toward a Sustainable Software Architecture Community: Evaluating ICSA's Environmental Impact
summary: Generative AI (GenAI) tools are increasingly integrated into software architecture research, yet the environmental impact of their computational usage remains largely undocumented. This study presents the first systematic audit of the carbon footprint of both the digital footprint from GenAI usage in research papers, and the traditional footprint from conference activities within the context of the IEEE International Conference on Software Architecture (ICSA). We report two separate carbon inventories relevant to the software architecture research community: i) an exploratory estimate of the footprint of GenAI inference usage associated with accepted papers within a research-artifact boundary, and ii) the conference attendance and operations footprint of ICSA 2025 (travel, accommodation, catering, venue energy, and materials) within the conference time boundary. These two inventories, with different system boundaries and completeness, support transparency and community reflection. We discuss implications for sustainable software architecture, including recommendations for transparency, greener conference planning, and improved energy efficiency in GenAI operations. Our work supports a more climate-conscious research culture within the ICSA community and beyond

AI.tldr: 该研究首次系统审计了软件架构研究中生成式AI使用的碳足迹，包括论文中GenAI推理的数字足迹和ICSA会议活动的传统足迹，旨在提高研究社区的环保意识。
AI.motivation: 生成式AI工具在软件架构研究中应用日益广泛，但其计算使用带来的环境影响尚未得到充分记录。研究旨在填补这一空白，为软件架构研究社区提供碳足迹透明度。
AI.method: 采用系统审计方法，建立两个独立的碳清单：1) 在研究成果边界内，对ICSA接受论文中GenAI推理使用的足迹进行探索性估计；2) 在会议时间边界内，对ICSA 2025会议出席和运营足迹（旅行、住宿、餐饮、场地能源、材料）进行全面评估。
AI.result: 提供了软件架构研究社区首个全面的碳足迹清单，揭示了GenAI使用和会议活动对环境的影响，支持透明度和社区反思。
AI.conclusion: 研究促进了软件架构领域的可持续发展，提出了提高透明度、绿色会议规划和改进GenAI能源效率的建议，支持ICSA社区及更广泛研究领域建立更气候意识的研究文化。

title: NetSecBed: A Container-Native Testbed for Reproducible Cybersecurity Experimentation
comment: 8 pages, including 4 figures and 2 tables, submitted to SBCUP 2026
summary: Cybersecurity research increasingly depends on reproducible evidence, such as traffic traces, logs, and labeled datasets, yet most public datasets remain static and offer limited support for controlled re-execution and traceability, especially in heterogeneous multi-protocol environments. This paper presents NetSecBed, a container-native, scenario-oriented testbed for reproducible generation of network traffic evidence and execution artifacts under controlled conditions, particularly suitable for IoT, IIoT, and pervasive multi-protocol environments. The framework integrates 60 attack scenarios, 9 target services, and benign traffic generators as single-purpose containers, enabling plug-and-play extensibility and traceability through declarative specifications. Its pipeline automates parametrized execution, packet capture, log collection, service probing, feature extraction, and dataset consolidation. The main contribution is a repeatable, auditable, and extensible framework for cybersecurity experimentation that reduces operational bias and supports continuous dataset generation.

AI.tldr: NetSecBed是一个面向场景的容器化网络测试平台，用于在受控条件下生成可复现的网络流量证据和执行工件，特别适用于IoT、IIoT和多协议环境
AI.motivation: 网络安全研究越来越依赖可复现的证据（如流量追踪、日志和标注数据集），但大多数公共数据集是静态的，在异构多协议环境中缺乏可控重执行和可追溯性支持
AI.method: 采用容器原生、面向场景的测试平台设计，集成60个攻击场景、9个目标服务和良性流量生成器作为单用途容器，通过声明式规范实现即插即用扩展和可追溯性
AI.result: 开发了一个自动化流水线，支持参数化执行、数据包捕获、日志收集、服务探测、特征提取和数据集整合，为网络安全实验提供了可重复、可审计和可扩展的框架
AI.conclusion: NetSecBed减少了操作偏差，支持连续数据集生成，为网络安全实验提供了一个可重复、可审计和可扩展的框架

title: Interpretation of Crystal Energy Landscapes with Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks
summary: Characterizing crystalline energy landscapes is essential to predicting thermodynamic stability, electronic structure, and functional behavior. While machine learning (ML) enables rapid property predictions, the "black-box" nature of most models limits their utility for generating new scientific insights. Here, we introduce Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks (KANs) as an interpretable framework to bridge this gap. Unlike conventional neural networks with fixed activation functions, KANs employ learnable functions that reveal underlying physical relationships. We developed the Element-Weighted KAN, a composition-only model that achieves state-of-the-art accuracy in predicting formation energy, band gap, and work function across large-scale datasets. Crucially, without any explicit physical constraints, KANs uncover interpretable chemical trends aligned with the periodic table and quantum mechanical principles through embedding analysis, correlation studies, and principal component analysis. These results demonstrate that KANs provide a powerful framework with high predictive performance and scientific interpretability, establishing a new paradigm for transparent, chemistry-based materials informatics.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出使用可解释的Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks (KANs)来预测晶体材料的性质，通过Element-Weighted KAN模型在形成能、带隙和功函数预测上达到SOTA精度，同时提供物理可解释性。
AI.motivation: 虽然机器学习能快速预测材料性质，但大多数模型是"黑箱"的，限制了其生成新科学见解的能力。需要一种既能保持高预测性能又能提供科学可解释性的框架。
AI.method: 引入Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks (KANs)作为可解释框架，开发Element-Weighted KAN模型，仅使用元素组成信息，通过可学习函数揭示物理关系，结合嵌入分析、相关性研究和主成分分析。
