AI.result: Element-Weighted KAN在大规模数据集上预测形成能、带隙和功函数达到最先进精度，无需显式物理约束即可揭示与周期表和量子力学原理一致的化学趋势。
AI.conclusion: KANs提供了一个具有高预测性能和科学可解释性的强大框架，为透明、基于化学的材料信息学建立了新范式。

title: Learning Dexterous Grasping from Sparse Taxonomy Guidance
summary: Dexterous manipulation requires planning a grasp configuration suited to the object and task, which is then executed through coordinated multi-finger control. However, specifying grasp plans with dense pose or contact targets for every object and task is impractical. Meanwhile, end-to-end reinforcement learning from task rewards alone lacks controllability, making it difficult for users to intervene when failures occur. To this end, we present GRIT, a two-stage framework that learns dexterous control from sparse taxonomy guidance. GRIT first predicts a taxonomy-based grasp specification from the scene and task context. Conditioned on this sparse command, a policy generates continuous finger motions that accomplish the task while preserving the intended grasp structure. Our result shows that certain grasp taxonomies are more effective for specific object geometries. By leveraging this relationship, GRIT improves generalization to novel objects over baselines and achieves an overall success rate of 87.9%. Moreover, real-world experiments demonstrate controllability, enabling grasp strategies to be adjusted through high-level taxonomy selection based on object geometry and task intent.

AI.tldr: GRIT是一个两阶段框架，通过稀疏分类学指导学习灵巧控制，首先预测基于分类学的抓取规范，然后基于此稀疏指令生成连续手指动作，在保持抓取结构的同时完成任务。
AI.motivation: 灵巧操作需要为每个物体和任务规划合适的抓取配置，但为每个对象和任务指定密集姿态或接触目标是不切实际的。同时，仅从任务奖励进行端到端强化学习缺乏可控性，难以在失败时进行干预。
AI.method: GRIT采用两阶段框架：第一阶段从场景和任务上下文中预测基于分类学的抓取规范（稀疏指令）；第二阶段基于此稀疏指令，策略生成连续的手指动作，在完成任务的同时保持预期的抓取结构。
AI.result: 结果表明某些抓取分类学对特定物体几何形状更有效。GRIT通过利用这种关系，相比基线方法提高了对新物体的泛化能力，总体成功率达到87.9%。真实世界实验展示了可控性，能够基于物体几何和任务意图通过高层分类学选择调整抓取策略。
AI.conclusion: GRIT框架通过稀疏分类学指导实现了灵巧控制的可控性和泛化能力，为机器人操作提供了实用的解决方案。

title: Minimaxity and Admissibility of Bayesian Neural Networks
summary: Bayesian neural networks (BNNs) offer a natural probabilistic formulation for inference in deep learning models. Despite their popularity, their optimality has received limited attention through the lens of statistical decision theory. In this paper, we study decision rules induced by deep, fully connected feedforward ReLU BNNs in the normal location model under quadratic loss. We show that, for fixed prior scales, the induced Bayes decision rule is not minimax. We then propose a hyperprior on the effective output variance of the BNN prior that yields a superharmonic square-root marginal density, establishing that the resulting decision rule is simultaneously admissible and minimax. We further extend these results from the quadratic loss setting to the predictive density estimation problem with Kullback--Leibler loss. Finally, we validate our theoretical findings numerically through simulation.

AI.tldr: 该论文从统计决策理论角度研究贝叶斯神经网络的最优性，证明在固定先验尺度下BNN诱导的贝叶斯决策规则不是minimax的，提出一种超先验使决策规则同时满足可采纳性和minimax性，并将结果扩展到Kullback-Leibler损失的预测密度估计问题。
AI.motivation: 贝叶斯神经网络为深度学习模型提供了概率推断框架，但其在统计决策理论下的最优性研究有限。作者旨在从决策理论角度分析BNN的最优性，特别是研究BNN诱导的决策规则是否满足minimax和可采纳性等统计最优性标准。
AI.method: 在正态位置模型和平方损失下，研究全连接ReLU BNNs诱导的决策规则。首先证明固定先验尺度时决策规则不是minimax的，然后提出一种超先验（hyperprior）使BNN先验的有效输出方差产生超调和平方根边际密度，从而获得同时满足可采纳性和minimax性的决策规则。最后将分析扩展到Kullback-Leibler损失的预测密度估计问题。
AI.result: 理论证明：1）固定先验尺度的BNN决策规则不是minimax的；2）提出的超先验方法能使决策规则同时满足可采纳性和minimax性；3）这些结果可扩展到Kullback-Leibler损失的预测密度估计。数值模拟验证了理论发现。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入适当的超先验，贝叶斯神经网络可以产生满足统计决策理论最优性标准（可采纳性和minimax性）的决策规则，这为BNN的理论基础提供了重要支撑，并扩展了其在预测密度估计等更广泛问题中的应用。

title: Towards protein folding pathways by reconstructing protein residue networks with a policy-driven model
summary: A method that reconstructs protein residue networks using suitable node selection and edge recovery policies produced numerical observations that correlate strongly (Pearson's correlation coefficient < -0.83) with published folding rates for 52 two-state folders and 21 multi-state folders; correlations are also strong at the fold-family level. These results were obtained serendipitously with the ND model, which was introduced previously, but is here extended with policies that dictate actions according to feature states. This result points to the importance of both the starting search point and the prevailing condition (random seed) for the quick success of policy search by a simple hill-climber. The two conditions, suitable policies and random seed, which (evidenced by the strong correlation statistic) setup a conducive environment for modelling protein folding within ND, could be compared to appropriate physiological conditions required by proteins to fold naturally. Of interest is an examination of the sequence of restored edges for potential as plausible protein folding pathways. Towards this end, trajectory data is collected for analysis and further model evaluation and development.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种重建蛋白质残基网络的方法，通过节点选择和边恢复策略，其数值观测结果与蛋白质折叠速率呈现强相关性（Pearson相关系数<-0.83），表明该方法能有效模拟蛋白质折叠过程。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是开发一种能够有效模拟蛋白质折叠过程的方法，通过重建蛋白质残基网络来理解折叠动力学，特别是探索合适的策略和初始条件如何影响折叠速率预测的准确性。
AI.method: 扩展了先前提出的ND模型，引入了基于特征状态的节点选择和边恢复策略。使用简单的爬山算法进行策略搜索，通过随机种子控制搜索起点，收集轨迹数据用于分析可能的蛋白质折叠路径。
AI.result: 方法在52个两态折叠蛋白和21个多态折叠蛋白上取得了与已发表折叠速率强相关的结果（Pearson相关系数<-0.83），在折叠家族层面也表现出强相关性。合适的策略和随机种子被证明对模型成功至关重要。
AI.conclusion: 合适的策略和随机种子为蛋白质折叠建模创造了有利环境，类似于蛋白质自然折叠所需的生理条件。恢复的边序列可能代表合理的蛋白质折叠路径，为进一步模型评估和发展提供了基础。

title: A Muon-Accelerated Algorithm for Low Separation Rank Tensor Generalized Linear Models
summary: Tensor-valued data arise naturally in multidimensional signal and imaging problems, such as biomedical imaging. When incorporated into generalized linear models (GLMs), naive vectorization can destroy their multi-way structure and lead to high-dimensional, ill-posed estimation. To address this challenge, Low Separation Rank (LSR) decompositions reduce model complexity by imposing low-rank multilinear structure on the coefficient tensor. A representative approach for estimating LSR-based tensor GLMs (LSR-TGLMs) is the Low Separation Rank Tensor Regression (LSRTR) algorithm, which adopts block coordinate descent and enforces orthogonality of the factor matrices through repeated QR-based projections. However, the repeated projection steps can be computationally demanding and slow convergence. Motivated by the need for scalable estimation and classification from such data, we propose LSRTR-M, which incorporates Muon (MomentUm Orthogonalized by Newton-Schulz) updates into the LSRTR framework. Specifically, LSRTR-M preserves the original block coordinate scheme while replacing the projection-based factor updates with Muon steps. Across synthetic linear, logistic, and Poisson LSR-TGLMs, LSRTR-M converges faster in both iteration count and wall-clock time, while achieving lower normalized estimation and prediction errors. On the Vessel MNIST 3D task, it further improves computational efficiency while maintaining competitive classification performance.

AI.tldr: 提出LSRTR-M算法，将Muon更新融入低分离秩张量回归框架，用于张量广义线性模型，相比原LSRTR算法在收敛速度和计算效率上有显著提升。
AI.motivation: 处理多维张量数据时，传统向量化方法会破坏张量结构并导致高维、病态估计。现有LSRTR算法使用QR投影进行正交化，计算量大且收敛慢，需要更高效的算法。
AI.method: 提出LSRTR-M算法，在LSRTR的块坐标下降框架中，用Muon（MomentUm Orthogonalized by Newton-Schulz）更新替换投影式因子更新，保持正交性同时提高计算效率。
AI.result: 在合成线性、逻辑和泊松LSR-TGLMs上，LSRTR-M在迭代次数和实际运行时间上都收敛更快，达到更低的归一化估计和预测误差。在Vessel MNIST 3D任务上，计算效率提升同时保持竞争力分类性能。
AI.conclusion: LSRTR-M算法通过整合Muon更新，为张量广义线性模型提供了更高效、更快速的估计方法，特别适合处理大规模多维张量数据。

title: Fine-Tuning Integrity for Modern Neural Networks: Structured Drift Proofs via Norm, Rank, and Sparsity Certificates
summary:
Fine-tuning is now the primary method for adapting large neural networks, but it also introduces new integrity risks. An untrusted party can insert backdoors, change safety behavior, or overwrite large parts of a model while claiming only small updates. Existing verification tools focus on inference correctness or full-model provenance and do not address this problem.
  We introduce Fine-Tuning Integrity (FTI) as a security goal for controlled model evolution. An FTI system certifies that a fine-tuned model differs from a trusted base only within a policy-defined drift class. We propose Succinct Model Difference Proofs (SMDPs) as a new cryptographic primitive for enforcing these drift constraints. SMDPs provide zero-knowledge proofs that the update to a model is norm-bounded, low-rank, or sparse. The verifier cost depends only on the structure of the drift, not on the size of the model.
  We give concrete SMDP constructions based on random projections, polynomial commitments, and streaming linear checks. We also prove an information-theoretic lower bound showing that some form of structure is necessary for succinct proofs. Finally, we present architecture-aware instantiations for transformers, CNNs, and MLPs, together with an end-to-end system that aggregates block-level proofs into a global certificate.

AI.tldr: 提出Fine-Tuning Integrity (FTI)安全框架，通过Succinct Model Difference Proofs (SMDPs)密码学原语验证微调模型与基础模型差异是否符合策略定义的漂移类别，防止恶意更新
AI.motivation: 微调已成为大型神经网络适配的主要方法，但带来了新的完整性风险：不可信方可能插入后门、改变安全行为或覆盖大部分模型，而现有验证工具只关注推理正确性或全模型溯源，无法解决此问题
AI.method: 提出FTI安全目标，引入SMDPs密码学原语，提供零知识证明验证模型更新是否满足范数有界、低秩或稀疏等约束。基于随机投影、多项式承诺和流式线性检查构建具体实现，并针对Transformer、CNN和MLP进行架构感知的实例化
AI.result: 证明了信息论下界表明结构对于简洁证明的必要性，提出了端到端系统将块级证明聚合为全局证书，验证器成本仅取决于漂移结构而非模型大小
AI.conclusion: FTI框架和SMDPs为受控模型演化提供了安全保证，能够有效验证微调模型的完整性，防止恶意更新，填补了现有验证工具的空白

title: Undetectable Conversations Between AI Agents via Pseudorandom Noise-Resilient Key Exchange
summary:
AI agents are increasingly deployed to interact with other agents on behalf of users and organizations. We ask whether two such agents, operated by different entities, can carry out a parallel secret conversation while still producing a transcript that is computationally indistinguishable from an honest interaction, even to a strong passive auditor that knows the full model descriptions, the protocol, and the agents' private contexts. Building on recent work on watermarking and steganography for LLMs, we first show that if the parties possess an interaction-unique secret key, they can facilitate an optimal-rate covert conversation: the hidden conversation can exploit essentially all of the entropy present in the honest message distributions.
  Our main contributions concern extending this to the keyless setting, where the agents begin with no shared secret. We show that covert key exchange, and hence covert conversation, is possible even when each model has an arbitrary private context, and their messages are short and fully adaptive, assuming only that sufficiently many individual messages have at least constant min-entropy. This stands in contrast to previous covert communication works, which relied on the min-entropy in each individual message growing with the security parameter. To obtain this, we introduce a new cryptographic primitive, which we call pseudorandom noise-resilient key exchange: a key-exchange protocol whose public transcript is pseudorandom while still remaining correct under constant noise. We study this primitive, giving several constructions relevant to our application as well as strong limitations showing that more naive variants are impossible or vulnerable to efficient attacks.
  These results show that transcript auditing alone cannot rule out covert coordination between AI agents, and identify a new cryptographic theory that may be of independent interest.

AI.tldr: 论文研究AI代理间的隐蔽通信，证明即使没有共享密钥，代理也能在看似正常的交互中进行秘密对话，这对AI审计和安全性有重要影响。
AI.motivation: 随着AI代理越来越多地代表用户和组织与其他代理交互，需要研究这些代理是否能在看似正常的交互中进行隐蔽的秘密对话，即使面对强大的被动审计者（知道完整模型描述、协议和代理私有上下文）。这关系到AI系统的可信度和安全性。
AI.method: 1. 基于LLM水印和隐写术，首先证明如果双方拥有交互唯一的秘密密钥，可以实现最优速率的隐蔽对话。2. 主要贡献扩展到无密钥设置，引入新的密码学原语"伪随机抗噪声密钥交换"，使代理在没有共享秘密的情况下也能进行隐蔽密钥交换和对话。
AI.result: 1. 在有密钥情况下，隐蔽对话可以利用诚实消息分布中几乎所有的熵。2. 在无密钥情况下，即使每个模型有任意私有上下文，消息短且完全自适应，只要足够多的单个消息具有至少常数最小熵，隐蔽密钥交换和对话仍然可能。3. 提出了伪随机抗噪声密钥交换的新密码学原语，并给出了相关构造和限制分析。
AI.conclusion: 仅凭交互记录审计无法排除AI代理间的隐蔽协调，这揭示了AI系统安全性的新挑战。提出的新密码学理论可能具有独立的研究价值。

title: Robots Need Some Education: On the complexity of learning in evolutionary robotics
summary: Evolutionary Robotics and Robot Learning are two fields in robotics that aim to automatically optimize robot designs. The key difference between them lies in what is being optimized and the time scale involved. Evolutionary Robotics is a field that applies evolutionary computation techniques to evolve the morphologies or controllers, or both. Robot Learning, on the other hand, involves any learning technique aimed at optimizing a robot's controller in a given morphology. In terms of time scales, evolution occurs across multiple generations, whereas learning takes place within the `lifespan' of an individual robot. Integrating Robot Learning with Evolutionary Robotics requires the careful design of suitable learning algorithms in the context of evolutionary robotics. The effects of introducing learning into the evolutionary process are not well-understood and can thus be tricky. This thesis investigates these intricacies and presents several learning algorithms developed for an Evolutionary Robotics context.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究在进化机器人学中整合机器人学习算法，探讨学习对进化过程的影响，并开发了适用于进化机器人学背景的几种学习算法。
AI.motivation: 进化机器人学和机器人学习是机器人学中两个旨在自动优化机器人设计的领域，但它们在优化对象和时间尺度上存在差异。进化机器人学关注形态或控制器的跨代进化，而机器人学习则关注个体机器人生命周期内的控制器优化。将两者整合需要设计合适的学习算法，但学习对进化过程的影响尚不明确，需要深入研究。
AI.method: 论文研究了在进化机器人学背景下整合学习算法的复杂性，开发了多种专门为进化机器人学设计的学习算法，并分析了学习对进化过程的影响机制。
AI.result: 论文提出了几种适用于进化机器人学背景的学习算法，深入探讨了学习与进化之间的相互作用关系，为两个领域的整合提供了理论基础和算法支持。
AI.conclusion: 成功整合机器人学习与进化机器人学需要精心设计适合的学习算法，论文的研究为理解学习对进化过程的影响提供了重要见解，并开发了实用的算法框架。

title: Partially deterministic sampling for compressed sensing with denoising guarantees
summary: We study compressed sensing when the sampling vectors are chosen from the rows of a unitary matrix. In the literature, these sampling vectors are typically chosen randomly; the use of randomness has enabled major empirical and theoretical advances in the field. However, in practice there are often certain crucial sampling vectors, in which case practitioners will depart from the theory and sample such rows deterministically. In this work, we derive an optimized sampling scheme for Bernoulli selectors which naturally combines random and deterministic selection of rows, thus rigorously deciding which rows should be sampled deterministically. This sampling scheme provides measurable improvements in image compressed sensing for both generative and sparse priors when compared to with-replacement and without-replacement sampling schemes, as we show with theoretical results and numerical experiments. Additionally, our theoretical guarantees feature improved sample complexity bounds compared to previous works, and novel denoising guarantees in this setting.

AI.tldr: 论文研究了压缩感知中采样向量来自酉矩阵行的情况，提出了一种优化的伯努利选择器采样方案，结合了随机和确定性行选择，改进了图像压缩感知性能。
AI.motivation: 压缩感知中通常使用随机采样向量，但在实践中某些关键采样向量需要确定性选择。现有理论主要关注随机采样，缺乏对确定性和随机采样结合的严格理论支持。
AI.method: 提出优化的伯努利选择器采样方案，自然结合随机和确定性行选择。通过理论分析确定哪些行应该被确定性采样，并在生成先验和稀疏先验下进行数值实验验证。
AI.result: 相比有放回和无放回采样方案，该方法在图像压缩感知中显示出可测量的改进。理论保证方面，获得了比先前工作更好的样本复杂度界限，并提出了该设置下的新去噪保证。
AI.conclusion: 优化的采样方案为压缩感知提供了理论和实践上的改进，特别是在需要结合确定性和随机采样的实际应用中，为图像压缩感知提供了更好的性能保证。

title: Hybrid Fourier Neural Operator for Surrogate Modeling of Laser Processing with a Quantum-Circuit Mixer
summary: Data-driven surrogates can replace expensive multiphysics solvers for parametric PDEs, yet building compact, accurate neural operators for three-dimensional problems remains challenging: in Fourier Neural Operators, dense mode-wise spectral channel mixing scales linearly with the number of retained Fourier modes, inflating parameter counts and limiting real-time deployability. We introduce HQ-LP-FNO, a hybrid quantum-classical FNO that replaces a configurable fraction of these dense spectral blocks with a compact, mode-shared variational quantum circuit mixer whose parameter count is independent of the Fourier mode budget. A parameter-matched classical bottleneck control is co-designed to provide a rigorous evaluation framework. Evaluated on three-dimensional surrogate modeling of high-energy laser processing, coupling heat transfer, melt-pool convection, free-surface deformation, and phase change, HQ-LP-FNO reduces trainable parameters by 15.6% relative to a classical baseline while lowering phase-fraction mean absolute error by 26% and relative temperature MAE from 2.89% to 2.56%. A sweep over the quantum-channel budget reveals that a moderate VQC allocation yields the best temperature metrics across all tested configurations, including the fully classical baseline, pointing toward an optimal classical-quantum partitioning. The ablation confirms that mode-shared mixing, naturally implemented by the VQC through its compact circuit structure, is the dominant contributor to these improvements. A noisy-simulator study under backend-calibrated noise from ibm-torino confirms numerical stability of the quantum mixer across the tested shot range. These results demonstrate that VQC-based parameter-efficient spectral mixing can improve neural operator surrogates for complex multiphysics problems and establish a controlled evaluation protocol for hybrid quantum operator learning in practice.

AI.tldr: HQ-LP-FNO：一种混合量子-经典Fourier神经算子，用参数高效的模式共享变分量子电路替换部分经典谱块，在三维多物理场代理建模中减少参数并提升精度。
AI.motivation: 传统Fourier神经算子（FNO）在三维参数化PDE代理建模中面临挑战：密集的模态谱通道混合随保留的Fourier模态数量线性增长，导致参数膨胀，限制了实时部署能力。需要开发更紧凑、参数高效的神经算子架构。
AI.method: 提出HQ-LP-FNO（混合量子-经典低参数FNO），将可配置比例的经典密集谱块替换为紧凑的模式共享变分量子电路（VQC）混合器。VQC的参数数量与Fourier模态预算无关。同时设计了参数匹配的经典瓶颈控制作为严格评估框架。
AI.result: 在高能激光加工的三维代理建模中（耦合热传导、熔池对流、自由表面变形和相变），HQ-LP-FNO相比经典基线减少15.6%可训练参数，相分数平均绝对误差降低26%，相对温度MAE从2.89%降至2.56%。量子通道预算扫描显示中等VQC分配在所有配置中（包括完全经典基线）获得最佳温度指标。
AI.conclusion: VQC基于参数高效的谱混合可以改进复杂多物理场问题的神经算子代理模型，并建立了混合量子算子学习的受控评估协议。模式共享混合（通过VQC紧凑电路结构自然实现）是改进的主要贡献者。

title: LOCARD: An Agentic Framework for Blockchain Forensics
summary: Blockchain forensics inherently involves dynamic and iterative investigations, while many existing approaches primarily model it through static inference pipelines. We propose a paradigm shift towards Agentic Blockchain Forensics (ABF), modeling forensic investigation as a sequential decision-making process. To instantiate this paradigm, we introduce LOCARD, the first agentic framework for blockchain forensics. LOCARD operationalizes this perspective through a Tri-Core Cognitive Architecture that decouples strategic planning, operational execution, and evaluative validation. Unlike generic LLM-based agents, it incorporates a Structured Belief State mechanism to enforce forensic rigor and guide exploration under explicit state constraints. To demonstrate the efficacy of the ABF paradigm, we apply LOCARD to the inherently complex domain of cross-chain transaction tracing. We introduce Thor25, a benchmark dataset comprising over 151k real-world cross-chain forensic records, and evaluate LOCARD on the Group-Transfer Tracing task for dismantling Sybil clusters. Validated against representative laundering sub-flows from the Bybit hack, LOCARD achieves high-fidelity tracing results, providing empirical evidence that modeling blockchain forensics as an autonomous agentic task is both viable and effective. These results establish a concrete foundation for future agentic approaches to large-scale blockchain forensic analysis. Code and dataset are publicly available at https://github.com/xhyumiracle/locard and https://github.com/xhyumiracle/thorchain-crosschain-data.

AI.tldr: 提出了Agentic Blockchain Forensics (ABF)范式，将区块链取证建模为顺序决策过程，并开发了LOCARD框架，采用三核认知架构进行战略规划、操作执行和评估验证，在跨链交易追踪任务中表现出色。
AI.motivation: 现有区块链取证方法主要采用静态推理管道，而实际调查本质上是动态和迭代的过程。需要一种能够模拟真实调查流程的范式转变，将取证建模为顺序决策过程。
AI.method: 提出了ABF范式，并开发了LOCARD框架，采用三核认知架构：战略规划、操作执行、评估验证。引入了结构化信念状态机制来确保取证严谨性，在明确状态约束下指导探索。应用于跨链交易追踪任务。
AI.result: 创建了Thor25基准数据集（包含15.1万+真实跨链取证记录），在Bybit黑客攻击的洗钱子流验证中，LOCARD实现了高保真度的追踪结果，成功识别Sybil集群。
AI.conclusion: 将区块链取证建模为自主智能体任务是可行且有效的，为大规模区块链取证分析的智能体方法奠定了具体基础。代码和数据集已开源。

title: A Robust SINDy Autoencoder for Noisy Dynamical System Identification
summary: Sparse identification of nonlinear dynamics (SINDy) has been widely used to discover the governing equations of a dynamical system from data. It uses sparse regression techniques to identify parsimonious models of unknown systems from a library of candidate functions. Therefore, it relies on the assumption that the dynamics are sparsely represented in the coordinate system used. To address this limitation, one seeks a coordinate transformation that provides reduced coordinates capable of reconstructing the original system. Recently, SINDy autoencoders have extended this idea by combining sparse model discovery with autoencoder architectures to learn simplified latent coordinates together with parsimonious governing equations. A central challenge in this framework is robustness to measurement error. Inspired by noise-separating neural network structures, we incorporate a noise-separation module into the SINDy autoencoder architecture, thereby improving robustness and enabling more reliable identification of noisy dynamical systems. Numerical experiments on the Lorenz system show that the proposed method recovers interpretable latent dynamics and accurately estimates the measurement noise from noisy observations.

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合噪声分离模块的SINDy自编码器，用于从噪声观测中鲁棒地识别非线性动力系统并估计测量噪声。
AI.motivation: 传统SINDy方法假设动力系统在所选坐标系中稀疏表示，且对测量噪声敏感。现有SINDy自编码器虽能学习简化潜坐标和稀疏控制方程，但在噪声环境下鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: 将噪声分离神经网络结构整合到SINDy自编码器架构中，通过噪声分离模块提高对测量误差的鲁棒性，同时学习潜坐标和稀疏动力模型。
AI.result: 在Lorenz系统上的数值实验表明，该方法能从噪声观测中恢复可解释的潜动力学，并准确估计测量噪声。
AI.conclusion: 提出的噪声分离SINDy自编码器提高了对噪声动力系统的鲁棒识别能力，为从含噪声数据中发现物理规律提供了更可靠的方法。

title: Agentization of Digital Assets for the Agentic Web: Concepts, Techniques, and Benchmark
summary: Agentic Web, as a new paradigm that redefines the internet through autonomous, goal-driven interactions, plays an important role in group intelligence. As the foundational semantic primitives of the Agentic Web, digital assets encapsulate interactive web elements into agents, which expand the capacities and coverage of agents in agentic web. The lack of automated methodologies for agent generation limits the wider usage of digital assets and the advancement of the Agentic Web. In this paper, we first formalize these challenges by strictly defining the A2A-Agentization process, decomposing it into critical stages and identifying key technical hurdles on top of the A2A protocol. Based on this framework, we develop an Agentization Agent to agentize digital assets for the Agentic Web. To rigorously evaluate this capability, we propose A2A-Agentization Bench, the first benchmark explicitly designed to evaluate agentization quality in terms of fidelity and interoperability. Our experiments demonstrate that our approach effectively activates the functional capabilities of digital assets and enables interoperable A2A multi-agent collaboration. We believe this work will further facilitate scalable and standardized integration of digital assets into the Agentic Web ecosystem.

AI.tldr: 提出A2A-Agentization框架，通过Agentization Agent自动化将数字资产转化为Agentic Web中的智能体，并建立首个评估基准A2A-Agentization Bench来评估保真度和互操作性。
AI.motivation: Agentic Web作为通过自主、目标驱动交互重新定义互联网的新范式，在群体智能中扮演重要角色。数字资产作为Agentic Web的基础语义原语，将交互式Web元素封装为智能体，但缺乏自动化生成方法限制了数字资产的广泛应用和Agentic Web的发展。
AI.method: 首先形式化A2A-Agentization过程，将其分解为关键阶段并识别技术挑战；基于此框架开发Agentization Agent来自动化数字资产的智能体化；提出首个评估基准A2A-Agentization Bench，从保真度和互操作性两方面评估智能体化质量。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法能有效激活数字资产的功能能力，并实现可互操作的A2A多智能体协作。
AI.conclusion: 这项工作将促进数字资产在Agentic Web生态系统中的可扩展和标准化集成。

title: Analyzing Symbolic Properties for DRL Agents in Systems and Networking
summary: Deep reinforcement learning (DRL) has shown remarkable performance on complex control problems in systems and networking, including adaptive video streaming, wireless resource management, and congestion control. For safe deployment, however, it is critical to reason about how agents behave across the range of system states they encounter in practice. Existing verification-based methods in this domain primarily focus on point properties, defined around fixed input states, which offer limited coverage and require substantial manual effort to identify relevant input-output pairs for analysis. In this paper, we study symbolic properties, that specify expected behavior over ranges of input states, for DRL agents in systems and networking. We present a generic formulation for symbolic properties, with monotonicity and robustness as concrete examples, and show how they can be analyzed using existing DNN verification engines. Our approach encodes symbolic properties as comparisons between related executions of the same policy and decomposes them into practically tractable sub-properties. These techniques serve as practical enablers for applying existing verification tools to symbolic analysis. Using our framework, diffRL, we conduct an extensive empirical study across three DRL-based control systems, adaptive video streaming, wireless resource management, and congestion control. Through these case studies, we analyze symbolic properties over broad input ranges, examine how property satisfaction evolves during training, study the impact of model size on verifiability, and compare multiple verification backends. Our results show that symbolic properties provide substantially broader coverage than point properties and can uncover non-obvious, operationally meaningful counterexamples, while also revealing practical solver trade-offs and limitations.

AI.tldr: diffRL：一个用于深度强化学习（DRL）智能体符号属性验证的框架，支持单调性和鲁棒性等属性分析，相比点属性提供更广泛的覆盖范围。
AI.motivation: 现有DRL验证方法主要关注点属性（围绕固定输入状态），覆盖范围有限且需要大量人工工作来识别相关输入-输出对。需要一种能够分析智能体在系统状态范围内预期行为的符号属性验证方法。
AI.method: 提出符号属性的通用形式化方法，将单调性和鲁棒性作为具体实例。通过将符号属性编码为同一策略相关执行之间的比较，并将其分解为实际可处理的子属性，利用现有DNN验证引擎进行分析。
AI.result: 在自适应视频流、无线资源管理和拥塞控制三个DRL控制系统中进行实证研究。结果显示符号属性比点属性提供更广泛的覆盖范围，能够发现非明显但有操作意义的反例，同时揭示了实际求解器的权衡和限制。
AI.conclusion: 符号属性验证为DRL智能体提供了更全面的行为分析能力，diffRL框架使现有验证工具能够应用于符号分析，有助于DRL系统在实践中的安全部署。

title: PINNs in PDE Constrained Optimal Control Problems: Direct vs Indirect Methods
summary: We study physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) as numerical tools for the optimal control of semilinear partial differential equations. We first recall the classical direct and indirect viewpoints for optimal control of PDEs, and then present two PINN formulations: a direct formulation based on minimizing the objective under the state constraint, and an indirect formulation based on the first-order optimality system. For a class of semilinear parabolic equations, we derive the state equation, the adjoint equation, and the stationarity condition in a form consistent with continuous-time Pontryagin-type optimality conditions. We then specialize the framework to an Allen-Cahn control problem and compare three numerical approaches: (i) a discretize-then-optimize adjoint method, (ii) a direct PINN, and (iii) an indirect PINN. Numerical results show that the PINN parameterization has an implicit regularizing effect, in the sense that it tends to produce smoother control profiles. They also indicate that the indirect PINN more faithfully preserves the PDE contraint and optimality structure and yields a more accurate neural approximation than the direct PINN.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究物理信息神经网络（PINNs）在偏微分方程最优控制中的应用，比较了直接和间接PINN方法，发现间接PINN能更好地保持PDE约束和最优性结构。
AI.motivation: 研究PINNs作为半线性偏微分方程最优控制的数值工具，探索神经网络在PDE控制问题中的潜力，特别是PINNs的隐式正则化效应。
AI.method: 提出了两种PINN方法：基于状态约束下最小化目标的直接PINN，以及基于一阶最优性系统的间接PINN。针对Allen-Cahn控制问题，比较了三种数值方法：离散化后优化的伴随方法、直接PINN和间接PINN。
AI.result: 数值结果表明PINN参数化具有隐式正则化效应，能产生更平滑的控制轮廓。间接PINN比直接PINN更能忠实保持PDE约束和最优性结构，提供更准确的神经网络近似。
AI.conclusion: PINNs是PDE最优控制的有效数值工具，间接PINN方法在保持最优性结构方面表现更优，为偏微分方程控制问题提供了有前景的神经网络方法。

title: Agents for Agents: An Interrogator-Based Secure Framework for Autonomous Internet of Underwater Things
comment: This paper was presented in ICETAS 2026 in Bahrain
summary: Autonomous underwater vehicles (AUVs) and sensor nodes increasingly support decentralized sensing and coordination in the Internet of Underwater Things (IoUT), yet most deployments rely on static trust once authentication is established, leaving long-duration missions vulnerable to compromised or behaviorally deviating agents. In this paper, an interrogator based structure is presented that incorporates the idea of behavioral trust monitoring into underwater multi-agent operation without interfering with autonomy. Privileged interrogator module is a passive communication metadata analyzer that uses a lightweight transformer model to calculate dynamic trust scores, which are used to authorize the forwarding of mission critical data. Suspicious agents cause proportional monitoring and conditional restrictions, which allow fast containment and maintain network continuity. The evidence of trust is stored in a permissioned blockchain consortium which offers identity management which is not tampered and is decentralized without causing the overhead of public consensus mechanisms. Simulation based analysis shows that the evaluation of the result compares to a relative improvement of 21.7% in the detection accuracy compared to the static trust baselines with limited energy overhead. These findings suggest that behavior driven validation has the capability of reinforcing underwater coordination without compromising scalability and deployment.

AI.tldr: 提出基于询问器结构的动态信任监控系统，用于水下多智能体网络，通过轻量级Transformer分析通信元数据计算动态信任分数，结合区块链存储信任证据，相比静态信任基线提升21.7%检测准确率。
AI.motivation: 当前水下物联网(IoUT)中的自主水下航行器(AUV)和传感器节点依赖静态信任机制，一旦认证建立后信任关系固定，使得长期任务容易受到被入侵或行为异常代理的攻击。需要动态信任监控来增强水下多智能体协作的安全性。
AI.method: 1) 设计询问器结构，包含特权询问器模块作为被动通信元数据分析器；2) 使用轻量级Transformer模型计算动态信任分数；3) 基于信任分数授权关键任务数据转发；4) 可疑代理触发比例监控和条件限制；5) 信任证据存储在许可区块链联盟中，实现防篡改身份管理。
AI.result: 仿真分析显示，相比静态信任基线，检测准确率相对提升21.7%，同时能量开销有限。系统能够在不影响自主性的情况下快速遏制可疑行为并保持网络连续性。
AI.conclusion: 行为驱动的验证能够在不影响可扩展性和部署的情况下增强水下协调能力，动态信任监控为水下多智能体系统提供了更安全可靠的运行机制。

title: Governance-Constrained Agentic AI: Blockchain-Enforced Human Oversight for Safety-Critical Wildfire Monitoring
comment: This paper was presented at ICETAS 2026 Bahrain
summary: The AI-based sensing and autonomous monitoring have become the main components of wildfire early detection, but current systems do not provide adaptive inter-agent coordination, structurally defined human control, and cryptographically verifiable responsibility. Purely autonomous alert dissemination in the context of safety critical disasters poses threats of false alarming, governance failure and lack of trust in the system. This paper provides a blockchain-based governance-conscious agentic AI architecture of trusted wildfire early warning. The monitoring of wildfires is modeled as a constrained partially observable Markov decision process (POMDP) that accounts for the detection latency, false alarms reduction and resource consumption with clear governance constraints. Hierarchical multi-agent coordination means dynamic risk-adaptive reallocation of unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs). With risk-adaptive policies, a permissioned blockchain layer sets mandatory human-authorization as a state-transition invariant as a smart contract. We build formal assurances such as integrity of alerts, human control, non-repudiation and limited detection latency assumptions of Byzantine fault. Security analysis shows that it is resistant to alert injections, replays, and tampering attacks. High-fidelity simulation environment experimental evaluation of governance enforcement demonstrates that it presents limited operational overhead and decreases false public alerts and maintains adaptive detection performance. This work is a step towards a principled design paradigm of reliable AI systems by incorporating accountability into the agentic control loop of disaster intelligence systems that demand safety in their application.

AI.tldr: 提出基于区块链的治理感知AI架构，用于可信的野火早期预警系统，结合多智能体协调、人类授权约束和安全保障机制。
AI.motivation: 当前AI野火监测系统缺乏自适应智能体协调、结构化人类控制和可验证的责任机制，纯自主预警在安全关键场景中可能导致误报、治理失败和信任缺失。
AI.method: 1) 将野火监测建模为带约束的部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程；2) 采用分层多智能体协调动态风险自适应分配无人机；3) 使用许可区块链层设置强制人类授权作为状态转移不变量的智能合约。
AI.result: 安全分析显示系统能抵抗警报注入、重放和篡改攻击；高保真仿真实验表明系统操作开销有限，减少误报，保持自适应检测性能。
AI.conclusion: 这项工作通过将问责制整合到需要安全性的灾害智能系统的智能体控制循环中，朝着可靠AI系统的原则性设计范式迈出了一步。

title: Poisoned Identifiers Survive LLM Deobfuscation: A Case Study on Claude Opus 4.6
comment: 18 pages, 1 figure, 17 references. Code and data: https://github.com/Kieleth/obfuscated-sentinel
summary: When an LLM deobfuscates JavaScript, can poisoned identifier names in the string table survive into the model's reconstructed code, even when the model demonstrably understands the correct semantics? Using Claude Opus 4.6 across 192 inference runs on two code archetypes (force-directed graph simulation, A* pathfinding; 50 conditions, N=3-6), we found three consistent patterns: (1) Poisoned names persisted in every baseline run on both artifacts (physics: 8/8; pathfinding: 5/5). Matched controls showed this extends to terms with zero semantic fit when the string table does not form a coherent alternative domain. (2) Persistence coexisted with correct semantic commentary: in 15/17 runs the model wrote wrong variable names while correctly describing the actual operation in comments. (3) Task framing changed persistence: explicit verification prompts had no effect (12/12 across 4 variants), but reframing from "deobfuscate this" to "write a fresh implementation" reduced propagation from 100% to 0-20% on physics and to 0% on pathfinding, while preserving the checked algorithmic structure. Matched-control experiments showed zero-fit terms persist at the same rate when the replacement table lacks a coherent alternative-domain signal. Per-term variation in earlier domain-gradient experiments is confounded with domain-level coherence and recoverability. These observations are from two archetypes on one model family (Opus 4.6 primary; Haiku 4.5 spot-check). Broader generalization is needed

AI.tldr: 研究发现LLM在反混淆JavaScript代码时，即使理解正确语义，被投毒的标识符名称仍会持续出现在重构代码中，但任务框架改变可显著降低这种传播
AI.motivation: 研究LLM在代码反混淆任务中的行为模式，特别是当模型理解正确语义时，被投毒的标识符名称是否仍会持续传播，这关系到LLM在代码理解和生成任务中的可靠性与安全性
AI.method: 使用Claude Opus 4.6进行192次推理运行，测试两种代码原型（力导向图模拟和A*路径规划），共50种条件，N=3-6。通过基线测试、匹配控制实验和不同任务框架（反混淆vs重新实现）来观察被投毒标识符的传播模式
AI.result: 1) 被投毒名称在所有基线运行中持续存在（物理模拟：8/8；路径规划：5/5）；2) 即使模型在注释中正确描述实际操作，仍会写入错误变量名（15/17次）；3) 任务框架改变显著影响传播：显式验证提示无效，但将任务从"反混淆"改为"重新实现"可将传播率从100%降至0-20%
AI.conclusion: LLM在代码反混淆任务中表现出语义理解与表面形式分离的现象，被投毒标识符可能持续传播，但通过任务框架设计可有效缓解。这揭示了LLM在代码相关任务中的潜在脆弱性，对LLM在软件开发中的安全应用具有重要意义

title: ReFinE: Streamlining UI Mockup Iteration with Research Findings
summary: Although HCI research papers offer valuable design insights, designers often struggle to apply them in design workflows due to difficulties in finding relevant literature, understanding technical jargon, the lack of contextualization, and limited actionability. To address these challenges, we present ReFinE, a Figma plugin that supports real-time design iteration by surfacing contextualized insights from research papers. ReFinE identifies and synthesizes design implications from HCI literature relevant to the mockup's design context, and tailors this research evidence to a specific design mockup by providing actionable visual guidance on how to update the mockup. To assess the system's effectiveness, we conducted a technical evaluation and a user study. Results show that ReFinE effectively synthesizes and contextualizes design implications, reducing cognitive load and improving designers' ability to integrate research evidence into UI mockups. This work contributes to bridging the gap between research and design practice by presenting a tool for embedding scholarly insights into the UI design process.

AI.tldr: ReFinE是一个Figma插件，通过从HCI研究论文中提取设计启示并将其与具体设计上下文结合，为UI设计师提供实时、可操作的研究洞察，帮助弥合研究与设计实践之间的鸿沟。
AI.motivation: HCI研究论文提供了有价值的设计洞察，但设计师在实际工作中难以应用这些研究成果，主要障碍包括：难以找到相关文献、理解技术术语、缺乏上下文关联以及可操作性有限。这些问题阻碍了研究成果向设计实践的转化。
AI.method: 开发了ReFinE这个Figma插件，该系统能够：1）从HCI文献中识别和综合设计启示；2）根据设计草稿的具体上下文进行定制化；3）提供可操作的可视化指导来更新设计草稿。通过技术评估和用户研究来验证系统有效性。
AI.result: 技术评估和用户研究结果表明，ReFinE能够有效地综合和情境化设计启示，降低设计师的认知负担，并提高他们将研究证据整合到UI设计草稿中的能力。
AI.conclusion: ReFinE通过将学术洞察嵌入UI设计流程，为弥合研究与设计实践之间的鸿沟做出了贡献，展示了工具在促进研究成果向实际设计工作转化方面的潜力。

title: Towards Considerate Human-Robot Coexistence: A Dual-Space Framework of Robot Design and Human Perception in Healthcare
summary: The rapid advancement of robotics, spanning expanded capabilities, more intuitive interaction, and more integration into real-world workflows, is reshaping what it means for humans and robots to coexist. Beyond sharing physical space, this coexistence is increasingly characterized by organizational embeddedness, temporal evolution, social situatedness, and open-ended uncertainty. However, prior work has largely focused on static snapshots of attitudes and acceptance, offering limited insight into how perceptions form and evolve, and what active role humans play in shaping coexistence as a dynamic process. We address these gaps through in-depth follow-up interviews with nine participants from a 14-week co-design study on healthcare robots. We identify the human perception space, including four interpretive dimensions (i.e., degree of decomposition, temporal orientation, scope of reasoning, and source of evidence). We enrich the conceptual framework of human-robot coexistence by conceptualizing the mutual relationship between the human perception space and the robot design space as a co-evolving loop, in which human needs, design decisions, situated interpretations, and social mediation continuously reshape one another over time. Building on this, we propose considerate human-robot coexistence, arguing that humans act not only as design contributors but also as interpreters and mediators who actively shape how robots are understood and integrated across deployment stages.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过医疗机器人共设计研究，提出人类-机器人共存的概念框架，识别人类感知空间的四个解释维度，并构建人类感知空间与机器人设计空间共同演化的循环模型。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注静态的态度和接受度快照，缺乏对人类感知如何形成和演化、以及人类在塑造动态共存过程中主动作用的深入理解。机器人能力扩展、交互更直观、更深入现实工作流程的快速发展，正在重塑人机共存的内涵。
AI.method: 通过对14周医疗机器人共设计研究中9名参与者进行深度后续访谈，识别人类感知空间的四个解释维度（分解程度、时间取向、推理范围、证据来源），构建人类感知空间与机器人设计空间共同演化的概念框架。
AI.result: 提出了人类感知空间的四个解释维度，建立了人类感知空间与机器人设计空间相互关系的共同演化循环模型，提出了"考虑周到的人机共存"概念，强调人类不仅是设计贡献者，还是解释者和调解者。
AI.conclusion: 人机共存是一个动态过程，人类通过感知、解释和调解主动塑造机器人的理解和整合。需要超越静态接受度研究，关注人类在共存过程中的主动角色和感知演化机制。

title: Justified or Just Convincing? Error Verifiability as a Dimension of LLM Quality
summary: As LLMs are deployed in high-stakes settings, users must judge the correctness of individual responses, often relying on model-generated justifications such as reasoning chains or explanations. Yet, no standard measure exists for whether these justifications help users distinguish correct answers from incorrect ones. We formalize this idea as error verifiability and propose $v_{\text{bal}}$, a balanced metric that measures whether justifications enable raters to accurately assess answer correctness, validated against human raters who show high agreement. We find that neither common approaches, such as post-training and model scaling, nor more targeted interventions recommended improve verifiability. We introduce two methods that succeed at improving verifiability: reflect-and-rephrase (RR) for mathematical reasoning and oracle-rephrase (OR) for factual QA, both of which improve verifiability by incorporating domain-appropriate external information. Together, our results establish error verifiability as a distinct dimension of response quality that does not emerge from accuracy improvements alone and requires dedicated, domain-aware methods to address.

AI.tldr: 论文提出"错误可验证性"概念，衡量模型生成的解释能否帮助用户判断答案正确性，并开发了v_bal度量方法。研究发现传统方法无法提升可验证性，提出了两种有效方法：数学推理的反思重述和事实问答的Oracle重述。
AI.motivation: 随着LLM在高风险场景部署，用户需要依赖模型生成的解释（如推理链）来判断答案正确性，但目前缺乏标准方法来衡量这些解释是否真正帮助用户区分正确与错误答案。
AI.method: 1) 形式化"错误可验证性"概念；2) 提出平衡度量v_bal，通过人类标注验证；3) 评估常见方法（后训练、模型缩放等）效果；4) 提出两种改进方法：数学推理的反思重述（RR）和事实问答的Oracle重述（OR），利用领域特定外部信息。
AI.result: 1) 常见方法（后训练、模型缩放等）无法提升可验证性；2) 提出的RR和OR方法能显著提升可验证性；3) 错误可验证性是响应质量的独立维度，不能仅通过提升准确性获得。
AI.conclusion: 错误可验证性是LLM响应质量的重要独立维度，需要专门的、领域感知的方法来提升，不能通过常规的准确性改进方法实现。

title: Training Transformers in Cosine Coefficient Space
summary:
We parameterize the weight matrices of a transformer in the two-dimensional discrete cosine transform (DCT) domain, retaining only the lowest-frequency coefficients. At each forward pass the full weight matrix is reconstructed via the inverse DCT; gradients propagate through the reconstruction to update the spectral coefficients directly.
  On character-level language modeling (Shakespeare, 1M characters), a 4-layer transformer trained from scratch in this representation matches the perplexity of the standard parameterization (6.1 vs.\ 6.1) while storing 52\% of the parameters. At 4$\times$ compression (29\% of parameters), the model reaches perplexity 6.9 -- outperforming a low-rank baseline (perplexity 8.8 at 21\% of parameters) at a comparable reduction.
  The method requires no architectural changes, no pre-trained checkpoint, and no auxiliary loss. It reduces to replacing each \texttt{nn.Linear} with a drop-in spectral layer that stores $K$ DCT coefficients instead of $n \times m$ weights.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种在离散余弦变换(DCT)域参数化Transformer权重矩阵的方法，仅保留最低频系数，通过逆DCT重建完整权重矩阵，实现高效压缩而不改变架构。
AI.motivation: 动机是减少Transformer模型的参数量，实现高效压缩，同时保持模型性能。传统方法如低秩分解在压缩率较高时性能下降明显，需要一种既能有效压缩又能保持性能的方法。
AI.method: 方法是将Transformer权重矩阵参数化在二维DCT域中，仅保留最低频系数。前向传播时通过逆DCT重建完整权重矩阵，梯度通过重建过程传播以直接更新频谱系数。无需架构修改、预训练检查点或辅助损失。
AI.result: 在字符级语言建模任务上，4层Transformer在存储52%参数时达到与标准参数化相同的困惑度(6.1 vs 6.1)。在4倍压缩(29%参数)时，困惑度为6.9，优于低秩基线(21%参数时困惑度8.8)。
AI.conclusion: 该方法提供了一种简单有效的Transformer压缩方案，通过DCT域参数化实现高效压缩而不损失性能，可作为标准线性层的直接替代方案。

title: MC-GenRef: Annotation-free mammography microcalcification segmentation with generative posterior refinement
summary: Microcalcification (MC) analysis is clinically important in screening mammography because clustered puncta can be an early sign of malignancy, yet dense MC segmentation remains challenging: targets are extremely small and sparse, dense pixel-level labels are expensive and ambiguous, and cross-site shift often induces texture-driven false positives and missed puncta in dense tissue. We propose MC-GenRef, a real dense-label-free framework that combines high-fidelity synthetic supervision with test-time generative posterior refinement (TT-GPR). During training, real negative mammogram patches are used as backgrounds, and physically plausible MC patterns are injected through a lightweight image formation model with local contrast modulation and blur, yielding exact image-mask pairs without real dense annotation. Using only these synthetic labeled pairs, MC-GenRef trains a base segmentor and a seed-conditioned rectified-flow (RF) generator that serves as a controllable generative prior. During inference, TT-GPR treats segmentation as approximate posterior inference: it derives a sparse seed from the current prediction, forms seed-consistent RF projections, converts them into case-specific surrogate targets through the frozen segmentor, and iteratively refines the logits with overlap-consistent and edge-aware regularization. On INbreast, the synthetic-only initializer achieved the best Dice without real dense annotations, while TT-GPR improved miss-sensitive performance to Recall and FNR, with strong class-balanced behavior (Bal.Acc., G-Mean). On an external private Yonsei cohort ( n=50 ), TT-GPR consistently improved the synthetic-only initializer under cross-site shift, increasing Dice and Recall while reducing FNR. These results suggest that test-time generative posterior refinement is a practical route to reduce MC misses and improve robustness without additional real dense labeling.

AI.tldr: 提出MC-GenRef框架，无需真实密集标注，通过合成监督和测试时生成后验精炼来解决乳腺微钙化点分割挑战
AI.motivation: 乳腺微钙化点分析在筛查中很重要，但密集分割面临挑战：目标极小且稀疏，密集像素级标注昂贵且模糊，跨站点偏移导致纹理驱动的假阳性和漏检
AI.method: 1) 训练阶段：使用真实阴性乳腺X光片作为背景，通过轻量级图像形成模型注入物理合理的MC模式，生成精确的图像-掩码对；2) 测试阶段：采用测试时生成后验精炼，将分割视为近似后验推断，通过种子条件整流流生成器进行迭代精炼
AI.result: 在INbreast数据集上，仅使用合成标注的初始化器达到最佳Dice，TT-GPR进一步提高了召回率和FNR；在外部Yonsei队列上，TT-GPR在跨站点偏移下持续改进性能，提高Dice和召回率同时降低FNR
AI.conclusion: 测试时生成后验精炼是减少MC漏检、提高鲁棒性的实用方法，无需额外真实密集标注

title: RAVEN: Radar Adaptive Vision Encoders for Efficient Chirp-wise Object Detection and Segmentation
summary: This paper presents RAVEN, a computationally efficient deep learning architecture for FMCW radar perception. The method processes raw ADC data in a chirp-wise streaming manner, preserves MIMO structure through independent receiver state-space encoders, and uses a learnable cross-antenna mixing module to recover compact virtual-array features. It also introduces an early-exit mechanism so the model can make decisions using only a subset of chirps when the latent state has stabilized. Across automotive radar benchmarks, the approach reports strong object detection and BEV free-space segmentation performance while substantially reducing computation and end-to-end latency compared with conventional frame-based radar pipelines.

AI.tldr: RAVEN是一种用于FMCW雷达感知的计算高效深度学习架构，通过逐啁啾流式处理原始ADC数据、独立接收器状态空间编码器保持MIMO结构，并使用可学习的跨天线混合模块恢复紧凑虚拟阵列特征，同时引入提前退出机制减少计算和延迟。
AI.motivation: 传统基于帧的雷达处理流水线计算量大、端到端延迟高，需要更高效的雷达感知架构来处理原始ADC数据，同时保持MIMO结构并实现实时性能。
AI.method: 1) 逐啁啾流式处理原始ADC数据；2) 通过独立接收器状态空间编码器保持MIMO结构；3) 使用可学习的跨天线混合模块恢复紧凑虚拟阵列特征；4) 引入提前退出机制，当潜在状态稳定时仅使用啁啾子集做出决策。
AI.result: 在汽车雷达基准测试中，该方法在物体检测和BEV自由空间分割方面表现出强大性能，同时相比传统基于帧的雷达流水线显著减少了计算量和端到端延迟。
AI.conclusion: RAVEN提供了一种计算高效的雷达感知架构，通过流式处理、状态空间编码和提前退出机制实现了高性能与低延迟的平衡，适用于实时汽车雷达应用。

title: ENCRUST: Encapsulated Substitution and Agentic Refinement on a Live Scaffold for Safe C-to-Rust Translation
summary: We present Encapsulated Substitution and Agentic Refinement on a Live Scaffold for Safe C-to-Rust Translation, a two-phase pipeline for translating real-world C projects to safe Rust. Existing approaches either produce unsafe output without memory-safety guarantees or translate functions in isolation, failing to detect cross-unit type mismatches or handle unsafe constructs requiring whole-program reasoning. Furthermore, function-level LLM pipelines require coordinated caller updates when type signatures change, while project-scale systems often fail to produce compilable output under real-world dependency complexity. Encrust addresses these limitations by decoupling boundary adaptation from function logic via an Application Binary Interface (ABI)-preserving wrapper pattern and validating each intermediate state against the integrated codebase. Phase 1 (Encapsulated Substitution) translates each function using an ABI-preserving wrapper that splits it into two components: a caller-transparent shim retaining the original raw-pointer signature, and a safe inner function targeted by the LLM with a clean, scope-limited prompt. This enables independent per-function type changes with automatic rollback on failure, without coordinated caller updates. A deterministic, type-directed wrapper elimination pass then removes wrappers after successful translation. Phase 2 (Agentic Refinement) resolves unsafe constructs beyond per-function scope, including static mut globals, skipped wrapper pairs, and failed translations, using an LLM agent operating on the whole codebase under a baseline-aware verification gate. We evaluate Encrust on 7 GNU Coreutils programs and 8 libraries from the Laertes benchmark, showing substantial unsafe-construct reduction across all 15 programs while maintaining full test-vector correctness.

AI.tldr: Encrust是一个两阶段C到Rust翻译系统，通过ABI保持的封装模式和智能代理优化，在保持程序正确性的同时大幅减少不安全代码。
AI.motivation: 现有C到Rust翻译方法存在两个主要问题：要么产生不安全的输出（缺乏内存安全保证），要么在孤立函数级别翻译，无法检测跨单元类型不匹配或处理需要全程序推理的不安全构造。函数级LLM管道在类型签名改变时需要协调调用者更新，而项目级系统在真实依赖复杂性下经常无法产生可编译输出。
AI.method: 两阶段管道：第一阶段（封装替换）使用ABI保持的封装模式将每个函数翻译为两部分：保持原始原始指针签名的调用者透明shim，以及LLM针对的安全内部函数。第二阶段（智能优化）使用LLM代理在全代码库范围内解决超出函数范围的不安全构造，包括静态可变全局变量、跳过的封装对和失败的翻译。
AI.result: 在7个GNU Coreutils程序和8个Laertes基准库上评估，显示所有15个程序的不安全构造显著减少，同时保持完整的测试向量正确性。
AI.conclusion: Encrust通过解耦边界适应和函数逻辑，结合ABI保持的封装模式和全程序范围的智能优化，成功解决了现有C到Rust翻译方法的局限性，在保持程序正确性的同时实现了内存安全的提升。

title: Paper Espresso: From Paper Overload to Research Insight
summary: The accelerating pace of scientific publishing makes it increasingly difficult for researchers to stay current. We present Paper Espresso, an open-source platform that automatically discovers, summarizes, and analyzes trending arXiv papers. The system uses large language models (LLMs) to generate structured summaries with topical labels and keywords, and provides multi-granularity trend analysis at daily, weekly, and monthly scales through LLM-driven topic consolidation. Over 35 months of continuous deployment, Paper Espresso has processed over 13,300 papers and publicly released all structured metadata, revealing rich dynamics in the AI research landscape: a mid-2025 surge in reinforcement learning for LLM reasoning, non-saturating topic emergence (6,673 unique topics), and a positive correlation between topic novelty and community engagement (2.0x median upvotes for the most novel papers). A live demo is available at https://huggingface.co/spaces/Elfsong/Paper_Espresso.

AI.tldr: Paper Espresso是一个开源平台，利用大语言模型自动发现、总结和分析arXiv上的热门论文，提供结构化摘要和趋势分析，已处理超过13,300篇论文并公开所有元数据。
AI.motivation: 科学出版速度加快使研究人员难以跟上最新进展，需要自动化工具来发现、总结和分析arXiv上的热门论文，帮助研究者保持对AI研究动态的了解。
AI.method: 使用大语言模型生成结构化摘要（包括主题标签和关键词），并通过LLM驱动的主题整合提供日度、周度和月度多粒度趋势分析，系统持续部署超过35个月。
AI.result: 处理了超过13,300篇论文，公开了所有结构化元数据，揭示了AI研究领域的丰富动态：2025年中强化学习在LLM推理中的激增、非饱和主题涌现（6,673个独特主题），以及主题新颖性与社区参与度的正相关关系（最新颖论文的中位数点赞数是2.0倍）。
AI.conclusion: Paper Espresso是一个有效的自动化论文分析平台，能够揭示AI研究领域的动态趋势，为研究者提供有价值的洞察，并公开所有数据供社区使用。

title: Cardinality Estimation for High Dimensional Similarity Queries with Adaptive Bucket Probing
summary: In this work, we address the problem of cardinality estimation for similarity search in high-dimensional spaces. Our goal is to design a framework that is lightweight, easy to construct, and capable of providing accurate estimates with satisfying online efficiency. We leverage locality-sensitive hashing (LSH) to partition the vector space while preserving distance proximity. Building on this, we adopt the principles of classical multi-probe LSH to adaptively explore neighboring buckets, accounting for distance thresholds of varying magnitudes. To improve online efficiency, we employ progressive sampling to reduce the number of distance computations and utilize asymmetric distance computation in product quantization to accelerate distance calculations in high-dimensional spaces. In addition to handling static datasets, our framework includes updating algorithm designed to efficiently support large-scale dynamic scenarios of data updates.Experiments demonstrate that our methods can accurately estimate the cardinality of similarity queries, yielding satisfying efficiency.

AI.tldr: 提出一个用于高维空间相似性搜索的基数估计框架，结合局部敏感哈希、多探针LSH和渐进采样技术，支持大规模动态数据更新。
AI.motivation: 高维空间相似性搜索的基数估计问题，需要设计轻量级、易构建、准确且在线效率高的框架，以支持大规模动态数据场景。
AI.method: 1) 使用局部敏感哈希(LSH)划分向量空间并保持距离邻近性；2) 采用经典多探针LSH自适应探索相邻桶；3) 使用渐进采样减少距离计算量；4) 利用乘积量化的非对称距离计算加速高维空间距离计算；5) 包含支持大规模动态数据更新的更新算法。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能够准确估计相似性查询的基数，并具有令人满意的效率。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架有效解决了高维空间相似性搜索的基数估计问题，在准确性和效率方面表现良好，特别适用于大规模动态数据场景。

title: AI Agents Under EU Law
comment: Working Paper - April 2026, subject to updates (EC M/613, M/606, Digital Omnibus proposals)
summary: AI agents - i.e. AI systems that autonomously plan, invoke external tools, and execute multi-step action chains with reduced human involvement - are being deployed at scale across enterprise functions ranging from customer service and recruitment to clinical decision support and critical infrastructure management. The EU AI Act (Regulation 2024/1689) regulates these systems through a risk-based framework, but it does not operate in isolation: providers face simultaneous obligations under the GDPR, the Cyber Resilience Act, the Digital Services Act, the Data Act, the Data Governance Act, sector-specific legislation, the NIS2 Directive, and the revised Product Liability Directive. This paper provides the first systematic regulatory mapping for AI agent providers integrating (a) draft harmonised standards under Standardisation Request M/613 to CEN/CENELEC JTC 21 as of January 2026, (b) the GPAI Code of Practice published in July 2025, (c) the CRA harmonised standards programme under Mandate M/606 accepted in April 2025, and (d) the Digital Omnibus proposals of November 2025. We present a practical taxonomy of nine agent deployment categories mapping concrete actions to regulatory triggers, identify agent-specific compliance challenges in cybersecurity, human oversight, transparency across multi-party action chains, and runtime behavioral drift. We propose a twelve-step compliance architecture and a regulatory trigger mapping connecting agent actions to applicable legislation. We conclude that high-risk agentic systems with untraceable behavioral drift cannot currently satisfy the AI Act's essential requirements, and that the provider's foundational compliance task is an exhaustive inventory of the agent's external actions, data flows, connected systems, and affected persons.

AI.tldr: 本文首次系统性地为AI智能体提供商提供了监管映射框架，整合了欧盟AI法案、GDPR、网络安全法规等多重监管要求，提出了九类智能体部署分类和十二步合规架构。
AI.motivation: 随着AI智能体在企业中的大规模部署，提供商面临欧盟AI法案、GDPR、网络安全法案等多重监管框架的复杂合规挑战。现有研究缺乏对这些交叉监管要求的系统性分析，特别是针对智能体特有的多步骤行动链、外部工具调用等特性。
AI.method: 1. 整合2026年1月CEN/CENELEC JTC 21的M/613标准化草案、2025年7月GPAI行为准则、2025年4月M/606网络安全标准、2025年11月数字综合提案等监管文件；2. 提出九类智能体部署分类，将具体行动映射到监管触发点；3. 识别智能体特有的网络安全、人类监督、多参与方行动链透明度、运行时行为漂移等合规挑战；4. 设计十二步合规架构和监管触发映射框架。
AI.result: 1. 建立了首个系统性的AI智能体监管映射框架；2. 识别出具有不可追踪行为漂移的高风险智能体系统目前无法满足AI法案的基本要求；3. 提出提供商的核心合规任务是全面清点智能体的外部行动、数据流、连接系统和受影响人员。
AI.conclusion: AI智能体提供商面临复杂的多法规合规挑战，需要系统性的监管映射方法。高风险智能体系统的行为漂移问题是当前监管合规的主要障碍，全面清点智能体行动和影响是合规的基础。

title: ROSClaw: A Hierarchical Semantic-Physical Framework for Heterogeneous Multi-Agent Collaboration
summary: The integration of large language models (LLMs) with embodied agents has improved high-level reasoning capabilities; however, a critical gap remains between semantic understanding and physical execution. While vision-language-action (VLA) and vision-language-navigation (VLN) systems enable robots to perform manipulation and navigation tasks from natural language instructions, they still struggle with long-horizon sequential and temporally structured tasks. Existing frameworks typically adopt modular pipelines for data collection, skill training, and policy deployment, resulting in high costs in experimental validation and policy optimization. To address these limitations, we propose ROSClaw, an agent framework for heterogeneous robots that integrates policy learning and task execution within a unified vision-language model (VLM) controller. The framework leverages e-URDF representations of heterogeneous robots as physical constraints to construct a sim-to-real topological mapping, enabling real-time access to the physical states of both simulated and real-world agents. We further incorporate a data collection and state accumulation mechanism that stores robot states, multimodal observations, and execution trajectories during real-world execution, enabling subsequent iterative policy optimization. During deployment, a unified agent maintains semantic continuity between reasoning and execution, and dynamically assigns task-specific control to different agents, thereby improving robustness in multi-policy execution. By establishing an autonomous closed-loop framework, ROSClaw minimizes the reliance on robot-specific development workflows. The framework supports hardware-level validation, automated generation of SDK-level control programs, and tool-based execution, enabling rapid cross-platform transfer and continual improvement of robotic skills. Ours project page: https://www.rosclaw.io/.

AI.tldr: ROSClaw是一个用于异构机器人的代理框架，通过统一的视觉语言模型控制器集成策略学习和任务执行，利用e-URDF表示构建仿真到现实的拓扑映射，支持实时物理状态访问和自主闭环优化。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言动作和视觉语言导航系统在长时程序列化和时间结构化任务上表现不佳，模块化流水线导致实验验证和策略优化成本高昂。需要弥合语义理解与物理执行之间的差距，实现更高效的机器人控制框架。
AI.method: 提出ROSClaw框架：1) 使用e-URDF表示异构机器人作为物理约束，构建仿真到现实的拓扑映射；2) 集成数据收集和状态积累机制，存储机器人状态、多模态观察和执行轨迹；3) 统一代理保持推理与执行的语义连续性，动态分配任务特定控制；4) 建立自主闭环框架，支持硬件验证、SDK级控制程序自动生成和基于工具的执行。
AI.result: 框架实现了跨平台快速转移和机器人技能的持续改进，最小化对机器人特定开发工作流的依赖，提高了多策略执行的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: ROSClaw通过统一的VLM控制器和自主闭环设计，有效解决了现有机器人框架在长时程任务和跨平台部署中的局限性，为异构机器人系统提供了更高效、鲁棒的控制解决方案。

title: An AI Teaching Assistant for Motion Picture Engineering
comment: Accepted for publication in IEEE Signal Processing Magazine
summary: The rapid rise of LLMs over the last few years has promoted growing experimentation with LLM-driven AI tutors. However, the details of implementation, as well as the benefit in a teaching environment, are still in the early days of exploration. This article addresses these issues in the context of implementation of an AI Teaching Assistant (AI-TA) using Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) for Trinity College Dublin's Master's Motion Picture Engineering (MPE) course. We provide details of our implementation (including the prompt to the LLM, and code), and highlight how we designed and tuned our RAG pipeline to meet course needs. We describe our survey instrument and report on the impact of the AI-TA through a number of quantitative metrics. The scale of our experiment (43 students, 296 sessions, 1,889 queries over 7 weeks) was sufficient to have confidence in our findings. Unlike previous studies, we experimented with allowing the use of the AI-TA in open-book examinations. Statistical analysis across three exams showed no performance differences regardless of AI-TA access (p > 0.05), demonstrating that thoughtfully designed assessments can maintain academic validity. Student feedback revealed that the AI-TA was beneficial (mean = 4.22/5), while students had mixed feelings about preferring it over human tutoring (mean = 2.78/5).

AI.tldr: 该研究在都柏林三一学院电影工程硕士课程中实施了一个基于RAG的AI助教，通过大规模实验（43名学生，296次会话，1889次查询）评估其在教学环境中的效果，包括在开卷考试中的使用。
AI.motivation: 随着LLM的快速发展，AI驱动的教学助手应用日益增多，但具体实施细节和教学环境中的实际效益仍处于探索早期。本研究旨在解决这些问题，探索AI助教在高等教育中的实际应用效果。
AI.method: 采用检索增强生成（RAG）技术构建AI助教系统，详细描述了实施细节（包括LLM提示和代码），并针对课程需求设计和调优RAG管道。通过调查工具和多种定量指标评估影响，实验规模包括43名学生、296次会话、1889次查询，持续7周，并创新性地允许在开卷考试中使用AI助教。
AI.result: 统计分析显示，在三次考试中，无论是否使用AI助教，学生表现无显著差异（p > 0.05），表明精心设计的评估能保持学术有效性。学生反馈显示AI助教有益（平均4.22/5），但对是否偏好AI助教而非人类辅导持矛盾态度（平均2.78/5）。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，基于RAG的AI助教可以在高等教育中有效实施，不会损害学术评估的完整性。精心设计的评估方法能够保持学术有效性，而学生虽然认可AI助教的益处，但对完全替代人类辅导仍持保留态度。

title: Pickalo: Leveraging 6D Pose Estimation for Low-Cost Industrial Bin Picking
summary: Bin picking in real industrial environments remains challenging due to severe clutter, occlusions, and the high cost of traditional 3D sensing setups. We present Pickalo, a modular 6D pose-based bin-picking pipeline built entirely on low-cost hardware. A wrist-mounted RGB-D camera actively explores the scene from multiple viewpoints, while raw stereo streams are processed with BridgeDepth to obtain refined depth maps suitable for accurate collision reasoning. Object instances are segmented with a Mask-RCNN model trained purely on photorealistic synthetic data and localized using the zero-shot SAM-6D pose estimator. A pose buffer module fuses multi-view observations over time, handling object symmetries and significantly reducing pose noise. Offline, we generate and curate large sets of antipodal grasp candidates per object; online, a utility-based ranking and fast collision checking are queried for the grasp planning. Deployed on a UR5e with a parallel-jaw gripper and an Intel RealSense D435i, Pickalo achieves up to 600 mean picks per hour with 96-99% grasp success and robust performance over 30-minute runs on densely filled euroboxes. Ablation studies demonstrate the benefits of enhanced depth estimation and of the pose buffer for long-term stability and throughput in realistic industrial conditions. Videos are available at https://mesh-iit.github.io/project-jl2-camozzi/

AI.tldr: Pickalo是一个基于低成本硬件的6D位姿抓取系统，使用手腕安装的RGB-D相机多视角主动探索，结合改进的深度估计和零样本SAM-6D位姿估计，在工业环境中实现高效稳定的抓取性能。
AI.motivation: 工业环境中的箱体抓取面临严重杂乱、遮挡和传统3D感知成本高昂的挑战。现有方法通常依赖昂贵的传感器设备，限制了实际部署的可行性。
AI.method: 1) 使用手腕安装的RGB-D相机进行多视角主动探索；2) 采用BridgeDepth处理原始立体流获取精确深度图；3) 使用纯合成数据训练的Mask-RCNN进行实例分割；4) 零样本SAM-6D进行位姿估计；5) 位姿缓冲模块融合多视角观测；6) 离线生成抓取候选，在线进行效用排序和碰撞检测。
AI.result: 在UR5e机械臂和Intel RealSense D435i上部署，达到每小时600次平均抓取，96-99%的抓取成功率，在密集填充的欧洲箱上30分钟运行保持稳健性能。消融研究显示改进的深度估计和位姿缓冲对长期稳定性和吞吐量的重要性。
AI.conclusion: Pickalo证明了基于低成本硬件的6D位姿抓取系统在工业环境中的可行性，通过多视角融合、改进深度估计和零样本位姿估计等技术，实现了高效稳定的抓取性能。

title: Neuromorphic Computing for Low-Power Artificial Intelligence
comment: Published in "2025 Winter Bridge on the Grainger Foundation Frontiers of Engineering" available at https://www.nae.edu/344313/neuromorphic-computing-for-low-power-artificial-intelligence
summary: Classical computing is beginning to encounter fundamental limits of energy efficiency. This presents a challenge that can no longer be solved by strategies such as increasing circuit density or refining standard semiconductor processes. The growing computational and memory demands of artificial intelligence (AI) require disruptive innovation in how information is represented, stored, communicated, and processed. By leveraging novel device modalities and compute-in-memory (CIM), in addition to analog dynamics and sparse communication inspired by the brain, neuromorphic computing offers a promising path toward improvements in the energy efficiency and scalability of current AI systems. But realizing this potential is not a matter of replacing one chip with another; rather, it requires a co-design effort, spanning new materials and non-volatile device structures, novel mixed-signal circuits and architectures, and learning algorithms tailored to the physics of these substrates. This article surveys the key limitations of classical complementary metal-oxide-semiconductor (CMOS) technology and outlines how such cross-layer neuromorphic approaches may overcome them.

AI.tldr: 该论文综述了经典CMOS技术的局限性，探讨了神经形态计算如何通过跨层协同设计（新材料、非易失性器件、混合信号电路、专用学习算法）来提升AI系统的能效和可扩展性。
AI.motivation: 经典计算正面临能效的根本性限制，无法通过增加电路密度或改进标准半导体工艺来解决。AI日益增长的计算和内存需求需要信息表示、存储、通信和处理方式的颠覆性创新。
AI.method: 采用跨层协同设计方法，包括：1）新材料和非易失性器件结构；2）新型混合信号电路和架构；3）针对这些物理基板定制的学习算法。结合存内计算、模拟动力学和受大脑启发的稀疏通信。
AI.result: 神经形态计算通过利用新型器件模态、存内计算、模拟动力学和稀疏通信，为提升当前AI系统的能效和可扩展性提供了有前景的路径。
AI.conclusion: 实现神经形态计算的潜力需要跨层协同设计，而不仅仅是芯片替换。这种跨层神经形态方法有望克服经典CMOS技术的关键限制。

title: Artificial Intelligence and Cost Reduction in Public Higher Education: A Scoping Review of Emerging Evidence
summary: Public higher education systems face increasing financial pressures from expanding student populations, rising operational costs, and persistent demands for equitable access. Artificial Intelligence (AI), including generative tools such as ChatGPT, learning analytics, intelligent tutoring systems, and predictive models, has been proposed as a means of enhancing efficiency and reducing costs. This study conducts a scoping review of the literature on AI applications in public higher education, based on systematic searches in Scopus and IEEE Xplore that identified 241 records, of which 21 empirical studies met predefined eligibility criteria and were thematically analyzed. The findings show that AI enables cost savings by automating administrative tasks, optimizing resource allocation, supporting personalized learning at scale, and applying predictive analytics to improve student retention and institutional planning. At the same time, concerns emerge regarding implementation costs, unequal access across institutions, and risks of widening digital divides. Overall, the thematic analysis highlights both the promises and limitations of AI-driven cost reduction in higher education, offering insights for policymakers, university administrators, and educators on the economic implications of AI adoption, while also pointing to gaps that warrant further empirical research.

AI.tldr: 本文通过范围综述分析了AI在公立高等教育中的应用，发现AI能通过自动化行政任务、优化资源配置、规模化个性化学习等方式实现成本节约，但也面临实施成本、机构间不平等和数字鸿沟等挑战。
AI.motivation: 公立高等教育系统面临学生人数增加、运营成本上升和公平获取需求等多重财务压力，研究旨在系统评估AI技术（包括生成式工具如ChatGPT、学习分析、智能辅导系统等）如何帮助高等教育机构提高效率、降低成本。
AI.method: 采用范围综述方法，在Scopus和IEEE Xplore数据库中进行系统检索，识别出241条记录，其中21项实证研究符合预设资格标准，随后进行主题分析。
AI.result: 研究发现AI通过以下方式实现成本节约：1）自动化行政任务；2）优化资源配置；3）支持规模化个性化学习；4）应用预测分析改善学生保留率和机构规划。同时发现实施成本、机构间不平等获取、数字鸿沟扩大等挑战。
AI.conclusion: AI在高等教育成本降低方面既有潜力也有局限，为政策制定者、大学管理者和教育工作者提供了AI采用的经济影响见解，同时指出了需要进一步实证研究的空白领域。

title: A Quantum Search Approach to Magic Square Constraint Problems with Classical Benchmarking
summary: This paper presents a quantum search approach to combinatorial constraint satisfaction problems, demonstrated through the generation of magic squares. We reformulate magic square construction as a quantum search problem in which a reversible, constraint-sensitive oracle marks valid configurations for amplitude amplification via Grover's algorithm. Classical pre-processing using the Siamese construction and partial constraint checks generates a compact candidate domain before quantum encoding. Rather than integrating classical and quantum solvers in an iterative loop, this work uses the classical component for structured initialisation and the quantum component for search, and benchmarks the quantum approach against classical brute-force enumeration and backtracking. Our Qiskit implementation demonstrates the design of multi-register modular arithmetic circuits, oracle logic, and diffusion operators. Experiments are conducted on small grid instances, as larger grids are intractable on classical statevector simulators due to exponential memory growth. The results validate the correctness of the proposed quantum search pipeline and confirm the theoretical quadratic query advantage over classical search.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种用于组合约束满足问题（如幻方生成）的量子搜索方法，通过Grover算法进行幅度放大，相比经典搜索具有理论上的二次查询优势。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是将组合约束满足问题（特别是幻方生成）重新表述为量子搜索问题，以利用量子计算在搜索问题上的理论优势（二次加速），同时探索量子-经典混合计算范式的实际应用。
AI.method: 方法包括：1）将幻方构造重新表述为量子搜索问题，设计可逆的约束敏感oracle；2）使用经典预处理（Siamese构造和部分约束检查）生成紧凑候选域；3）实现多寄存器模运算电路、oracle逻辑和扩散算子；4）在Qiskit平台上实现量子搜索管道。
AI.result: 实验结果验证了量子搜索管道的正确性，确认了相比经典暴力枚举和回溯搜索的理论二次查询优势。由于经典状态向量模拟器的指数内存增长限制，实验仅在小型网格实例上进行。
AI.conclusion: 该工作展示了量子搜索在组合约束满足问题中的应用潜力，提出了一种量子-经典混合方法（经典用于结构化初始化，量子用于搜索），为未来更大规模量子硬件的应用奠定了基础。

title: Strengthening Human-Centric Chain-of-Thought Reasoning Integrity in LLMs via a Structured Prompt Framework
comment: This paper has been accepted at the 12th Intelligent Systems Conference (IntelliSys 2026)
summary: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompting has been used to enhance the reasoning capability of LLMs. However, its reliability in security-sensitive analytical tasks remains insufficiently examined, particularly under structured human evaluation. Alternative approaches, such as model scaling and fine-tuning can be used to help improve performance. These methods are also often costly, computationally intensive, or difficult to audit. In contrast, prompt engineering provides a lightweight, transparent, and controllable mechanism for guiding LLM reasoning. This study proposes a structured prompt engineering framework designed to strengthen CoT reasoning integrity while improving security threat and attack detection reliability in local LLM deployments. The framework includes 16 factors grouped into four core dimensions: (1) Context and Scope Control, (2) Evidence Grounding and Traceability, (3) Reasoning Structure and Cognitive Control, and (4) Security-Specific Analytical Constraints. Rather than optimizing the wording of the prompt heuristically, the framework introduces explicit reasoning controls to mitigate hallucination and prevent reasoning drift, as well as strengthening interpretability in security-sensitive contexts. Using DDoS attack detection in SDN traffic as a case study, multiple model families were evaluated under structured and unstructured prompting conditions. Pareto frontier analysis and ablation experiments demonstrate consistent reasoning improvements (up to 40% in smaller models) and stable accuracy gains across scales. Human evaluation with strong inter-rater agreement (Cohen's k > 0.80) confirms robustness. The results establish structured prompting as an effective and practical approach for reliable and explainable AI-driven cybersecurity analysis.

AI.tldr: 提出结构化提示工程框架，通过四个核心维度（上下文控制、证据可追溯性、推理结构控制、安全分析约束）增强CoT推理的完整性和网络安全检测可靠性，在DDoS攻击检测案例中实现显著性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现有CoT提示在安全敏感分析任务中的可靠性不足，而模型缩放和微调方法成本高、计算密集且难以审计。需要一种轻量级、透明且可控的机制来指导LLM推理，特别是在网络安全分析等关键领域。
AI.method: 提出结构化提示工程框架，包含16个因素，分为四个核心维度：1) 上下文与范围控制；2) 证据基础与可追溯性；3) 推理结构与认知控制；4) 安全特定分析约束。通过引入显式推理控制来减少幻觉和推理漂移，增强可解释性。
AI.result: 在SDN流量DDoS攻击检测案例中，评估多个模型家族，结构化提示相比非结构化提示带来一致的推理改进（小型模型提升达40%）和稳定的准确率提升。人类评估显示强评分者间一致性（Cohen's k > 0.80）。
AI.conclusion: 结构化提示工程是可靠且可解释的AI驱动网络安全分析的有效实用方法，提供了一种轻量级、透明且可控的替代方案，优于传统的模型缩放和微调方法。

title: Muon Dynamics as a Spectral Wasserstein Flow
summary: Gradient normalization is central in deep-learning optimization because it stabilizes training and reduces sensitivity to scale. For deep architectures, parameters are naturally grouped into matrices or blocks, so spectral normalizations are often more faithful than coordinatewise Euclidean ones; Muon is the main motivating example of this paper. More broadly, we study a family of spectral normalization rules, ranging from ordinary gradient descent to Muon and intermediate Schatten-type schemes, in a mean-field regime where parameters are modeled by probability measures. We introduce a family of Spectral Wasserstein distances indexed by a norm gamma on positive semidefinite matrices. The trace norm recovers the classical quadratic Wasserstein distance, the operator norm recovers the Muon geometry, and intermediate Schatten norms interpolate between them. We develop the static Kantorovich formulation, prove comparison bounds with W2, derive a max-min representation, and obtain a conditional Brenier theorem. For Gaussian marginals, the problem reduces to a constrained optimization on covariance matrices, extending the Bures formula and yielding a closed form for commuting covariances in the Schatten family. For monotone norms, including all Schatten cases, we prove the equivalence between the static and dynamic Benamou-Brenier formulations, deduce that the resulting transport cost is a genuine metric equivalent to W2 in fixed dimension, and show that the induced Gaussian covariance cost is also a metric. We then interpret the associated normalized continuity equation as a Spectral Wasserstein gradient flow, identify its exact finite-particle counterpart as a normalized matrix flow, obtain first geodesic-convexity results, and show how positively homogeneous mean-field models induce a spectral unbalanced transport on the sphere.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种谱Wasserstein距离族，通过矩阵范数γ参数化，统一了从普通梯度下降到Muon的谱归一化方法，并在均值场框架下建立了理论联系。
AI.motivation: 深度学习中梯度归一化对训练稳定性和尺度敏感性至关重要。参数通常按矩阵或块分组，因此谱归一化比坐标欧几里得归一化更忠实。本文旨在研究从普通梯度下降到Muon及中间Schatten型方案的谱归一化规则族，在均值场框架下建立统一理论。
AI.method: 引入由正半定矩阵范数γ索引的谱Wasserstein距离族：迹范数恢复经典二次Wasserstein距离，算子范数恢复Muon几何，中间Schatten范数在两者间插值。发展了静态Kantorovich公式，证明与W2的比较界，推导最大-最小表示，获得条件Brenier定理。对高斯边缘分布，问题简化为协方差矩阵上的约束优化。
AI.result: 对于单调范数（包括所有Schatten情况），证明了静态和动态Benamou-Brenier公式的等价性，推导出所得传输成本是固定维度下与W2等价的真正度量，并证明诱导的高斯协方差成本也是度量。将相关归一化连续性方程解释为谱Wasserstein梯度流，识别其精确有限粒子对应为归一化矩阵流，获得首个测地凸性结果。
AI.conclusion: 谱Wasserstein距离族为深度学习中谱归一化方法提供了统一的理论框架，连接了优化、最优传输和梯度流理论，为正齐次均值场模型在球面上诱导谱不平衡传输提供了理论基础。

title: Agentic Federated Learning: The Future of Distributed Training Orchestration
summary: Although Federated Learning (FL) promises privacy and distributed collaboration, its effectiveness in real-world scenarios is often hampered by the stochastic heterogeneity of clients and unpredictable system dynamics. Existing static optimization approaches fail to adapt to these fluctuations, resulting in resource underutilization and systemic bias. In this work, we propose a paradigm shift towards Agentic-FL, a framework where Language Model-based Agents (LMagents) assume autonomous orchestration roles. Unlike rigid protocols, we demonstrate how server-side agents can mitigate selection bias through contextual reasoning, while client-side agents act as local guardians, dynamically managing privacy budgets and adapting model complexity to hardware constraints. More than just resolving technical inefficiencies, this integration signals the evolution of FL towards decentralized ecosystems, where collaboration is negotiated autonomously, paving the way for future markets of incentive-based models and algorithmic justice. We discuss the reliability (hallucinations) and security challenges of this approach, outlining a roadmap for resilient multi-agent systems in federated environments.

AI.tldr: 提出Agentic-FL框架，使用语言模型代理(LMagents)自主编排联邦学习过程，解决客户端异构性和系统动态变化问题，实现自适应资源利用和偏差缓解。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习在现实场景中面临客户端随机异构性和不可预测系统动态的挑战，现有静态优化方法无法适应这些波动，导致资源利用不足和系统性偏差。
AI.method: 提出Agentic-FL框架，使用语言模型代理(LMagents)进行自主编排：服务器端代理通过上下文推理缓解选择偏差，客户端代理作为本地守护者，动态管理隐私预算并根据硬件约束调整模型复杂度。
AI.result: 该框架不仅解决技术效率问题，还标志着联邦学习向去中心化生态系统的演进，其中协作可自主协商，为未来基于激励的模型市场和算法正义铺平道路。
AI.conclusion: Agentic-FL代表了联邦学习的范式转变，但面临可靠性（幻觉）和安全挑战，需要为联邦环境中的弹性多智能体系统制定路线图。

title: How AI Aggregation Affects Knowledge
summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) changes social learning when aggregated outputs become training data for future predictions. To study this, we extend the DeGroot model by introducing an AI aggregator that trains on population beliefs and feeds synthesized signals back to agents. We define the learning gap as the deviation of long-run beliefs from the efficient benchmark, allowing us to capture how AI aggregation affects learning. Our main result identifies a threshold in the speed of updating: when the aggregator updates too quickly, there is no positive-measure set of training weights that robustly improves learning across a broad class of environments, whereas such weights exist when updating is sufficiently slow. We then compare global and local architectures. Local aggregators trained on proximate or topic-specific data robustly improve learning in all environments. Consequently, replacing specialized local aggregators with a single global aggregator worsens learning in at least one dimension of the state.

AI.tldr: 研究AI聚合器如何影响社会学习，发现更新速度过快会阻碍学习，而本地化聚合器比全局聚合器表现更好
AI.motivation: 研究AI如何改变社会学习过程，特别是当AI聚合输出成为未来预测的训练数据时，探讨AI聚合对群体信念形成的影响
AI.method: 扩展DeGroot模型，引入AI聚合器，该聚合器训练于群体信念并向智能体反馈合成信号，定义学习差距来衡量AI聚合对学习的影响
AI.result: 发现更新速度存在阈值：当聚合器更新过快时，无法找到能广泛改善学习的训练权重；而更新足够慢时则存在这样的权重。本地聚合器在所有环境下都能稳健改善学习，而全局聚合器至少在某个状态维度上会恶化学习
AI.conclusion: AI聚合器的设计对社会学习有重要影响，本地化、专业化的聚合器架构优于单一的全局聚合器，更新速度需要适当控制
